_meta.description: 攀岩名人堂注册表 / Climbing Hall of Fame Registry
_meta.note: 中国运动员通过 isChineseRepresentative 字段标记，在前端作为跨类别筛选器呈现，不再作为独立 category 值。v2.0 架构：cards[] 改为 chapters[]，新增 subcategory、featuredQuote、pullQuotes 等字段。

tagline.zh: 两届奥运金牌、世锦赛双金与 10 枚世锦赛金牌得主
tagline.en: Two-time Olympic champion and only climber to win both Boulder and Lead gold at a single World Championship

overview.zh: 斯洛文尼亚难度与抱石双修精英，东京与巴黎两届奥运金牌；以 95% 岩壁训练、零指力板与「享受即胜利」的哲学定义当代竞技攀岩的另一种可能。
overview.en: Slovenian lead and boulder dominator with two Olympic golds; she redefined elite training with 95% wall time and no fingerboard, and with the belief that fun is the condition for winning.

text.zh: 我这辈子从未像在巴黎那样相信自己。没有一刻怀疑。
text.en: Never in my life have I believed in myself like I did in Paris. Not a single moment of doubt.

tagline.zh: 首位完成 9c 的人类
tagline.en: The first person to climb 9c

overview.zh: 捷克难度与抱石双修选手，2017 年首登《Silence》9c；从 6 岁攀岩、17 岁才上 campus board，到与 Patxi 合作后的结构化训练与可视化心理训练，定义当代极限难度攀登。
overview.en: Czech lead and boulder climber who made the first ascent of Silence 9c in 2017; from climbing at six and no campus board until 17 to structured training with Patxi and visualization methods that define modern limit climbing.

text.zh: 主要动力不是击败别人，而是击败自己先前的表现。大概 60% 的我爱攀岩是因为挑战本身。
text.en: The main motivation is not for sure to beat the others but to beat my own previous performance... I would say of course maybe 60% of why I love climbing is the challenge part of it.

athleteName.zh: 阿尔韦托·希内斯·洛佩斯

tagline.zh: 东京奥运首届攀岩全能金牌得主
tagline.en: First Olympic combined climbing gold medallist (Tokyo 2021)

overview.zh: 西班牙选手，2003 年生，东京奥运凭借速度优势与难度第四名夺得首届攀岩全能金牌；在巴塞罗那 Chris Sharma 岩馆与高水平中心训练。
overview.en: Spanish climber (b. 2003) who won the first Olympic combined gold in Tokyo via speed and fourth in lead; trains at Chris Sharma's gym and the High Performance Center in Barcelona.

text.zh: 不久前我还在看 Adam Ondra、Jakob Schubert 的视频梦想成为他们那样，几乎一夜之间就和他们同场竞技了。
text.en: It wasn't long ago that I watched videos by Adam Ondra or Jakob Schubert and dreamed of being like them. I was able to catch up almost overnight and I'm going to compete against them today.

tagline.zh: 青年世锦赛难度冠军与大学攀岩兼顾
tagline.en: Junior World Champion lead, balancing university and climbing

overview.zh: 斯洛文尼亚选手，2012 年青年世锦赛难度冠军；计算机信息科学毕业，将持久力视为弱点并重点备战巴黎资格赛，从独自训练转向更多与队友合练。
overview.en: Slovenian climber, Junior World Champion lead 2012; computer science graduate who identifies endurance as his main weakness and trains collaboratively for Paris qualification.

text.zh: 想做职业运动员就要明白，有些事你必须说不。
text.en: If you want to be a professional athlete you have to understand that there are things you will have to say no to.

tagline.zh: 巴黎奥运银牌、将压力当燃料的竞技者
tagline.en: Paris Olympic silver medallist, using pressure as fuel

overview.zh: 美国选手，出身攀岩世家，父母创办 ABC Climbing；巴黎奥运全能银牌，与 Janja Garnbret 的友谊与同台成为经典画面；日常冥想与教练 Chris Danielson 指导。
overview.en: American climber from a world-class climbing family (parents founded ABC); Paris Olympic combined silver, iconic moment with Janja Garnbret; daily meditation and coaching by Chris Danielson.

text.zh: 只有你和岩壁。（父亲哲学）
text.en: It's just you and the wall.

tagline.zh: 用数学解题思维攀岩的科罗拉多学霸
tagline.en: Applying mathematical problem-solving to sport climbing

overview.zh: 美国选手（2003 年生），科罗拉多大学计算机/工程背景；2023 年难度与抱石世界排名第七，巴黎奥运第四名；目标是在攀岩中「找到解法」。
overview.en: American climber (b. 2003), University of Colorado Boulder; world no. 7 boulder & lead 2023, 4th at Paris Olympics; approaches climbing as "figuring out the solution."

text.zh: 我的目标是找到解法。
text.en: My goal is to figure out the solution.

tagline.zh: 东京奥运铜牌、一心证明自己的竞技者
tagline.en: Tokyo Olympic bronze medallist, "once a competitor, always a competitor"

overview.zh: 奥地利难度与抱石名将，东京奥运全能铜牌；东京奥运后坦言「不用再爬速度」的解脱感，认同「竞技者」身份，并立志在岩石上完成 9c 以跻身世界顶尖。
overview.en: Austrian lead and boulder specialist, Tokyo Olympic combined bronze; relief after Tokyo at no longer training speed; self-identifies as a competitor and aims for 9c on rock.

text.zh: 东京奥运结束后，不用再爬速度了，有一种难以置信的轻松。
text.en: An incredible lightness since the Olympic Games in Tokyo were over and I no longer have to climb speed.

tagline.zh: 首位红点 9b/+ 与首位 onsight 8c+ 的女子选手
tagline.en: First woman to redpoint 9b/+ and onsight 8c+

overview.zh: 意大利选手（2001 年生），2021 年首登 Erebor 9b/+，成为首位完成该等级路线的女性；2024 年首位女子 onsight 8c+；两届奥运参赛。
overview.en: Italian climber (b. 2001), first woman to redpoint 9b/+ (Erebor 2021) and first woman to onsight 8c+ (2024); two-time Olympian.

text.zh: 能完成意大利最难路线的第一次攀登是我的荣幸。
text.en: It was an honor to do the first iteration of the most difficult route in Italy.

tagline.zh: 两届世界杯总冠军、ATR 训练法与世界顶尖的教练
tagline.en: Two-time World Cup winner, ATR method and coach to the world's best

overview.zh: 西班牙巴斯克选手，2006、2007 世界杯难度总冠军，2009 世锦赛冠军；重伤退役后创立 PUC/ATR 训练体系，客户包括 Adam Ondra、Chris Sharma。
overview.en: Basque climber, World Cup lead winner 2006 & 2007, World Champion 2009; after injury retirement created PUC/ATR training, coaching Ondra, Sharma, Daniel Woods.

text.zh: 只有当身体被彻底榨干，训练才真正开始。
text.en: It is only when your body is totally broken down that the training can really begin.

athleteName.zh: 拉蒙·胡利安·普伊格布兰克

tagline.zh: La Rambla 9a+ 首登与两届世锦赛冠军
tagline.en: First ascent of La Rambla 9a+ and two-time World Champion

overview.zh: 西班牙加泰罗尼亚选手，2003 年首登 Siurana 的 La Rambla 9a+，史上最早 9a+ 之一；两届世锦赛难度冠军、五届 Rock Master 冠军，30 岁后仍保持顶尖体能。
overview.en: Catalan climber, first ascent of La Rambla 9a+ at Siurana (2003), among the first 9a+ in history; two-time World Champion, five Rock Master wins; felt "like somebody in his 20s" at 30+.

text.zh: 我继续参赛是因为我感觉很强……身体上我觉得像二十多岁的人。
text.en: I keep on competing because I feel strong... Physically I feel like somebody in his 20s.

tagline.zh: 以「机器人式」系统训练弥补天赋的工程师型选手
tagline.en: Training "like a mechanical robot" to compensate for lack of natural talent

overview.zh: 法国选手，130 场世界杯、6 金 4 银 6 铜，2017 世界杯难度总冠军；自认天赋不如 Adam、Sean，靠系统重复的技术训练与长期坚定达成高水平，退役后任法国协会教练。
overview.en: French climber, 130 World Cups, 6 gold 4 silver 6 bronze, 2017 World Cup lead winner; compensated for "no super-powers" with systematic, repetitive drilling; now coaches for French federation.

text.zh: 坚定是任何高水平梦想的基石——不是一周或一场，而是一年、四年或十年如一日。
text.en: Determination is the cornerstone of any high-performance dream—not just over a run or a week, but consistently over a year, four years, or ten years if needed.

tagline.zh: 全年 12 月完全休息、极度随性的训练哲学
tagline.en: Complete December rest and extremely flexible training volume

overview.zh: 加拿大全能竞技攀岩名将，每周 10–15 小时、4–5 天攀岩加指力与核心；每年 12 月整月不训练只攀岩，训练量「完全随感觉」调整。
overview.en: Canadian all-round competitor; 10–15 hours/week, 4–5 days climbing plus finger and core work; one full month off training each December; trains "extremely by ear."

text.zh: 我不说每周必须练 10 小时，我完全随感觉来。
text.en: I don't say I have to train 10 hours a week. I play it extremely by ear.

tagline.zh: 史上首位单季同时夺得抱石与难度世界杯总冠军
tagline.en: First to win Overall World Cup in both boulder and lead in a single debut season

overview.zh: 日本高中生（2003 年生），2023 年出道季即包揽抱石与难度世界杯总冠军；目标「每场都赢，总冠军自然来」；偶像 Mejdi Schalck，希望借奥运让攀岩被更多人认识。
overview.en: Japanese high schooler (b. 2003), first climber to win both boulder and lead World Cup overall in one debut season (2023); aims to "win every event"; idolizes Mejdi Schalck.

text.zh: 我不是瞄准世界杯总冠军，而是瞄准每场都赢。然后总冠军自然就来了。
text.en: I'm not aiming for the overall World Cup Series, but I'm aiming to win every event. Then I guess the overall will take care of itself.

tagline.zh: 多条 9b+ 与三大策略：优势、金字塔、方法
tagline.en: Multiple 9b+ and three strategies: strengths, pyramid, methods

overview.zh: 意大利难度与抱石选手，3 条 9b+、7 条 9b，Lattice 采访中总结发挥优势、构建表现金字塔与战略性方法；Erebor 定线员，Laura Rogora 首登该线。
overview.en: Italian climber with 3×9b+ and 7×9b; Lattice interview outlines playing to strengths, building performance pyramids, and strategic methods; setter of Erebor (Rogora's first 9b/+).

text.zh: 发挥优势；识别长期可改变的弱点；通过渐进等级与多样经验打牢基础。
text.en: Playing to strengths; identifying long-term changeable weaknesses; solid foundations through progressive grades and diverse experience.

tagline.zh: 9 次 ABS 全国冠军，心理训练突破竞技瓶颈
tagline.en: 9× ABS national champion; mental training as key to breaking through

overview.zh: 美国抱石名将，13 次世界杯领奖台、从 V12 进化到 V14；与心理教练 Justen Sjong 合作，以呼吸与疲劳中攀岩建立心理抵抗力，认为心理训练带来的提升远超额外力量训练。
overview.en: American boulderer, 9× ABS national champion, 13 World Cup podiums; mental coaching with Justen Sjong—breathing and climbing when fatigued—drove bigger gains than extra strength work.

text.zh: 呼吸和心态能帮助平衡一切。
text.en: Your breathing and your mind, it kind of helps balance everything out.

tagline.zh: 14 岁首位女性 V15、史上最年轻 V15 完成者
tagline.en: First woman and youngest ever to climb V15, at 14

overview.zh: 纽约日裔美籍抱石与难度选手，6 岁在中央公园被「岩上舞蹈」吸引；长期无结构化训练仅靠攀爬即达 14 岁 V15（Sleepy Rave）；奥运延期后 burnout，入读 UCLA，创立 AllRise 推动攀岩多元与可及性。
overview.en: Japanese-American boulderer and sport climber from NYC; started at 6, "dancing on rock"; reached V15 at 14 with no structured plan; post-Olympic burnout led to UCLA and AllRise for diversity and access.

text.zh: 这是我第一次完全按自己认为与未来目标和价值观一致来做决定。
text.en: For the first time, I made this decision based on what I genuinely think aligns with my future goals and values.

tagline.zh: 枫丹白露 8C 首登 Le Pied à Coulisse
tagline.en: Fontainebleau 8C FA Le Pied à Coulisse

overview.zh: 法国枫丹白露抱石专家，最高完成 8C；首登 Le Pied à Coulisse（8C，2016，或 8C+）、The Big Island（8C）、Trip Hop（8C）等，参与纪录片 Out of Sight I/II。
overview.en: French Fontainebleau boulderer, max 8C; FA of Le Pied à Coulisse (8C, 2016), The Big Island (8C), Trip Hop (8C); featured in Out of Sight I & II.

text.zh: （无直接引语，以成就与定线代表）
text.en: Le Pied à Coulisse remains one of France's hardest boulders.

value.zh: Le Pied à Coulisse 8C 首登（2016）

tagline.zh: 只靠抱石与 campus 的力量型选手
tagline.en: Power climber on bouldering and campus only

overview.zh: 德国抱石选手，波动式训练量（高强周 4–5 次、低强周 2 次），仅抱石与 campus board 提升力量，零有氧；自认擅长 athletic、compression、大动态，弱项为柔韧与指力。
overview.en: German boulderer; alternating high-volume (4–5 sessions) and low (2) weeks; only bouldering and campus for power, no running; strong on athletic/compression/big moves, weak on flexibility and finger strength.

text.zh: 变强的秘诀是爬陡而直的 30–45 度墙、难把点之间做大动作。
text.en: My tip for getting stronger is to climb steep, straight angles, 30-45 degrees; big moves between bad holds.

tagline.zh: 2021 莫斯科世锦赛男子抱石冠军，四题全顶
tagline.en: 2021 Moscow World Championship boulder gold, four tops

overview.zh: 日本抱石选手，落选东京奥运后以巴黎资格为动力，2021 年莫斯科世锦赛男子抱石决赛四题全顶夺冠，力压队友 Tomoa Narasaki；夺冠动机包括「让儿子觉得爸爸很酷」。
overview.en: Japanese boulderer; missed Tokyo Olympic team, motivated by Paris 2024; 2021 Moscow World Champs boulder gold with four tops, ahead of Tomoa Narasaki; driven in part by being "a cool Dad."

text.zh: 我不是因为没进东京奥运而动力十足，而是因为要进巴黎 2024 而动力十足，我从未停止相信自己。
text.en: I am not motivated by not making the Olympic team in Tokyo. I am motivated by making the team for Paris 2024, and I have never stopped believing in myself.

tagline.zh: 18 岁世界杯冠军、「协调流」与 20–25 小时/周训练
tagline.en: 18-year-old World Cup winner, "coordination flow" and 20–25 h/week

overview.zh: 法国抱石新星，18 岁八王子世界杯夺冠、法国冠军；16 岁完成 9a；擅长协调性「coordination flow」与动态，每周 20–25 小时训练（抱石 3、先锋 2、体能 4+、拉伸 2 等），教练 Victor Larzul、搭档 Paul Jenft。
overview.en: French boulderer; World Cup winner at 18 (Hachioji), French champion; 9a at 16; "coordination flow" and dynamic style; 20–25 h/week training with coach Victor Larzul and partner Paul Jenft.

text.zh: 最重要的是始终保持你心中的热情与火焰。
text.en: The most important is to always keep the passion and the fire you have in you.

tagline.zh: 东京奥运银牌、V16 首登与 50% 疲劳度训练法
tagline.en: Tokyo Olympic silver, V16 FA and 50% fatigue training

overview.zh: 美国抱石与全能选手，东京奥运全能银牌；每周 4–5 天、每次 2–3.5 小时，以「约 50% 疲劳」为强度指标，在抱石题上 campus 替代 campus board；区分「专注力」与「集中力」，Kendama 练专注；首登 V16 The Grand Illusion。
overview.en: American boulderer and all-rounder; Tokyo Olympic combined silver; 4–5 days/week, 2–3.5 h/session, trains to ~50% fatigue; campuses on boulders not board; focus vs concentration; Kendama for focus; FA V16 The Grand Illusion.

text.zh: 如何放下上一题抱石的失败？
text.en: How do you let go of your failures on the last boulder?

value.zh: V16 The Grand Illusion 首登

tagline.zh: V16、Action Directe 9a 与隔天 2 小时极简训练
tagline.en: V16, Action Directe 9a, and minimal training every other day

overview.zh: 哈萨克斯坦抱石与难度选手，攀岩 5 年后即获莫斯科世界杯首胜；2012 世界杯抱石总冠军，首位完成 Action Directe 9a 的俄罗斯系选手，V16；隔天训练约 2 小时，攀岩、campus、引体、自设抱石，强调多种把型单臂引体。
overview.en: Kazakh boulderer and sport climber; first World Cup win five years after starting; 2012 World Cup boulder overall; first Russian-speaker to climb Action Directe 9a; V16; trains every other day ~2 h—climbing, campus, pull-ups, one-arm on any hold.

text.zh: 重要的是你推进了多少极限、犯了多少错误。赢家是真正想赢且自然、不担心的人。
text.en: All that matters is how much you push your limits and how many mistakes you make. He who wins is the one who truly wants to and yet at the same time is natural and doesn't worry.

tagline.zh: 三届世界杯与世锦赛冠军、70% spraywall + 逆向规划
tagline.en: Three-time World Cup and World Champs winner; 70% spray wall, reverse planning

overview.zh: 日本抱石与全能名将，三届世界杯与世锦赛冠军；训练 70% spray wall、30% 比赛墙，与兄弟 Meichi 在东京郊外谷仓岩馆训练；核心原则：放松、从终点反推脚步、以髋发力的动态比靠手指更省力。
overview.en: Japanese boulderer and all-rounder; three-time World Cup and World Champion; 70% spray wall, 30% comp wall; trains with brother Meichi in barn gym; principles: be free and relax, reverse foot order from goal, hip-driven dynamic saves finger strength.

text.zh: 从终点反推脚步顺序思考。以髋部为动力的动态 beta 对手指力量和爆发力需求更少。
text.en: Think about the footsteps order in reverse from the end goal. Dynamic beta generated from the hip requires less finger strength and power.

athleteName.zh: 亚历山德拉·米罗斯瓦夫

tagline.zh: 巴黎奥运速度金牌、6.06 秒世界纪录与「从未停止战斗」
tagline.en: Paris Olympic speed gold, 6.06s world record, "never stopped fighting"

overview.zh: 波兰速度攀岩名将，巴黎 2024 资格赛 6.06 秒破世界纪录、决赛 6.10 秒夺首届速度单项奥运金牌；从「结果驱动」转向「过程驱动」，Bern 落选后与心理师 Daria Abramowicz 合作，2026 年退役并创立 6:02 Academy。
overview.en: Polish speed climber; Paris 2024 qualifier 6.06s world record, final 6.10s for first Olympic speed gold; shifted from results to process; after Bern failure worked with psychologist Daria Abramowicz; retiring 2026, founding 6:02 Academy.

text.zh: 我想被人们记住为从未停止战斗的人。
text.en: I want to be known as the one who never stopped fighting.

tagline.zh: 2018–2019 速度世界杯总冠军、与兄弟同届奥运
tagline.en: 2018–2019 World Cup speed overall; Olympic with brother Mickaël

overview.zh: 法国速度攀岩选手，与弟 Mickaël 为同届奥运唯一兄弟组合；11 次奥运速度奖牌、两届速度世界杯总冠军；跑酷与滑板背景（Williams Belle 方法）迁移至速度与抱石；东京资格赛 5.45 秒创奥运纪录后肱二头肌腱断裂退出决赛。
overview.en: French speed climber; with brother Mickaël the only siblings in same Olympic climbing event; 11 Olympic speed medals, two World Cup speed overall titles; parkour/skate background (Williams Belle method) transferred to speed and boulder; Tokyo qualifier 5.45s Olympic record then biceps tendon rupture, withdrew from final.

text.zh: 训练以成为最佳，这才让我兴奋——不仅仅是为了进步。
text.en: Training to try to do something exceptional—that's what excites me.

tagline.zh: 「我们像家人一样训练」、13 个月世界纪录从 5.25 到 5.00 秒
tagline.en: "We train like a family"; world record 5.25→5.00s in 13 months

overview.zh: 印尼速度攀岩选手，与 Veddriq Leonardo 为队友兼对手；约 13 个月内将男子世界纪录从 5.25 秒提升至 5.00 秒（刷新 7 次）；每天 4 次团队训练、始终一起从不单独，目标触及 4 秒与巴黎/洛杉矶奥运。
overview.en: Indonesian speed climber; teammate and rival of Veddriq Leonardo; in ~13 months took men's world record from 5.25s to 5.00s (seven times); four team sessions per day, always together; goal to touch 4s and Paris/LA Olympics.

text.zh: 我们像家人一样训练，始终互相支持。这是关键。
text.en: We train like a family. We always support each other. That's the key.

tagline.zh: 巴黎奥运男子速度金牌、印尼首块非羽毛球奥运金
tagline.en: Paris Olympic men's speed gold; Indonesia's first non-badminton Olympic gold

overview.zh: 印尼速度攀岩选手，巴黎 2024 半决赛 4.78 秒个人最佳、决赛 4.75 秒夺金，以 0.02 秒险胜中国吴鹏；赛前宣言「I believe I can!」兑现；与 Kiromal 互为对手与兄弟，过程比结果重要。
overview.en: Indonesian speed climber; Paris 2024 semi 4.78s PB, final 4.75s gold, 0.02s ahead of Wu Peng; pre-race "I believe I can!" delivered; with Kiromal as rivals and brothers; process over results.

text.zh: 我相信我能！
text.en: I believe I can!

tagline.zh: Silence 9c 首登、Change 5.15c 与专项膝把/力量训练
tagline.en: First 9c Silence, Change 5.15c; kneebar and power-specific prep

overview.zh: 捷克运动攀与抱石双修，Change 世界首个 5.15c、Silence 世界首个 9c；60–70 天七次 Flatanger 之旅；排除耐力、专注纯力量与膝把专项（Klaus Isele），首登日「什么都不想」的放松。
overview.en: Czech sport and boulder climber; first 5.15c Change, first 9c Silence; 60–70 days over seven Flatanger trips; excluded endurance, focused on raw power and kneebar-specific work (Klaus Isele); send day relaxation with no expectation.

text.zh: 我有勇气说这是世界首个 9c。
text.en: I have the courage to say that this is the world's first 9c.

tagline.zh: Perfecto Mundo 5.15c 首登、史上首次 9a 首攀
tagline.en: First ascent Perfecto Mundo 5.15c; world's first 9a onsight

overview.zh: 德国运动攀选手，19 岁 Estado Critico 史上首次 9a 首攀、Perfecto Mundo 5.15c 首登；与 Sharma、Ghisolfi 同线共攀；两日一休、首日 redpoint 次日分段；失眠时在脑中反复想象不 pump 地完成路线。
overview.en: German sport climber; first 9a onsight (Estado Critico, 19); first ascent Perfecto Mundo 5.15c; shared project with Sharma and Ghisolfi; two days on one off, day one redpoint day two sections; visualized climbing without getting pumped when he couldn't sleep.

text.zh: 我不只梦到爬这条线，睡不着时会在脑子里一遍遍想象，总是想象自己毫不 pump 地完成。
text.en: Not only did I dream about climbing the route, but when I couldn't fall asleep I'd visualize it in my head. I always imagined climbing it without getting pumped.

tagline.zh: 赤脚 8C+/9A、L'Alchimiste 与 No Kapote Only
tagline.en: Barefoot 8C+/9A; L'Alchimiste, No Kapote Only

overview.zh: 法国枫丹白露抱石选手，受 Patrick Edlinger 启发赤脚攀岩；L'Alchimiste 原版左出口、La Révolutionnaire 森林首条 8C+、No Kapote Only 世界第二枚 9A；仅做拉伸与户外森林攀，几乎不室内训练。
overview.en: French Font boulderer; inspired by Patrick Edlinger to climb barefoot; L'Alchimiste original left exit, La Révolutionnaire first Font 8C+, No Kapote Only world's second 9A; only stretching and outdoor forest climbing, barely any indoor training.

text.zh: 赤脚攀岩更有趣，脚法更难、更完整；攀岩鞋把脚挤得又臭。
text.en: Climbing is much more interesting barefoot; with shoes you just have one angle to work. Barefoot your feet aren't squashed and they don't smell!

tagline.zh: 世界首个 5.15a/b、La Dura Dura 与开放项目
tagline.en: World's first 5.15a/b; La Dura Dura; open projects

overview.zh: 美国运动攀与深水独攀代表；14 岁全国冠军、Biographie/Realization 世界首个 5.15a、Jumbo Love 世界首个 5.15b、La Dura Dura 第二攀；主动邀请 Ondra 挑战 La Dura Dura、与 Megos/Ghisolfi 共享 Perfecto Mundo，让好能量流动。
overview.en: American sport and DWS climber; nationals at 14, Biographie world's first 5.15a, Jumbo Love world's first 5.15b, second ascent La Dura Dura; invited Ondra to try La Dura Dura, shared Perfecto Mundo with Megos and Ghisolfi—let the good vibes flow.

text.zh: 要爬得比以往更难，就得试得比以往更狠。
text.en: To climb harder than we ever have, we have to try harder than we have ever tried.

tagline.zh: The Nose 首次全程自由攀登、23 小时
tagline.en: First free ascent of The Nose in 23 hours

overview.zh: 美国大岩壁与竞技攀岩先驱；1993 年 The Nose 首次全程自由攀登、Great Roof 小指优势；五个月身心准备、信自己再练；座右铭「耐心与放松」，与岩壁合一、精准分配每一动的能量。
overview.en: American big wall and competition pioneer; 1993 first free ascent of The Nose in 23h; Great Roof suited to small fingers; five months physical and mental prep, belief then training; motto patience and relaxed; at one with the rock, dosing energy per move.

text.zh: 再试一次，下次我会做得更好。
text.en: One more try. I'll do better next time.

value.zh: 首次全程自由 23 小时

tagline.zh: DNA 9c 首登、Change 第三攀与 150 天 250 次尝试
tagline.en: DNA 9c FA; third ascent Change; 150 days, 250 attempts

overview.zh: 法国运动攀选手，Verdon DNA 提议 9c、150 天 250 次尝试；Flatanger Nordic Marathon 与 Change 第三攀（膝垫 beta）；「我们就是裁判」、邀请世界高手来测 DNA；好周期内几乎不失误。
overview.en: French sport climber; Verdon DNA proposed 9c, 150 days 250 attempts; Flatanger Nordic Marathon and third ascent of Change (kneepads beta); "We are the judges"; invited world's best to test DNA; in a good cycle—execute without mistakes.

text.zh: 我从未试过与 DNA 相似难度、相似类型的路线。
text.en: I have never attempted a similar route with a similar level of difficulty as DNA.

tagline.zh: Excalibur 9b+、Erebor 开线首登与共享项目
tagline.en: Excalibur 9b+; Erebor FA; sharing projects

overview.zh: 意大利运动攀选手，Perfecto Mundo/Change 5.15c、Erebor 自己开线首登、Excalibur 意大利最难；与 Ondra/Rogora/Bosi 共享项目找 beta；「最重要的不是首登，是一起经历的人」；为 Excalibur 加强力量训练。
overview.en: Italian sport climber; Perfecto Mundo and Change 5.15c; Erebor first self-bolted FA; Excalibur Italy's hardest; shared Excalibur with Ondra, Rogora, Bosi to find beta; "The most important part was not the first ascent but all the people I shared the process with"; focused on power for Excalibur.

text.zh: 我决定不那么看重首登，更看重共享这样的项目、合作与友谊。
text.en: I decided to give less importance to the first ascent and focus more on the experience of sharing a project, on collaboration and friendship.

tagline.zh: Dawn Wall 自由首登、7 年与绳环解法
tagline.en: Dawn Wall first free; 7 years; loop solution

overview.zh: 美国大岩壁攀岩者，与 Kevin Jorgeson 完成 Dawn Wall 自由首登（32 段至 9a）；15 年 El Cap 经验、最后一块未自由攀登的墙面；第 16 段做不出 dyno 发明绳环下攀解法；手指老茧厚度与三周相似岩石适应。
overview.en: American big wall climber; with Kevin Jorgeson first free ascent of Dawn Wall (32 pitches to 9a); 15 years on El Cap, last unfreed face; pitch 16 couldn't do dyno, invented loop downclimb; callus thickness and 3-week sharp rock adaptation.

text.zh: 一旦我们心里开始放弃，身体就会说：我不想放弃。
text.en: As soon as we mentally started giving up, our bodies would say, 'I don't want to give up.'

tagline.zh: Burden of Dreams 第二攀、复制墙与耐心
tagline.en: Burden of Dreams 2nd ascent; replica wall; patience

overview.zh: 英国抱石选手，Burden of Dreams 9A 第二攀、Alphane 9A 与四枚 9A；谢菲尔德 Lattice 复制墙 10 天+岩壁 14 天；最难的是耐心——每动都难、需要好皮肤与休息，短训多休。
overview.en: British boulderer; Burden of Dreams 9A second ascent, Alphane 9A, four 9As total; 10 days on Lattice replica plus 14 on boulder; hardest thing is patience—each move so hard, need good skin and rest, short sessions and rest days.

text.zh: 我想我学到的是我能做到的比自以为的更多，期待将来找到自己的 BOD。
text.en: I've learned that I am capable of more than I thought I was and I'm looking forward to finding my own BODs in the future.

tagline.zh: The Nose 世界首登（1958）、Dawn Wall 首登（1970）
tagline.en: First ascent The Nose (1958); Dawn Wall (1970)

overview.zh: 美国大岩壁先驱；1958 年 The Nose 世界首登（18 个月/45 岩壁日）、1970 年与 Dean Caldwell 完成 Dawn Wall 首登（27 天、330 颗膨胀钉、拒绝救援）；与 Royal Robbins 的 siege 对 clean climbing 伦理之争定义约塞米蒂黄金时代。
overview.en: American big wall pioneer; 1958 first ascent of The Nose (18 months, 45 wall days); 1970 with Dean Caldwell first ascent of Dawn Wall (27 days, 330 bolts, refused rescue); rivalry with Royal Robbins over siege vs clean climbing defined Yosemite's Golden Age.

text.zh: 我们一定是能想到的最惨、最湿、最冷、最臭的可怜虫。但我们活着，真正地活着，像人们很少能做到的那样。
text.en: We must be the most miserable, wet, cold stinking wretches imaginable. But we're alive, really alive, like people seldom are.

featuredQuote.source: Dawn Wall 1970, note in tin can

tagline.zh: Salathé Wall 首登、Clean Climbing 哲学奠基人
tagline.en: Salathé Wall FA; Clean Climbing philosophy

overview.zh: 美国攀岩先驱；Half Dome 西北壁首登（1957）、Salathé Wall 首登（1961）、1969 年 El Capitan 首次单独攀登；倡导仅用可移除岩塞的「Clean Climbing」、反对永久膨胀钉；Nutcracker 美国首条 clean 攀登；创立 Royal Robbins 服装品牌与多部攀岩手册。
overview.en: American climbing pioneer; first ascent Half Dome NW face (1957), Salathé Wall (1961); first solo of El Capitan (1969); champion of clean climbing (removable nuts only); Nutcracker first clean climb in US; co-founded Royal Robbins brand and authored climbing manuals.

text.zh: 下钉一颗膨胀钉的决定具有巨大重要性——就像诗里的一个词，能影响整首诗。
text.en: The decision to place a single piton is a matter of enormous importance—like a single word in a poem, it can affect the entire composition.

tagline.zh: The Nose 单日首登（1975）、Stonemasters 领袖
tagline.en: The Nose in a day (1975); Stonemasters leader

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者；「The Bird」；1975 年与 John Long、Bill Westbay 完成 The Nose 单日首登（17 小时 45 分），源自 Frank Sacherer 十年构想；Yosemite 百余条首登、Stonemasters 核心；后拓展至 Patagonia 与阿拉斯加。
overview.en: American climber; "The Bird"; 1975 with John Long and Bill Westbay first one-day ascent of The Nose (17h45m), concept from Frank Sacherer; 100+ first ascents in Yosemite, Stonemasters core; later Patagonia and Alaska.

text.zh: 我们还能做什么？除了 El Cap 没别的。
text.en: What we gonna do? Well, nothing but El Cap would do.

featuredQuote.source: Harding 语，Bridwell 承续 Nose 单日理念

tagline.zh: The Nose 速攀 1:58:07（2018）、Dawn Wall 自由首登
tagline.en: The Nose speed 1:58:07 (2018); Dawn Wall first free

overview.zh: 美国大岩壁与速攀；2018 年与 Alex Honnold 创 The Nose 速攀世界纪录 1:58:07（首次破 2 小时）；2015 年与 Kevin Jorgeson Dawn Wall 自由首登；速攀核心「去除低效」、每次攀爬后系统复盘。
overview.en: American big wall and speed climber; 2018 with Alex Honnold Nose speed record 1:58:07 (first sub-2h); 2015 with Kevin Jorgeson Dawn Wall first free; speed philosophy "trim inefficiency," systematic debrief after each climb.

text.zh: 速攀的关键是去除低效。
text.en: The main thing with speed climbing is to trim inefficiency.

tagline.zh: The Nose 速攀 1:58:07、可视化与日记心理体系
tagline.en: Nose speed 1:58:07; visualization and journaling

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者；与 Caldwell 创 The Nose 速攀纪录；心理准备为先：可视化、自我对话、正念、2005 年起攀岩日记、次最大训练；El Cap Free Solo 见 06-explorer-free-solo。
overview.en: American climber; with Caldwell Nose speed record; mental prep first: visualization, self-talk, mindfulness, climbing journal since 2005, submaximal training; El Cap Free Solo in 06-explorer-free-solo.

text.zh: 大目标只是很多小目标持续做的结果。小事做得够多，大事就会发生。
text.en: Big goals are just the outgrowth of lots of little goals done consistently. If you do enough little things, something big happens.

tagline.zh: Dawn Wall 自由首登搭档、Pitch 15 七天鏖战
tagline.en: Dawn Wall first free partner; Pitch 15 seven-day battle

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者；与 Tommy Caldwell 2015 年完成 Dawn Wall 首次全程自由攀登（19 天）；Pitch 15 鏖战七天、指皮磨损与贴胶布坚持；Caldwell 等待搭档共同登顶；1Climb 联合创始人。
overview.en: American climber; with Tommy Caldwell 2015 first free ascent of Dawn Wall (19 days); seven-day battle on Pitch 15, skin management and taping; Caldwell waited for partner to summit together; co-founded 1Climb.

text.zh: 我如释重负。
text.en: I felt overwhelmed with relief.

tagline.zh: NIAD 首创（1986）、Astroman & Rostrum 自由单独连攀
tagline.en: NIAD first (1986); Astroman & Rostrum free solo link-up

overview.zh: 加拿大攀岩者；与 John Bachar 1986 年 Nose + Half Dome 单日连攀（NIAD）10 小时；1987 年 Astroman 与 The Rostrum 自由单独连攀首完；1986–1992 年多次刷新 The Nose 速攀纪录（与 Bachar/Schultz/Florine）。
overview.en: Canadian climber; with John Bachar 1986 Nose + Half Dome in a day (NIAD) 10h; 1987 first free solo link-up of Astroman and The Rostrum; 1986–1992 multiple Nose speed records (Bachar, Schultz, Florine).

text.zh: 我渴望一场需要我全力以赴——甚至更多的远征。
text.en: I craved an odyssey that required my all–and quite possibly more.

tagline.zh: The Nose 单日首登（1975）、40+ 著作与 Stonemasters
tagline.en: The Nose in a day (1975); 40+ books; Stonemasters

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者与作家；1975 年与 Bridwell、Westbay The Nose 单日首登；同年与 Kauk、Bachar Astroman 自由首登；Stonemasters 成员、Josh Tree 无保护推广；40+ 著作含《How to Rock Climb》、Banff 奖与文学奖。
overview.en: American climber and writer; 1975 with Bridwell and Westbay first one-day ascent of The Nose; same year with Kauk and Bachar first free ascent of Astroman; Stonemasters; 40+ books including How to Rock Climb, Banff and literary awards.

text.zh: （Pitch 13）手臂泵爆仍顶住，差点 80 英尺冲坠前成功放保护。
text.en: Pushed through pumped arms, nearly falling 80 feet before successfully placing protection.

tagline.zh: 2017 年 El Capitan Freerider 无保护独攀、奥斯卡纪录片《Free Solo》主角
tagline.en: First free solo of El Capitan Freerider 2017; subject of Oscar-winning Free Solo

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者，2017 年 6 月 3 日完成 El Capitan Freerider 史上首次无保护独攀，约 4 小时内完成 3000 英尺；一年以上系统准备、数百小时结组练习与路线记忆；TED 与神经科学研究揭示其恐惧管理与杏仁核反应。
overview.en: American climber; first free solo of El Capitan Freerider on 3 June 2017 in under 4 hours; over a year of systematic prep, hundreds of hours of roped rehearsal and route memorization; TED and fMRI research on fear management and amygdala response.

text.zh: 我只有在绝对确定时才无保护独攀。不是自信——是确定。
text.en: I only free-solo when I'm absolutely certain. Not confident — certain.

tagline.zh: Yosemite 独攀先驱、Bachar-Yerian 路线与 Bachar 梯子发明者
tagline.en: Yosemite free solo pioneer; Bachar-Yerian route and Bachar ladder inventor

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者，1970–80 年代 Yosemite 无保护独攀的代表人物；New Dimensions 5.11a、Father Figure 5.13a 等独攀；与 Dave Yerian 开辟 Bachar-Yerian；发明 Bachar 梯子；强调「把能力提到岩壁水平」与可下攀脱困。
overview.en: American climber; defining figure of Yosemite free solo in the 1970s–80s; solos including New Dimensions 5.11a, Father Figure 5.13a; Bachar-Yerian with Dave Yerian; invented Bachar ladder; philosophy: elevate skill to the rock, down-climb out of trouble.

text.zh: 我不是为了能做动作而练，我练是为了知道我能做那些动作。
text.en: I don't train so that I can do the moves; I train so that I know that I can do the moves.

tagline.zh: Astroman + Rostrum 同日自由独攀、NIAD 与 Bachar 共创
tagline.en: First same-day free solo of Astroman + Rostrum; NIAD with Bachar

overview.zh: 加拿大攀岩者，1987 年首度同日完成 Astroman 与 The Rostrum 自由独攀，史上仅 Potter、Honnold 重复；1986 年与 Bachar 完成 Nose + Half Dome 单日连攀；将独攀描述为「原始状态」、本能与流动，强调体能不应成为限制因素。
overview.en: Canadian climber; 1987 first same-day free solo of Astroman and The Rostrum, repeated only by Potter and Honnold; 1986 with Bachar Nose + Half Dome in a day; describes solo as primal state, instinct and flow; fitness should never be the limiting factor.

text.zh: 一场梦——那种让你回到原始状态、跟随本能、处于心流的体验，带来无与伦比的高峰。
text.en: A dream — the kind of experience that sends you back to a primal state where you are following your instinct and being in the flow — which just gives you a high like no other.

tagline.zh: Yosemite Triple Crown 一日连攀、FreeBASE 发明者、翼装飞行者
tagline.en: First Yosemite Triple Crown in a day; FreeBASE inventor; wingsuit pioneer

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者与极限运动员，2001 年与 Timmy O'Neill 完成 Half Dome、Mt. Watkins、El Capitan 一日连攀；发明 FreeBASE（无保护独攀配 BASE 伞）；高线行走与翼装飞行先驱；「将死亡转化为飞翔」的哲学；2015 年翼装飞行事故离世。
overview.en: American climber and extreme athlete; 2001 with Timmy O'Neill first Triple Crown (Half Dome, Mt. Watkins, El Cap) in a day; invented FreeBASE; highline and wingsuit pioneer; philosophy of "turning dying into flying"; died 2015 wingsuit accident.

text.zh: 将死亡转化为飞翔，是我基本人生原则的隐喻。
text.en: This concept of turning dying into flying is a metaphor for my basic life principle.

tagline.zh: 美国抱石之父、粉袋与动态攀登引入者
tagline.en: Father of American bouldering; introduced chalk and dynamic movement

overview.zh: 美国数学家与攀岩者，1950 年代将体操粉袋与受控动态引入美国攀岩；《The Art of Bouldering》定义抱石为独立运动；B1–B3 分级、Thimble 5.12a 无保护；2008 年 AAC Pinnacle Award。
overview.en: American mathematician and climber; introduced gymnastic chalk and controlled dynamics in the 1950s; "The Art of Bouldering" defined bouldering as a sport; B1–B3 grades, Thimble 5.12a free solo; 2008 AAC Pinnacle Award.

text.zh: 首登是一种创造，与绘画或歌曲同义。
text.en: A first ascent is a creation in the same sense as is a painting or a song.

tagline.zh: 世界首个 8b/8b+/8c/9a、campus board 发明者
tagline.en: First 8b, 8b+, 8c, 9a; inventor of campus board

overview.zh: 德国运动攀先驱，1984–1991 年连续创世界最难级别：Kanal im Rücken 8b、Punks in the Gym 8b+、Wallstreet 8c、Action Directe 9a；与 Kurt Albert 推广 redpoint 与训练；1992 年车祸离世。
overview.en: German sport climbing pioneer; 1984–1991 set world's hardest: Kanal im Rücken 8b, Punks in the Gym 8b+, Wallstreet 8c, Action Directe 9a; with Kurt Albert spread redpoint and training; died 1992 in car accident.

text.zh: 若攀岩是艺术，创造力便是其核心。
text.en: If climbing is an art, then creativity is its main component.

tagline.zh: 英国最佳攀岩者、首 8a+/8c+、Master's Wall、心理训练
tagline.en: Best British climber; first 8a+, 8c+; Master's Wall; mental training

overview.zh: 英国攀岩者，1980 年代中后期世界最强之一；首 8a+、首 8c+（Liquid Ambar）；Master's Wall E7、Superman 8B；With Winning in Mind 后首夺比赛；The Foundry 创办者、Revelations 与 Mastermind 作者。
overview.en: British climber; among world's best mid–late 1980s; first 8a+, first 8c+ (Liquid Ambar); Master's Wall E7, Superman 8B; won first comp after With Winning in Mind; founded The Foundry; author of Revelations and Mastermind.

text.zh: 我想为自己攀岩、做首登，最想要的是乐趣。
text.en: I wanted to climb for myself. I wanted to do first ascents. Most of all I wanted to have fun.

tagline.zh: 英国首 8a Statement of Youth、首 8c+ Hubble、Moonboard
tagline.en: UK first 8a Statement of Youth, first 8c+ Hubble; Moonboard

overview.zh: 英国攀岩者，1984 年 Statement of Youth 开启英国运动攀革命；1989 法国首 8c Agincourt、1990 年 Hubble 世界首 8c+（或 9a）；Moon Climbing 与 Moonboard 创立者；48 岁红点 Rainshadow 9a。
overview.en: British climber; 1984 Statement of Youth sparked UK sport climbing; 1989 France first 8c Agincourt, 1990 Hubble world's first 8c+ (or 9a); founded Moon Climbing and Moonboard; redpointed Rainshadow 9a aged 48.

text.zh: Statement 之所以引起轰动不仅因为难，还因为我打了六七颗螺栓。
text.en: The reason it made so much noise wasn't only because it was so hard, but because I'd placed six or seven bolts on it.

tagline.zh: Redpoint（Rotpunkt）概念创立者、自由攀登运动奠基人
tagline.en: Originator of redpoint (Rotpunkt); foundational to free climbing movement

overview.zh: 德国攀岩者，1970 年代在 Frankenjura 用红点标记无需器械即可自由攀的路线，催生「redpoint」一词与自由攀登运动，进而推动运动攀发展；与 Gullich 长期搭档；2010 年 via ferrata 拍摄时坠亡。
overview.en: German climber; in 1970s Frankenjura marked routes that could be freed with red dots, giving rise to "redpoint" and the free climbing movement; long-time partner of Gullich; died 2010 fall while photographing via ferrata.

text.zh: 能在整条路线上都画上红叉、完全自由攀后，就在路线底部画红点。
text.en: Once he could place a red X on all pitons and free the entire route, he would paint a red dot at the base.

tagline.zh: 大岩壁先驱、clean climbing 倡导者、Basic/Advanced Rockcraft
tagline.en: Big wall pioneer; clean climbing advocate; Basic/Advanced Rockcraft

overview.zh: 美国攀岩先驱，Half Dome 西北壁、The Nose 与 Salathé Wall 首登或早期 ascent；与 Chouinard 推动 clean climbing；《Advanced Rockcraft》中首登即创造、风格至上的哲学；Royal Robbins 服装品牌创始人。
overview.en: American pioneer; Half Dome NW face, Nose, Salathé Wall first or early ascents; with Chouinard advocated clean climbing; Advanced Rockcraft philosophy of first ascent as creation; founded Royal Robbins clothing.

text.zh: 首登是一种创造，与绘画或歌曲同义。
text.en: A first ascent is a creation in the same sense as is a painting or a song.

tagline.zh: Patagonia 创始人、clean climbing 与 Hexentrics、风格倡导者
tagline.en: Founder of Patagonia; clean climbing and Hexentrics; style advocate

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者与企业家，North America Wall、Muir Wall 参与首登；Chouinard Equipment 与 Patagonia 创始人；1970 年代初与 Frost 推出 Hexentrics 与 clean climbing；2022 年将 Patagonia 捐给气候信托。
overview.en: American climber and entrepreneur; North America Wall, Muir Wall first ascents; founded Chouinard Equipment and Patagonia; early 1970s with Frost introduced Hexentrics and clean climbing; 2022 donated Patagonia to climate trust.

text.zh: 风格是现代攀岩的基础。
text.en: Style is the basis of modern rock climbing.

tagline.zh: 运动攀先驱、首 7c/7c+ 与首 onsight 7b+/7c、Verdon 独攀纪录片
tagline.en: Sport climbing pioneer; first 7c/7c+ and first onsight 7b+/7c; Verdon solo films

overview.zh: 法国攀岩者，1979 Nymphodalle 7c、1981 Le Toit 7c+；1982 年首 onsight 7b+ 与 7c；1983 法国首 8a；Sportroccia/Rock Master/Snowbird 冠军；《La Vie au bout des doigts》使其成名；2012 年家中去世。
overview.en: French climber; 1979 Nymphodalle 7c, 1981 Le Toit 7c+; 1982 first onsight 7b+ and 7c; 1983 France first 8a; Sportroccia/Rock Master/Snowbird winner; La Vie au bout des doigts made him famous; died 2012 at home.

text.zh: 攀岩作为真正的活的艺术学科，为许多人铺平了道路。
text.en: He was the first to establish climbing as a true discipline of live art.

tagline.zh: Astroman 自由首登、Midnight Lightning、Separate Reality、Cliffhanger 替身
tagline.en: Astroman FFA, Midnight Lightning, Separate Reality; Cliffhanger double

overview.zh: 美国攀岩者，Camp 4 常驻；1975 年与 Long、Bachar 完成 Astroman 自由首登；1978 年 Separate Reality 无 cam 首攀、Midnight Lightning V8 首登；1990 Crossroads、1997 Magic Line；与 Gullich 为《Cliffhanger》替身。
overview.en: American climber, Camp 4 fixture; 1975 with Long and Bachar Astroman FFA; 1978 Separate Reality without cams, Midnight Lightning V8 FA; 1990 Crossroads, 1997 Magic Line; with Gullich doubled in Cliffhanger.

text.zh: （路线名来自）Jimi Hendrix 的歌。
text.en: (Route names from) Jimi Hendrix songs.

tagline.zh: 女子首 7c+/8a 与 8a+、阿尔卑斯北壁冬季独攀三部曲、Piolet d'Or 终身奖
tagline.en: First woman 7c+/8a and 8a+; winter solo Alps north face trilogy; Piolet d'Or Lifetime

overview.zh: 法国攀岩者与登山者，1985 年女子首 7c+/8a、1988  Choucas 女子首 8a+；三届 Sportroccia 冠军；1990 年代 Bonatti Pillar、Voie Destivelle、Eiger/Jorasses/Matterhorn 冬季独攀；2020 年女子首位 Piolet d'Or 终身奖。
overview.en: French climber and alpinist; 1985 first woman 7c+/8a, 1988 Choucas first woman 8a+; three-time Sportroccia winner; 1990s Bonatti Pillar, Voie Destivelle, Eiger/Jorasses/Matterhorn winter solos; 2020 first woman Piolet d'Or Lifetime.

text.zh: （从竞技）转向登山与阿尔卑斯。
text.en: (Retired from competition) to focus on mountaineering and alpine climbing.

tagline.zh: V 级创立者、Hueco Tanks 开发、Stone Crusade、首款商用 crash pad
tagline.en: V-grade originator; Hueco Tanks developer; Stone Crusade; first commercial crash pad

overview.zh: 美国抱石先驱，绰号 Verm；Hueco Tanks 400+ 首登、1991 年指南推出 V 级；《Stone Crusade》抱石史；与 Pottenger 设计首款商用 crash pad（Kinnaloa Sketchpad）；Lord of the Rings 8b 凉鞋独攀海报。
overview.en: American bouldering pioneer, nicknamed Verm; 400+ FAs at Hueco Tanks, 1991 guide launched V-scale; Stone Crusade bouldering history; with Pottenger first commercial crash pad; Lord of the Rings 8b sandals solo poster.

text.zh: 别让夸张风格骗了你——这是个非常聪明的人。
text.en: Don't let the hyperbolic style fool you—this is one very smart guy.

tagline.zh: Campus board 发明者、为 Action Directe 发展爆发力
tagline.en: Inventor of campus board; developed plyometrics for Action Directe

overview.zh: 1988 年为攻克 Action Directe 发明 campus board，发展指臂爆发力与动态锁定；纽伦堡 Campus Centre 首块；Moffatt、Moon 等早期采用；pan Güllich 成法/意通称。
overview.en: Invented campus board in 1988 for Action Directe to develop finger and arm plyometrics; first board at Campus Centre Nuremberg; early adopters included Moffatt and Moon; known as pan Güllich in French/Italian.

text.zh: （Campus board）用于提升爆发力与动态锁定。
text.en: (Campus board) for plyometric performance and lock-off strength.

tagline.zh: Moonboard 发明者、可复制抱石序列与全球数据库
tagline.en: Inventor of Moonboard; reproducible boulder sequences and global database

overview.zh: 与 Andy Pollitt 在谢菲尔德地下室造早期木制板；2005 年与 Rich Simpson 商业推出 Moonboard；2016 年 LED 版、近 200 支点、全球数万条共享序列。
overview.en: Early wooden boards with Andy Pollitt in Sheffield cellar; 2005 commercial Moonboard with Rich Simpson; 2016 LED version, ~200 holds, tens of thousands of shared problems globally.

text.zh: （Moonboard）让全球用户攀爬相同支点布局的序列。
text.en: (MoonBoard) identical grid of holds on each edition for shared sequences.

tagline.zh: Progression/Transgression 指力板、指力训练研究与博士论文
tagline.en: Progression/Transgression fingerboards; finger strength research and PhD

overview.zh: 西班牙运动科学博士，2003 年「regletómetro」原型、与 100+ 攀岩者合作研究；Progression® 八档渐进边条、科学选深；Transgression® 进阶版；附方法与管理指南。
overview.en: Spanish sports scientist, PhD; 2003 'regletómetro' prototype, research with 100+ climbers; Progression® eight progressively smaller edges; Transgression® for advanced; includes methodology and load guidelines.

text.zh: 控制与递进训练负荷、个性化、以努力与进步为动机、应用科学方法，是我发展的核心。
text.en: Controlling and stepping up load, personalization, motivation from effort and improvement, and the scientific method are fundamental to my vision.

tagline.zh: 《Training for Climbing》《Maximum Climbing》、能量系统与测试
tagline.en: Training for Climbing, Maximum Climbing; energy system and testing

overview.zh: 攀岩教练与研究者，八本书含《Training for Climbing》多版与西语版、《Maximum Climbing》；强调关键表现指标测试、能量系统训练模型、青少年多项目发展；PhysiVāntage 创办。
overview.en: Climbing coach and researcher; eight books including Training for Climbing (multiple editions, Spanish), Maximum Climbing; advocates testing key performance indicators, energy system model, multi-sport for youth; founded PhysiVāntage.

text.zh: 准确测试关键表现指标是设计高效训练计划的基础。
text.en: Accurate athlete testing of key performance indicators is the foundation for a highly effective training program.

athleteName.zh: 马克·安德森 & 迈克·安德森

tagline.zh: 《Rock Climber's Training Manual》与 Rock Prodigy 周期化
tagline.en: Rock Climber's Training Manual and Rock Prodigy periodization

overview.zh: 《The Rock Climber's Training Manual》作者，提出系统周期化（基础/力量/力量耐力/调整）；Mark 5.14c redpoint、5.13b onsight、El Cap 自由攀；Rock Prodigy Training Center 与个性化指导。
overview.en: Authors of The Rock Climber's Training Manual; systematic periodization (base/strength/power endurance/taper); Mark 5.14c redpoint, 5.13b onsight, El Cap free; Rock Prodigy Training Center and coaching.

text.zh: 全面计划、量身指导，帮助攀岩者释放身体潜力。
text.en: Comprehensive training advice and tailored one-on-one coaching to unlock physical potential.

tagline.zh: 英国攀岩教练先驱、个性化计划、Masterclass 技术影片
tagline.en: Pioneer British climbing coach; personalized plans; Masterclass technique films

overview.zh: 1994 年起 3000+ 攀岩者、早于其他教练公司 15 年；专注 V2–V6/6a–7c；每份计划亲力亲为、质量优于数量、数据支持；Masterclass 为 YouTube 首批技术系列。
overview.en: Since 1994 trained 3000+ climbers, 15 years before other coaching companies; specializes in V2–V6/6a–7c; every plan by him, quality over quantity, data-backed; Masterclass among first technique series on YouTube.

text.zh: 我亲自完成每一份训练计划，从不用初级助手或 AI。
text.en: I produce every single training plan myself. I never use a junior assistant and I certainly never use AI.

athleteName.zh: 汤姆·兰德尔 & 皮特·惠特克

tagline.zh: Wide Boyz、木制裂缝训练、Century Crack 与《Crack Climbing》
tagline.en: Wide Boyz; wooden crack training; Century Crack and Crack Climbing book

overview.zh: 在谢菲尔德地下室建造横跨全室的木制裂缝系统，两年系统训练后 2011 年赴美完成 Century Crack 5.14b 首登（当时最难 offwidth）；《Crack Climbing: The Definitive Guide》与裂缝学校。
overview.en: Built wooden crack systems traversing Tom's Sheffield cellar; two years systematic training before 2011 US trip and Century Crack 5.14b FA; Crack Climbing: The Definitive Guide and crack schools.

text.zh: 我们更系统、更专注，可能因此再次推动（裂缝）标准。
text.en: We were a bit more systematic and maybe more dedicated to just that style for that period—maybe that made the difference in pushing standards again.

tagline.zh: 《9 out of 10 Climbers》《Make or Break》、实用决策与伤病
tagline.en: 9 out of 10 Climbers, Make or Break; practical decisions and injury

overview.zh: 苏格兰攀岩者与教练，《9 out of 10 Climbers Make the Same Mistakes》直面信息过载与决策；《Make or Break》伤病预防与复出；Neil Gresham 称「从繁琐理论迈向真正有效的实用建议」。
overview.en: Scottish climber and coach; 9 out of 10 Climbers addresses information overload and confident decisions; Make or Break on injury and return; Gresham: a step towards practical advice that really works.

text.zh: 今日的瓶颈是在信息洪流中筛选出与你相关的内容。
text.en: Navigating this barrage of information has been the limiting step for today's climber.

tagline.zh: 数据驱动训练、全球最大攀岩者表现数据集、Lattice 应用
tagline.en: Data-driven training; world's largest climber dataset; Lattice app

overview.zh: 由教练与运动科学家组成，基于多年测试与 50,000+ 攀岩者数据提供评估与个性化计划；LatticePlans 由智能训练技术生成与调整；免费/远程/线下评估与多种计划档位。
overview.en: Team of coaches and sports scientists; assessments and plans from largest dataset of climber metrics; LatticePlans powered by intelligent training tech; free/remote/in-person assessments and multiple plan tiers.

text.zh: 我们所做的一切核心是数据。
text.en: At the core of everything we do is data.

tagline.zh: 2024 巴黎奥运速度银牌、中国首位男子速度奥运奖牌
tagline.en: 2024 Paris Olympic speed silver; China's first male speed Olympic medal

overview.zh: 2002 年生于湖南邵阳，速度专项；2024 吴江世界杯夺冠、巴黎奥运决赛 4.77 秒 PB 获银；赛前耳机封闭、专注发挥训练水平。
overview.en: Born 2002 Shaoyang Hunan, speed specialist; 2024 Wujiang World Cup winner, Paris Olympic final 4.77s PB silver; pre-race headphone ritual, focus on executing training level.

text.zh: 稳定发挥来自训练的持续积累。我没想爬多快，只想把训练水平发挥出来。
text.en: Stable performance comes from the constant accumulation of training. I didn't think about how fast to climb — I just focused on letting my training-level performance come through.

tagline.zh: 2024 巴黎奥运速度银牌、中国攀岩首枚奥运奖牌
tagline.en: 2024 Paris Olympic speed silver; China's first Olympic climbing medal

overview.zh: 2000 年生，东华大学；15 岁从田径转项，九年成世界级速度选手；巴黎 6.18 秒亚洲纪录、银牌；AI 辅助与跨界选材代表。
overview.en: Born 2000, Donghua University; switched from track at 15, world-class in nine years; Paris 6.18s Asian record, silver; AI-assisted prep and cross-discipline recruitment.

text.zh: 努力！你才有可能成功。
text.en: Work hard! Only then do you have a chance to succeed.

tagline.zh: 2023 亚洲区奥运资格赛冠军、巴黎奥运难度首秀
tagline.en: 2023 Asian Olympic qualifier champion; Paris lead debut

overview.zh: 4 岁开始攀岩；2023 亚洲区资格赛夺冠获巴黎名额；难度/综合专项。
overview.en: Started climbing at 4; 2023 Asian qualifier champion for Paris; lead/combi specialist.

text.zh: （见来源）
text.en: (See sources)

tagline.zh: 2022 世界杯抱石铜牌（中国历史最佳）、巴黎奥运
tagline.en: 2022 World Cup bouldering bronze (China best); Paris Olympic

overview.zh: 6 岁接触、8 岁系统训练；2022 首战世界杯抱石铜牌创中国历史；「女子训练男子化」；2024 柯桥铜牌、吴江难度银牌，巴黎资格。
overview.en: Started at 6, systematic at 8; 2022 first World Cup bouldering bronze; 2024 Keqiao bronze, Wujiang lead silver; Paris qualifier.

text.zh: 通过比赛可以丈量自己和世界顶尖的差距，更清楚自己的潜力和不足。现在比以往更有信心去争取巴黎奥运资格。
text.en: Through competition I can gauge the gap between myself and the world's best, and get a clearer understanding of my potential and weaknesses. I am now more confident than ever to fight for Olympic qualification.

tagline.zh: 两届奥运、2025 世界杯抱石冠军、中国首位抱石世界杯冠军
tagline.en: Two Olympics; 2025 World Cup bouldering champion; China's first bouldering World Cup winner

overview.zh: 8 岁攀岩、16 岁入队；东京与巴黎两届奥运；东京后低迷、亚运铜牌回归、2023 独自赴欧；2025 伯尔尼带伤夺冠、中国首枚世界杯抱石金牌。
overview.en: Started at 8, national team at 16; Tokyo and Paris Olympics; post-Tokyo slump, Asian Games comeback, 2023 Europe solo; 2025 Bern gold, China's first World Cup boulder title.

text.zh: 攀岩像是和自己对话。你不是在和别人对抗，而是在尝试理解自己。
text.en: Climbing was like talking to yourself. You are not fighting other people. You are trying to understand yourself.

tagline.zh: 四届世锦赛冠军、世界纪录 8.76 秒、速度大满贯、现任国家队速度主教练
tagline.en: Four World Championship titles; 8.76s world record; speed grand slam; current national speed head coach

overview.zh: 18 岁 2007 年世锦赛金牌 8.76 秒世界纪录；2007/2009/2011/2012 四连冠；速度大满贯第一人；现任中国攀岩队速度组主教练，带队巴黎双银。
overview.en: Aged 18, 2007 World Champs gold 8.76s WR; four consecutive world titles 2007–2012; first speed grand slam; now China national speed head coach, led Paris double silver.

text.zh: （攀岩入奥时）奖牌机会留给了下一代。
text.en: (When climbing entered Olympics) the medal opportunity arrived for the generation after him.

title.zh: 从 7 岁攀岩、8 岁参赛到站在奥运顶端
title.en: From climbing at 7 and competing at 8 to the top of the Olympic podium

summary.zh: 扬娅出身非攀岩家庭，舞蹈与攀岩二选一时选了攀岩；少年时期从倒数到全国第一，在教练与父母支持下快速成长为国际竞争者。
summary.en: Janja came from a non-climbing family, chose climbing over dance, and rose from last place to national champion as a youth before becoming a global dominator.

paragraphs.zh: 扬娅 7 岁开始攀岩，同时练舞蹈、田径和网球，但攀岩始终是「第一选择」。当必须在舞蹈和攀岩之间二选一时，她选了攀岩——「我内心深处知道我想攀岩，虽然从没认真想过要以攀岩为业，只是喜欢在墙上的感觉。」她认为舞蹈帮助了攀岩：「在墙上我总觉得像在跳舞，攀岩对我是一种自我表达，攀的时候我和自己连在一起，在自己的世界里。」
paragraphs.en: Janja started climbing at seven while also dancing, doing track and field, and playing tennis; climbing was always her first love. When she had to choose between dance and climbing, she chose climbing: "I knew somewhere deep inside that I wanted to climb but I never really consciously thought about it... I loved how I felt on the wall." She says dance helped her climbing: "I could use the moves you do in dancing on the wall... In climbing, I always felt like it was some sort of a form of self-expression. I really felt connected with myself when I climb."

paragraphs.zh: 她先从室内攀岩开始，父母不是攀岩者，教练发现了她的潜力和对比赛的热情。开始攀岩第二年她就参赛，最初成绩是倒数或并列最后，但她并不哭——「就是很兴奋能和其他孩子在一起，大家跑来跑去玩。」随后名次逐年上升：15 名、10 名、8 名、5 名，然后连续第一。9 岁赢得全国难度总冠军。13–14 岁第一次参加青年欧锦赛时，她甚至不知道那是欧锦赛，结果赢了人生第一场国际赛。
paragraphs.en: She started indoors; her parents are not climbers. Coaches saw her potential and passion for competition, and she was competing within a year. Initially she was second-to-last or sharing last place—"I was just psyched to be there"—then progressed through 15th, 10th, 8th, 5th to first. At nine she won the national overall title in lead. At 13–14 she went to her first youth international without knowing it was the European Youth Championship and won.

paragraphs.zh: 她形容 16 岁被推上世界舞台时「很可怕」，但从未在意聚光灯或名气，「只想攀岩、在墙上表达自己、展现潜力」。她一直把「享受」放在第一位：「如果我不享受，我就赢不了。就这么简单。」退役条件也很明确：「当我不再享受时，我就会结束职业生涯。」
paragraphs.en: She says being pushed into the big world at 16 was "scary," but she never cared about the spotlight or being famous—"I just wanted to climb and express myself on the wall." She has always put fun first: "If I am not having fun, then I will not win. It is as simple as that." She plans to end her career "when I stop having fun" and later become a coach for the next generation.

text.zh: 攀岩让我感到活着，让我能在那里表达自己的个性和独特性。
text.en: Climbing makes me feel alive. It makes me feel that I can express my personality and individuality there.

text.zh: 我总觉得攀岩是我的命运。
text.en: I just feel like it's my destiny, I guess.

context.en: On why climbing felt like her path

sources.label: adidas TERREX Janja Garnbret Unfiltered (Climbing's Greatest Competitor)

title.zh: 两届奥运金牌与世锦赛双金：从东京到巴黎再到首尔
title.en: Two Olympic golds and double World Championship gold: Tokyo, Paris, Seoul

summary.zh: 东京、巴黎两届奥运全能金牌；2025 首尔世锦赛难度与抱石双金，世锦赛金牌总数达 10 枚，世界杯金牌 47 枚。
summary.en: Olympic combined gold in Tokyo and Paris; double gold in Lead and Boulder at 2025 Seoul World Championships; 10 World Championship golds and 47 World Cup golds overall.

paragraphs.zh: 扬娅·甘布雷特是迄今唯一在同一届世锦赛上同时夺得难度与抱石金牌的运动员。2025 年 9 月首尔世锦赛，她在难度决赛中从半途滑脱中恢复，成为唯一登顶的决赛选手；次日抱石决赛中，她是唯一完成第 4 题的选手，从而拿下双金，世锦赛金牌总数达到 10 枚。整体履历包括 47 枚世界杯金牌、2 枚奥运金牌与 10 枚世锦赛金牌。
paragraphs.en: Janja Garnbret is the only climber ever to win both Lead and Boulder gold at a single World Championship. At Seoul 2025 she recovered from a mid-clip slip in the lead final to top as the sole finalist, and the next day was the only competitor to complete Boulder Problem 4, bringing her World Championship gold total to 10. Her résumé includes 47 IFSC World Cup golds, two Olympic golds, and 10 World Championship golds.

paragraphs.zh: 巴黎奥运决赛中，她在第四题抱石时手指被卡在起步支点下，一度担心骨折，赛后哭得很厉害；经队医确认无骨折和韧带问题后，她告诉自己「就算少一根手指也要去爬那条难度路线，因为奥运四年才一次」。最终她在难度路线发挥出色，下降时情绪释放，而第一个冲过来祝贺的是刚被她击败获得银牌的 Brooke Raboutou——两人曾私下希望一起站上领奖台，巴黎终于实现，她称那是奥运会上自己最珍视的时刻之一。
paragraphs.en: In the Paris Olympic final she caught her finger under a blocked starting hold on the fourth boulder and feared it was broken; after crying hard, physio confirmed no fracture or ligament damage. She told herself that even with one finger less she would still climb the lead route because the Olympics come every four years. She climbed strongly on lead; when she was lowered, the first to congratulate her was Brooke Raboutou, who had just taken silver. The two had long hoped to share the podium; Paris made it real, and Janja calls that moment one of her favorite from the Games.

text.zh: 在首尔拿到第 10 枚金牌、还是双金，感觉像不可能——但我做到了。
text.en: Winning my 10th [gold] with two in Seoul feels impossible—but here I am.

text.zh: 现在大家期待我赢，背负这种期待一年比一年沉重。
text.en: People expect me to win now, and carrying that expectation feels heavier every year.

context.en: On the weight of being expected to win

title.zh: 每周六练、95% 在岩壁上的训练逻辑
title.en: Six sessions per week, 95% on the wall

summary.zh: 几乎全部训练在 spraywall 上完成，不做指力板、不做额外体能；赛季期间每周 6 次、每次 4–5 小时，与教练 Roman Krajnik 合作强化弱项与伤病预防。
summary.en: Training is almost entirely on the spray wall—no fingerboard, no supplementary fitness. Six sessions per week, 4–5 hours each in season; coach Roman Krajnik focuses on weaknesses and injury prevention.

paragraphs.zh: 扬娅的训练哲学用她自己的话概括是：「我 95% 的训练都在墙上。我不做指力板，不做任何体能训练。」她每周训练六次，每次约四小时，全部用于 spraywall，没有额外的力量或耐力补充。这与许多精英运动员以指力板、campus 或健身房为辅的做法形成鲜明对比，是她本人明确表述的第一手数据。
paragraphs.en: Janja's training in her own words: "I do 95% of the training on the wall. I am not doing any finger boarding. I am not doing any fitness." She does six sessions per week, four hours each, dedicated solely to spray wall work with no supplementary conditioning—a clearly stated contrast to many elites who add fingerboard, campus, or gym work.

paragraphs.zh: 竞技季（约 11 月至次年 4 月）她保持每周六次、每次四到五小时的节奏，其中约 95% 时间在墙上；其余与理疗师合作做伤病预防。教练 Roman Krajnik 自 2019 年起与她合作，针对当时已有的肩、膝问题和弱点（如 sloper 与 slab，部分因鞋过紧）引入理疗与技术改进；他认为才能只占顶尖表现的「20 到 30%」，其余依赖训练、投入与心理。
paragraphs.en: During the competitive season (November–April) she trains six times weekly for four to five hours, with about 95% of that time on the wall, plus injury-prevention work with her physiotherapist. Coach Roman Krajnik, with her since 2019, introduced physio protocols for recurring shoulder and knee issues and addressed technical weaknesses such as slopers and slab—partly linked to overly stiff shoes. He believes talent is only "20 or 30 percent" of elite success; the rest is training, dedication, and mental fortitude.

text.zh: 我 95% 的训练都在墙上。我不做指力板，不做任何体能。
text.en: I do 95% of the training on the wall. I am not doing any finger boarding. I am not doing any fitness.

text.zh: 如果我不享受，我就赢不了。就这么简单。
text.en: If I am not having fun, then I will not win. It is as simple as that.

value.zh: 每周 6 次，每次 4–5 小时

title.zh: 巴黎零怀疑、手指伤后继续爬：压力与临场调节
title.en: Zero doubt in Paris and climbing on after a finger scare: pressure and in-competition reset

summary.zh: 东京奥运前三个月压力日增、巴黎则因已有金牌与成长而更从容；决赛手指卡住后靠「这是你的机会、这是你的日子」等自我对话与肾上腺素完成难度路线，并强调享受攀岩是动力的根源。
summary.en: Pressure built daily before Tokyo; Paris felt different because she already had one gold and had grown. After catching her finger in the final she used self-talk and adrenaline to climb the lead route, and stresses that loving climbing is the root of her motivation.

paragraphs.zh: 东京奥运前三个月她已感到压力一天天累积，「真的很艰难，像负担」。巴黎则不同：她已有一次奥运经历，过去三年里「对自己和训练都学了很多」；「第一次感到压力是在决赛。半决赛我不紧张，一切很顺，我从没像在巴黎那样相信自己——没有一刻怀疑。」她形容巴黎时的自己和东京时「心态上是不同的人」。
paragraphs.en: Before Tokyo she felt pressure building every day for three months—"really tough, like a burden." Before Paris she felt less pressure: she already had one Olympic experience and had "learned a lot about myself, and about training" in the three years since. "The first time that I felt pressure was in the finals. I wasn't stressed in semis—it all went smooth; never in my life have I believed in myself like I did in Paris. Not a single moment of doubt." She felt like "a different person" in Paris compared to Tokyo in terms of mentality.

paragraphs.zh: 她是完美主义者，但学会了在奥运中「不要做得太少也不要做得太多」；策略就是「像每次训练、像每场世界杯那样爬」「保持冷静，不要慌，不要沮丧，做好自己的事」——即便中途出现如手指受伤这样的意外，也不让它影响自己。手指卡住后她不知道自己是怎样调节的，但知道手指没有大碍后，她和教练去热身时告诉自己：「这是你的机会；这是你的日子。无论发生什么，都会没事。」比赛时的肾上腺素让注意力从手指转到接下来的路线；爬难度时她「可以说我享受了」，不想让压力夺走比赛的乐趣，并提醒自己「为什么要开始、为什么要做这件事——永远是因为热爱攀岩」。
paragraphs.en: She is a perfectionist but learned that for the Olympics "you don't do too little [and] you don't do too much." Her strategy: "Just do what you do in training, or like you do at every single World Cup... Just be calm. Don't panic. Don't be frustrated. Just do your thing"—and not let something like a finger scare affect her. After the finger got stuck she said she had "no idea" how she handled it, but once she knew it wasn't serious she told herself: "This is your chance; this is your day. Whatever happens, it will be OK." Adrenaline kept her mind off the finger and on the route; on the lead climb she "enjoyed it" and didn't want pressure to take the fun out of competing, and remembered "why I started, and why I was doing this—it's always because I love climbing."

paragraphs.zh: 她常强调「人们以为我从不失败，但 99% 的训练我都在失败」，并会在社交媒体上分享失败尝试，让其他人看到顶尖运动员也会不断失败并从挫折中学习。教练 Krajnik 说她的完美主义若过度「会毁了你」，但她每次训练都像「第一次训练」一样全力以赴。
paragraphs.en: She often says "people think I never fail, but 99 percent of the training, I fail" and shares unsuccessful attempts on social media so others see that even elite athletes constantly struggle and learn from setbacks. Coach Krajnik says "perfectionism could kill you if you are exaggerating it," but that she approaches every session with full intensity "like the first session."

text.zh: 我这辈子从未像在巴黎那样相信自己。没有一刻怀疑。
text.en: Never in my life have I believed in myself like I did in Paris. Not a single moment of doubt.

context.zh: 巴黎奥运半决赛到决赛的心态
context.en: Mindset from semis to finals in Paris

text.zh: 这是你的机会；这是你的日子。无论发生什么，都会没事。
text.en: This is your chance; this is your day. Whatever happens, it will be OK.

context.zh: 手指受伤后难度前的自我对话
context.en: Self-talk before the lead route after the finger incident

text.zh: 人们以为我从不失败，但 99% 的训练我都在失败。
text.en: People think I never fail, but 99 percent of the training, I fail.

text.zh: 每天都是新的战斗。我是完美主义者，所以我想做到最好。
text.en: Every day is another fight. I'm a perfectionist, so I want to be great.

context.zh: 谈攀岩风格与自我要求
context.en: On her climbing style and self-expectation

title.zh: 扬娅说过的话
title.en: Words from Janja

summary.zh: 从多年采访与纪录片中提炼的代表性观点：完美主义、享受与胜利、自我认同与榜样责任。
summary.en: Representative ideas from years of interviews and documentaries: perfectionism, fun and winning, self-acceptance, and being a role model.

text.zh: 我不想要完美的榜样，但我想做真实的榜样。
text.en: I don't want to be a perfect role model, but I want to be a real one.

context.zh: 谈如何做年轻攀岩者的榜样
context.en: On being a role model for young climbers

text.zh: 对自己好一点，在重要的时候更温和一点。
text.en: Try to be kind to yourself, even kinder, and softer when it matters.

text.zh: 我是第一个扬娅。每个人都是自己，有各自的挣扎、弱点和强项。
text.en: I'm the first Janja. So each person is their own person and has their own struggles, their own weaknesses, their own strong points.

context.zh: 引用 Simone Biles「我是第一个 Simone」后的回应
context.en: Responding to Simone Biles' "I'm the first Simone Biles"

text.zh: 成功对我而言是带来胜利的那次攀登过程，而不是胜利本身。
text.en: I like the feeling of climbing I do that earns the win, not the win itself.

text.zh: 五十多年后我不会记得赢的瞬间，但会记得罗马（教练）在观众席、家人朋友开心的脸，以及我们一起付出的努力和经历的挣扎。
text.en: In 50 years from now I won't remember the winning part. But what makes winning special is getting to share it with people you work with, with family, with friends... I will remember the happy faces of people and the work we put in, the struggles we went through.

context.zh: 谈什么会让胜利在记忆中留存
context.en: On what she will remember about winning

sources.label: adidas TERREX Janja Garnbret Unfiltered (multiple episodes)

title.zh: 从 6 岁攀岩到 17 岁才上 campus board
title.en: From climbing at six to no campus board until 17

summary.zh: 亚当 6 岁起每周攀岩四五次，7 岁就立志做职业攀岩者；17 岁前只靠攀岩训练，后与 Patxi 合作开始结构化训练。
summary.en: Ondra climbed 4–5 times a week from age six and wanted to be a pro by seven; trained only by climbing until 17, then structured training with Patxi.

paragraphs.zh: 亚当 6 岁开始攀岩，7 岁时「几乎就确定想当职业岩者」。17 岁前他「只是攀岩」：大量抱石、15–20 动的长抱石线路和循环训练；「直到 16 或 17 岁我才第一次用 campus board，之前唯一的训练就是攀岩。」他解释小时候不用 campus 的考虑：「就算 10 岁我也在想，那时用 campus 会立刻爬得更难，但也会带来可能伴随一生的伤病。」
paragraphs.en: Ondra started at six and "since I was seven, pretty much, I knew I wanted to be a professional rock climber." Until 17 it was "just climbing"—lots of bouldering, 15–20 move problems, circuits; "I hadn't done any campus board until I was 16 or 17. The only way I trained until I was 16 or 17 was just by climbing." He avoided campus as a child: "Even when I was 10 I was thinking... if I campused at that moment it would make me climb harder... but it would cause me injury that could be with my body for the rest of my life."

text.zh: 我唯一信任的教练就是 Patxi Usobiaga……去年春天我们开始合作，完全是另一回事。
text.en: The only coach that I could trust was Patxi Usobiaga... We started working last spring and – that was something totally different.

context.zh: 与 Patxi 合作后训练转变

title.zh: 世锦赛难度冠军与 9c Silence 首登
title.en: World Championship lead and first 9c Silence

summary.zh: 亚当在竞技与户外双线成就卓著，2017 年首登《Silence》9c 为人类首次。
summary.en: Ondra's competition and outdoor record; first human to climb 9c with Silence (2017).

paragraphs.zh: 2017 年亚当首登挪威 Flatanger 的《Silence》9c（5.15d），成为首位完成该等级的人类。路线结构：前 20 米约 8b 含重要 kneebar；第一难点约 V15 十动抱石；第二难点 V13 抱石段；第三难点 V10。他为该路线与物理治疗师 Klaus 合作，针对小腿悬挂、侧腹与肩稳定做专项训练，并在 5 月至 9 月间七次前往共约 60–70 天专攻此线。
paragraphs.en: In 2017 Ondra made the first ascent of Silence 9c (5.15d) in Flatanger. The route has a 20 m 8b section with a key kneebar, crux 1 ~V15, crux 2 V13, crux 3 V10. He worked with physio Klaus on calf hanging, side abs, and shoulder stability, and spent ~60–70 days on the route across seven trips from May to September.

title.zh: 每天 3–4 次分项训练、四周期块与可视化
title.en: 3–4 sessions per day, 4-week blocks and visualization

summary.zh: 与 Patxi 合作后采用四周一循环（耐力/力量/调整），每 session 45–60 分钟、每天 3–4 次；不做指力板，用 TRX 与 4 kg 背心；为 Silence 每天 15 分钟可视化加 40 分钟补充训练。
summary.en: With Patxi: 4-week blocks (endurance/power/taper), 3–4 sessions/day × 45–60 min; no fingerboard, TRX and 4 kg vest; for Silence, 15 min daily visualization + 40 min supplementary work.

paragraphs.zh: 与 Patxi 合作后亚当采用「四周块」：四周耐力、四周力量、四周不太狠练等状态出来。他「从没练得那么狠过」。每天尽量早起晨练，然后上学、再训练、午饭、上学、再训练、休息、再训练；每段 45 分钟到 1 小时，一个主题（力量=抱石+campus；力量耐力=抱石/campus；耐力=墙上循环），session 之间至少休息 1 小时。Campus 每周至少五次，「有些天两次 campus」。他从不觉得指力板高效，「手指是我的强项」；唯一健身房式训练是 TRX，「用自身体重更自然」；非赛季有时用 4 kg 背心。
paragraphs.en: With Patxi he used "four-week blocks" of endurance, then power, then a lighter period. He "never trained as hard." Daily: morning session, school, training, lunch, school, training, rest, training; each session 45 min–1 hr, one focus (power = bouldering + campus; power endurance = bouldering/campus; endurance = wall circuits), minimum 1 hr rest between. Campus at least five times per week, "some days two sessions." He has "never found fingerboarding very efficient"; "the only gym kind of exercises that I do are on the TRX"; uses 4 kg vest when not close to competition.

paragraphs.zh: 为 Silence 他每天做 15 分钟可视化，外加 40 分钟针对最难段落设计的补充训练，与物理治疗师 Klaus 强化正确动作的肌肉记忆。他描述三种可视化方式：纯在脑中过动作；边轻微动手脚边想象；请别人在关键点「造」支点，身体到位后朋友把 jug 放在墙上对应位置。「你想象得越多，现实中试 20 次就像试了 50 次，在脑中试 200 次效果一样。」
paragraphs.en: For Silence he did 15 minutes daily visualization plus 40 minutes of supplementary exercises for the hardest sections, with physio Klaus for automatic muscle memory. Three visualization methods: only in the head; slight hand/foot movement while picturing; having a friend create the jug where it would be on the wall. "The more you visualize... you can try it 20 times in real life then 200 times in your mind with the same result as if you'd tried the climb 50 times in real life."

text.zh: 我想探索极限就总得待在这条边界上：伤病很近，但同时我很小心。
text.en: If I want to search my limits I always need to be on this border when the injuries are close but at the same time I'm careful.

context.zh: 谈 campus 与伤病风险

title.zh: 亚当说过的话
title.en: Words from Adam

summary.zh: 动力、挑战与 9c 可能性的代表性引语。
summary.en: On motivation, challenge and the possibility of 9c.

text.zh: 我认为 9c 是可能的。也许不是现在……2013 年夏在 Flatanger 我在几条可能是 9c 的线路上做了所有动作，但当时觉得还不可能完成。
text.en: I think 9c is possible. Maybe not right now... I knew from summer 2013 when I was in Flatanger where I was working on several projects which could be 9c, I did all the moves in these projects but I just felt it wasn't possible at that moment.

title.zh: 从父母启蒙到巴塞罗那高绩效中心
title.en: From parents to Barcelona High Performance Center

summary.zh: 2003 年生，自幼随父母攀岩；2016 年攀岩入奥后 13 岁迁往巴塞罗那，在 David Macia 与 Chris Sharma 岩馆训练。
summary.en: B. 2003, climbed with parents from young age; at 13 (2016) moved to Barcelona to train under David Macia and at Chris Sharma's gym.

paragraphs.zh: 阿尔韦托自幼随父母攀岩，2016 年攀岩宣布入奥后 13 岁迁往巴塞罗那，在高绩效中心与 Chris Sharma 的岩馆之间训练。东京奥运他夺得首届攀岩全能金牌（速度第一、抱石最后、难度第四，综合得分夺冠）。
paragraphs.en: Alberto climbed with his parents from a young age; at 13 when climbing was announced for the Olympics he moved to Barcelona to train at the High Performance Center and Chris Sharma's gym. In Tokyo he won the first Olympic combined gold (first in speed, last in boulder, fourth in lead).

title.zh: 东京奥运首届攀岩金牌
title.en: First Olympic climbing gold (Tokyo)

summary.zh: 2021 东京奥运凭借速度第一与难度第四获全能金牌。
summary.en: Tokyo 2021 combined gold via speed win and fourth in lead.

paragraphs.zh: 东京奥运全能赛制下，他在速度项目夺冠、抱石最后一名、难度第四，综合排名第一获得史上首枚奥运攀岩金牌。他赛后庆祝克制，因不确定是否夺冠「不想出丑」；并呼吁西班牙从现在就为 2024、2028 建设攀岩基础设施，让这枚奖牌不是孤例。
paragraphs.en: In Tokyo he won speed, was last in boulder and fourth in lead, taking the first Olympic climbing gold. He celebrated cautiously, "not sure whether I had won"; and called for Spain to build climbing infrastructure now for 2024 and 2028 so the medal is not an isolated case.

text.zh: 我的奖牌若不想成为孤例，我们必须现在就开始为 2024 和 2028 努力。
text.en: If my medal is not to remain an isolated case, we have to start working now and think not only of 2024, but also of 2028.

title.zh: 青年世锦赛冠军与大学攀岩兼顾
title.en: Junior World Champion and university balance

summary.zh: 2006 年接触攀岩，2012 年青年世锦赛难度冠军；卢布尔雅那大学计算机与信息科学毕业，远程工作支持训练。
summary.en: Started 2006, Junior World Champion lead 2012; degree in computer and information science, University of Ljubljana; remote work supports climbing.

paragraphs.zh: 安泽 2006 年以孩童身份开始攀岩，最初没有职业设想；2012 年夺得青年世锦赛难度冠军。他在卢布尔雅那大学完成计算机与信息科学学位，「多数事情可以远程完成，这对我帮助最大」。他将持久力视为弱点，作为巴黎资格赛前的重点提升方向，并从以往多独自训练转为尽可能与队友合练。
paragraphs.en: Anže started in 2006 as a child with no initial professional aspirations; won Junior World Champion lead in 2012. He completed a degree at the Faculty of Computer and Information Science, University of Ljubljana; "most things can be done remotely, which helped me the most." He identifies endurance as his main weakness to improve before Paris qualifiers and shifted from training alone to training collaboratively with other athletes.

title.zh: 巴黎格式与斯洛文尼亚队
title.en: Paris format and Slovenian team

summary.zh: 速度取消对他是「小胜利」；国家队像家人。目标：奥运资格、世界杯抱石单站冠军、户外 9a、8c 抱石。
summary.en: Speed removal "a small win"; national team "like a family." Goals: Olympic qualification, World Cup boulder win, 9a outdoor, 8c boulder.

paragraphs.zh: 巴黎奥运取消速度项目对他「绝对是小胜利」，抱石是强项，持久力是明确弱点并将是资格赛前的主攻方向。他形容国家队「像家人，因为我们一起经历了太多」。未来目标：奥运资格、赢一场世界杯抱石、红点 9a、完成 8c 抱石（Bügeleisen, Maltatal）。给初学者的建议：「学会用打开的髋爬」；警惕膝盖内旋形成难改的习惯。
paragraphs.en: Paris format without speed was "definitely a small win"; bouldering is his strength, endurance his main focus until qualifiers. "Being a member of the national team feels like a family because we have been through so much together." Goals: Olympic qualification, World Cup boulder win, 9a redpoint, 8c boulder (Bügeleisen, Maltatal). Advice: "Learn to climb with your hips open"; warns against inward knee rotation.

title.zh: 攀岩世家的大学与奥运之路
title.en: From climbing family to college and Olympics

summary.zh: 出身世界级攀岩家庭，父母创办 ABC Climbing；大学修读营销与心理，与奥运训练并行；巴黎奥运银牌。
summary.en: World-class climbing family, parents founded ABC; studied marketing and psychology while training for Olympics; Paris silver.

paragraphs.zh: 布鲁克在顶尖攀岩家庭中成长，父母创办 ABC Climbing。她将大学学业（营销与心理学）与奥运备战结合，用「压力当燃料」的心态应对比赛；父亲哲学是「只有你和岩壁」。她每日冥想做心理准备，与教练 Chris Danielson 训练，从单臂悬挂过渡到加重双臂悬挂，并发展跳跃与腿部力量；在竞技与户外抱石（如 Box Therapy）之间切换。
paragraphs.en: Brooke grew up in a family of world-class climbers; parents founded ABC. She balanced collegiate studies (marketing and psychology) with Olympic training, using "pressure as fuel" and her father's "it's just you and the wall"; daily meditation for mental preparation. She trains with coach Chris Danielson, transitioned from one-arm to weighted two-arm hangs, and works on jump and leg power; oscillates between competition and outdoor bouldering.

title.zh: 巴黎奥运银牌与扬娅的友谊
title.en: Paris Olympic silver and friendship with Janja

summary.zh: 2024 巴黎全能银牌；与 Janja Garnbret 同台与友情成为经典画面。
summary.en: Paris 2024 combined silver; iconic moment and friendship with Janja Garnbret.

paragraphs.zh: 布鲁克在巴黎奥运夺得全能银牌，仅次于 Janja Garnbret。决赛后 Janja 下降时第一个冲过来祝贺的正是布鲁克；两人曾私下希望一起站上领奖台，巴黎实现了这一愿望，Janja 称那是奥运会上最珍视的时刻之一。
paragraphs.en: Brooke took combined silver at Paris 2024 behind Janja. When Janja was lowered after the lead route, Brooke was the first to congratulate her; the two had hoped to share the podium, and Paris made it real—Janja called it one of her favorite Olympic moments.

title.zh: 数学思维与科罗拉多大学
title.en: Math mindset and University of Colorado

summary.zh: 2003 年生，用解题思维对待攀岩；科罗拉多大学计算机/工程背景，与竞技并行。
summary.en: B. 2003; applies problem-solving to climbing; University of Colorado Boulder (computer science/engineering) while competing.

paragraphs.zh: 科林将数学式的解题方法应用于攀岩：「我的目标是找到解法。」他在科罗拉多大学博尔德分校攻读计算机科学/工程的同时参赛，2023 年男子难度与抱石世界排名第七。他与教练 Chris Danielson 训练，重视老茧与指皮管理。巴黎奥运前心态是「自信而聪明地爬，而不是盯着名次」。
paragraphs.en: Colin applies a mathematical problem-solving approach: "My goal is to figure out the solution." He studies computer science/engineering at University of Colorado Boulder while competing; ranked 7th in world boulder and lead 2023. He trains with coach Chris Danielson and emphasizes calluses and finger skin; pre-Paris mindset was "climbing confidently and smartly rather than focusing on placement results."

title.zh: 巴黎奥运第四名
title.en: Paris Olympics 4th

summary.zh: 2024 巴黎全能第四，差一个点未上领奖台；Toby Roberts金、Sorato 银、Schubert 铜。
summary.en: Paris 2024 combined 4th, one hold from podium; Toby Roberts gold, Sorato silver, Schubert bronze.

paragraphs.zh: 巴黎奥运科林获全能第四名，与领奖台仅差一个支点；Toby Roberts 夺冠，Sorato Anraku 银牌，Jakob Schubert 铜牌。
paragraphs.en: At Paris he finished 4th in combined, missing the podium by one hold; Toby Roberts won gold, Sorato Anraku silver, Jakob Schubert bronze.

title.zh: 竞技者身份与户外 9c 野心
title.en: Competitor identity and 9c on rock

summary.zh: 至今更认同竞技攀岩者身份；东京后不用再练速度的解脱；户外与竞技训练互补，目标 9c。
summary.en: Self-identifies as competitor; relief after Tokyo at no more speed; outdoor and competition crossover; goal 9c.

paragraphs.zh: 雅各布说「至今我一直更像是竞技攀岩者而不是岩壁攀岩者，虽然现在有点转变」。他真心热爱比赛和备战过程、设定雄心目标并持续训练。东京奥运结束后他感到「难以置信的轻松……不用再爬速度了」。竞技模式下的全力备战会带来极好的体能，对岩石上有帮助；反过来户外攀登也教给人工墙上没有的效率课。若要成为世界最佳之一，「必须在岩石上证明自己」；他的具体野心是完成 9c，加入那一小群人。
paragraphs.en: Jakob says "until now I've always been more of a competitive climber than a rock climber, even if there's a bit of a shift happening now." He loves competition and the preparation process. After Tokyo he felt "an incredible lightness... I no longer have to climb speed." Full competition prep "brings enormous fitness" that helps on rock; outdoor climbing teaches efficiency unavailable on walls. "If you want to be one of the best climbers in the world, you have to prove yourself on the rock"; his specific ambition is 9c.

title.zh: 东京铜牌与巴黎资格更难
title.en: Tokyo bronze and harder Paris qualification

summary.zh: 东京奥运前速度目标 6.5 秒；巴黎资格比 2019 日本更难；慕尼黑欧锦赛新格式首秀。
summary.en: Tokyo: speed target 6.5 s; Paris qualification "even more difficult than 2019"; Munich Europeans new format debut.

paragraphs.zh: 东京奥运备战阶段他主攻多场世界杯抱石，跳过美洲站；难度在 Innsbruck、Villars、Chamonix 训练；速度「一直保持每周两次短 session」。个人最佳 6.82 秒，目标 6.5 秒。奖牌目标明确，分析 Tomoa 为最大热门、Adam Ondra 为主要对手；综合赛制与特定墙型（一个仰角、一个 slab、一大块垂直）让多人都有机会。巴黎资格他认为是「比 2019 在日本更难」；慕尼黑欧锦赛因新奥运格式首秀而成为重点。
paragraphs.en: Before Tokyo he focused on multiple boulder World Cups, skipping American events; lead training in Innsbruck, Villars, Chamonix; speed "two short sessions a week all the time." PB 6.82 s, target 6.5 s. He aimed for a medal (ideally gold), saw Tomoa as overwhelming favorite and Ondra as main contender; combined format and wall design meant many could medal. Paris qualification was "even more difficult than 2019 in Japan"; Munich Europeans were a highlight as the new Olympic format premiere.

title.zh: 雅各布说过的话
title.en: Words from Jakob

summary.zh: 竞技者身份与速度解脱、户外证明。
summary.en: On competitor identity, speed relief, proving on rock.

text.zh: 想成为世界最佳之一，必须在岩石上证明自己。
text.en: If you want to be one of the best climbers in the world, you have to prove yourself on the rock.

title.zh: 首位女子 9b/+ 与 8c+ onsight
title.en: First woman 9b/+ and 8c+ onsight

summary.zh: 意大利选手 2001 年生，2021 年 Erebor 9b/+，2024 年首位女子 onsight 8c+；20 岁时已有 10 条 9 级路线。
summary.en: Italian b. 2001; Erebor 9b/+ 2021, first woman onsight 8c+ 2024; 10+ routes at 9th grade by 20.

paragraphs.zh: 劳拉·罗戈拉（意大利，2001 年生）2021 年 10 月在意大利 Eremo di San Paolo 红点 Erebor，成为首位完成 9b/+ 的女子。此前女子最高为 9b（Angy Eiter、Julia Chanourdie）；劳拉 2020 年 7 月已红点 9b（Ali Hulk Extension Total Sit Start），并有多条 9a+（Pure Dreaming Plus, The Bow, Terapia d'Urto 等），9 级路线总数超过 10 条。2024 年她成为首位女子 onsight 8c+（Ultimate Sacrifice, Gorges du Loup），并与 Janja Garnbret 同场 onsight 8c。定线员 Stefano Ghisolfi 曾对她说 Bibliography（9c）「没那么难」，建议她 2022 年订假期。
paragraphs.en: Laura Rogora (Italy, b. 2001) redpointed Erebor at Eremo di San Paolo (Oct 2021), first woman to climb 9b/+. Previous women's record was 9b; she had climbed 9b in July 2020 and multiple 9a+ (Pure Dreaming Plus, The Bow, Terapia d'Urto), 10+ routes at 9th grade. In 2024 she became the first woman to onsight 8c+ (Ultimate Sacrifice) and onsighted 8c alongside Janja. Setter Stefano Ghisolfi told her Bibliography (9c) "isn't that much more difficult" and to book her 2022 vacation.

text.zh: 能完成意大利最难路线的第一次攀登是我的荣幸。
text.en: It was an honor to do the first iteration of the most difficult route in Italy.

title.zh: 两届奥运与世界杯
title.en: Two Olympics and World Cups

summary.zh: 东京与巴黎两届奥运参赛；国际难度与抱石赛场常客。
summary.en: Two-time Olympian (Tokyo, Paris); regular on World Cup lead and boulder.

paragraphs.zh: 劳拉代表意大利参加东京与巴黎两届奥运，并在世界杯难度与抱石赛场持续参赛。
paragraphs.en: Laura competed for Italy at Tokyo and Paris Olympics and regularly on the World Cup lead and boulder circuit.

title.zh: 从两届世界杯冠军到世界顶尖教练
title.en: From two-time World Cup winner to coaching the world's best

summary.zh: 巴斯克选手 1980 年生，2006–2007 世界杯难度总冠军、2009 世锦赛冠军；重伤后创立 ATR/PUC 训练法，客户包括 Ondra、Sharma、Woods。
summary.en: Basque b. 1980, World Cup lead 2006 & 2007, World Champion 2009; after serious injury created ATR/PUC, coaching Ondra, Sharma, Daniel Woods.

paragraphs.zh: 帕齐生于西班牙巴斯克埃瓦尔，童年因攀岩纪录片启蒙。2006、2007 年世界杯难度总冠军，2008 欧锦赛冠军，2009 年 28 岁时世锦赛难度冠军。他自述起步时「个子小、没有指力、没有二头肌」；训练哲学是「只有当身体被彻底榨干，训练才真正开始」，「我的天赋是受虐狂，我的训练会彻底击垮你的身体和头脑」（电影 Progression 2009）。2011 年严重车祸、椎间盘突出，被迫近两年退役，2013 年回归后对攀岩之外的人生有了根本转变。他创立 ATR（积累–转化–实现）法：力量/力量日与耐力/量日交替；PUC 训练 2017 年约 550 欧元/3 个月。核心信念：「信任并相信自己，努力而有方法、有纪律，战斗到底，最重要的是非常享受过程。」
paragraphs.en: Patxi was born in Eibar, Basque Country, 1980, inspired by a climbing documentary. He won World Cup lead 2006 & 2007, European Champion 2008, World Champion 2009 at 28. He said he "was small, had no finger strength, biceps or anything when I first started"; philosophy "it is only when your body is totally broken down that the training can really begin," "my talent is being a masochist" (Progression 2009). A 2011 car accident (herniated disc) forced nearly two years off; return in 2013 changed his perspective on life beyond climbing. He created the ATR method (strength/power and volume/endurance on alternating days); PUC cost 550 Euros/3 months in 2017. Core belief: "Trust and believe in oneself. Work well and hard, be methodical, disciplined. Fight to the end to try to achieve it, and most important, enjoy the process a lot."

title.en: 2006–2009 peak and retirement

summary.zh: 2009 年 12 月肩部手术，后车祸重伤；2012–2013 复出后转型教练。
summary.en: Shoulder surgery Dec 2009, then car accident; return 2012–2013, shift to coaching.

paragraphs.zh: 帕齐在 2009 年 12 月肩部手术后又遇车祸导致椎间盘突出，从顶尖选手转为近两年退役；2012–2013 年带着新哲学复出，随后将重心放在 PUC 训练与筛选客户（投入度、目标清晰、可教性）上。客户包括 Adam Ondra、Daniel Woods、Chris Sharma；Sharma 形容训练是「找到真正逼自己的那个地方……变强意味着承受痛苦」。
paragraphs.en: After shoulder surgery in Dec 2009 and the herniated disc from the car accident he went from top competitor to nearly two years off; returned 2012–2013 with a new philosophy and built PUC (commitment, clear goals, coachability). Clients include Ondra, Daniel Woods, Chris Sharma; Sharma described finding "this place where you're really pushing yourself… To get stronger involves suffering."

title.zh: La Rambla 9a+ 首登与两届世锦赛冠军
title.en: La Rambla 9a+ FA and two World Championships

summary.zh: 1981 年生西班牙加泰罗尼亚，7 岁攀岩；2003 年首登 Siurana La Rambla 9a+，两届世锦赛、五届 Rock Master 冠军。
summary.en: Catalan b. 1981, climbing at 7; 2003 FA of La Rambla 9a+ at Siurana; two World Championships, five Rock Master wins.

paragraphs.zh: 拉蒙·胡利安·普伊格布兰克 1981 年 1 月 19 日生于西班牙莱里达；7 岁开始攀岩。2003 年在 Siurana 首登 La Rambla 9a+，是史上最早 9a+ 之一。两届世锦赛难度冠军（2007 Aviles、2011 Arco），两届欧锦赛冠军，五届 Rock Master 冠军，2010 世界杯难度总冠军。他偏好绳攀，因场地限制在抱石墙上训练；重视拉伸防伤与 onsight 心理预演。30 岁后仍感「身体像二十多岁」；2013 年目标「打破 9b 壁垒」。
paragraphs.en: Ramón Julián Puigblanqué (b. 19 Jan 1981, Lleida) started at 7. First free ascent of La Rambla 9a+ at Siurana in 2003—one of the first 9a+ in history. Two-time World Champion (2007 Aviles, 2011 Arco), twice European champion, five Rock Master victories, World Cup lead winner 2010. He prefers rope climbing, trains on boulder wall due to facility limits; focuses on stretching for injury prevention and on-sight mental rehearsal. At 30+ felt "physically like somebody in his 20s"; 2013 goal was to "break the 9b barrier."

title.zh: 世锦赛、欧锦赛与 Rock Master
title.en: Worlds, Europeans and Rock Master

summary.zh: 2007、2011 世锦赛冠军；2013 年夺得唯一缺少的 World Games 冠军。
summary.en: World Champion 2007, 2011; won missing World Games title in 2013.

paragraphs.zh: 他 2013 年夺得 World Games 冠军，是此前唯一缺少的头衔，「等了四年压力很大」。Rock Master 七次夺冠（采访时常说五届，另有来源称七胜），他形容该比赛「总觉得能发挥好，定线天才，观众氛围很好」。
paragraphs.en: He won the World Games in 2013, "the only title I was missing," after a four-year wait. He has five (or seven) Rock Master victories; "it's a competition I feel I can always perform well at, the setting is genius, the audience is very pleasant."

title.zh: 以系统与坚定弥补天赋
title.en: Compensating with system and determination

summary.zh: 法国选手 1982 年生，130 场世界杯 6 金 4 银 6 铜，2017 世界杯难度总冠军；自认无超级天赋，靠「机器人式」分析与十年如一日的坚定。
summary.en: French b. 1982, 130 World Cups 6G 4S 6B, 2017 World Cup lead winner; no "super-powers," trained "like a mechanical robot"; determination over years.

paragraphs.zh: 罗曼·德格朗热 1982 年 10 月 12 日生于法国 Sainte-Colombe。他自认「没有特别的天赋，没有 Adam、Sean 那种超级能力」，用「像机械机器人一样训练、像工程师一样分析」来弥补：系统、重复的技术 drill。他强调「坚定是任何高水平梦想的基石——不是一场或一周，而是一年、四年或十年如一日」。曾四天内完成九条 8A–8B 抱石。退役后担任法国协会教练。
paragraphs.en: Romain Desgranges (b. 12 Oct 1982, Sainte-Colombe, France). He says "I dont think I am particularly gifted for climbing, I dont have the super-powers that climbers such as Adam and Sean can have"; he compensates by training "like a mechanical robot or analyse things like an engineer"—systematic, repetitive technical drilling. "Determination is the cornerstone of any high-performance dream—not just over a run or a week, but consistently over a year, four years, or ten years if needed." Once completed nine 8A–8B problems in four days. Now coaches for the French federation.

title.zh: 130 场世界杯与五届法国冠军
title.en: 130 World Cups and five French titles

summary.zh: 6 金 4 银 6 铜，两届欧锦赛冠军。
summary.en: 6 gold, 4 silver, 6 bronze; twice European champion.

paragraphs.zh: 罗曼生涯共参加 130 场世界杯，获得 6 金 4 银 6 铜；五届法国冠军，两届欧锦赛冠军，2017 年世界杯难度总冠军。
paragraphs.en: Romain competed in 130 World Cups, winning 6 gold, 4 silver, 6 bronze; five times French champion, twice European champion, 2017 World Cup lead winner.

title.zh: 加拿大全能名将的竞技与户外
title.en: Canadian all-rounder in competition and outdoors

summary.zh: 加拿大选手，难度与抱石世界杯常客；每年 12 月整月不训练只攀岩。
summary.en: Canadian competitor on World Cup lead and boulder; one full month off training each December.

paragraphs.zh: 肖恩·麦科尔是加拿大攀岩名将，在难度与抱石世界杯上长期参赛。他每年 1–3 月集中训练，4–11 月赛季（抱石与难度阶段切换），12 月完全休息——「忘掉训练，和朋友去户外攀岩，没有压力」。训练量「完全随感觉」：「我不说每周必须练 10 小时，我完全随耳（随感觉）来。」
paragraphs.en: Sean McColl is a Canadian all-round competitor on the World Cup circuit. Annual structure: Jan–Mar intensive training, Apr–Nov season (bouldering then lead), December complete rest—"just forget about training and go climbing with friends outdoors, with no pressure." Volume is "extremely by ear": "I don't say I have to train 10 hours a week. I play it extremely by ear."

title.zh: 世界杯与年度节奏
title.en: World Cup and annual rhythm

summary.zh: 4–11 月世界杯赛季，抱石与难度阶段过渡。
summary.en: World Cup season Apr–Nov, boulder then lead transitions.

paragraphs.zh: 肖恩在 4 月至 11 月参加世界杯抱石与难度赛，在两项之间根据赛季阶段过渡训练重点。
paragraphs.en: Sean competes on the World Cup boulder and lead circuit from April to November, transitioning focus between disciplines through the season.

title.zh: 每周 10–15 小时、12 月全休与电路法
title.en: 10–15 hours/week, December off and circuit method

summary.zh: 4–5 天攀岩各 1.5–2.5 小时，指力与核心 2–3 次/周；难度季 25–60 动电路重复；每日 Theraband、每周两次骑车。
summary.en: 4–5 days climbing × 1.5–2.5 h, finger & core 2–3×/week; lead season 25–60 move circuits; daily Theraband, cycling 2×/week.

paragraphs.zh: 肖恩每周总训练量约 10–15 小时。攀岩 4–5 天/周、每次 1.5–2.5 小时，各难度抱石都练。体能 2–3 次/周：前水平、L 坐、卷腹、平板等核心。指力最多 3 次/周：死挂、交替臂协议，进阶到双手挂。交叉训练：每日 Theraband 下肢 20 分钟到 1 小时，每周骑车两次约 40 分钟/向。难度季电路法：「25 到 60 动做 x 次」；例如 30 动电路做 4 组、组间休息 6 分钟，set 间 20 分钟。饮食健康、多餐蛋白质碳水蔬菜，每晚 9 小时睡眠，训练期避免糖与酒精。
