paragraphs.en: Sean does 10–15 hours total per week. Climbing 4–5 days × 1.5–2.5 h, boulder problems at all levels. Conditioning 2–3×/week: front levers, L-sits, knee lifts, planks, ab circuits. Finger training up to 3×/week: dead hangs, alternating-arm protocol, progressing to two-handed. Cross-training: Theraband lower body 20 min–1 h daily, cycling twice weekly ~40 min each way. For lead season: "I'll do 25 to 60 moves and try them 'x' amount of times"; e.g. 30-move circuit 4 reps, 6 min rest, 20 min between sets. Eats healthy, multiple meals with protein/carbs/vegetables, 9 h sleep, avoids sugar and alcohol during training.

title.zh: 高中生与史上最快双总冠军
title.en: High schooler and historic double overall

summary.zh: 日本千叶 16 岁高中生，2023 年出道季即包揽抱石与难度世界杯总冠军，史上第一人。
summary.en: 16-year-old high schooler from Chiba; first climber to win both boulder and lead World Cup overall in a single debut season (2023).

paragraphs.zh: 安楽宙斗（Sorato Anraku）日本千叶县八千代市高中生，身高 1.68 m、臂展 1.82 m；日常安静低调，「一上墙世上没几个人更强」。饮食自嘲典型青少年：垃圾食品、拉面、炸鸡，不爱蔬菜。名字「宙斗」意为外太空与北斗七星（父亲爱好）。父亲安楽武在小学二年级带他去当地岩馆接触攀岩。日本教练安井博志认为日本国内大量比赛与优秀选手给了他很好的经验，训练与比赛平衡良好。
paragraphs.en: Sorato Anraku is a 16-year-old high school student in Yachiyo, Chiba; 1.68 m, 1.82 m wingspan; quiet daily persona, "as soon as he scales a wall, few in the world are better." Diet: junk food, ramen, fried chicken, avoids vegetables. Name = outer space + Big Dipper (father's interest). Father Takeshi introduced him to climbing in 2nd grade at a local gym. Coach Hiroshi Yasui: "He's got very good experience in Japan. We have a lot of competitions with a lot of good climbers, and a good balance of training and competition."

title.zh: 每场都赢、总冠军自然来
title.en: Win every event, overall takes care of itself

summary.zh: 不瞄准总冠军而瞄准每场胜利；偶像 Mejdi Schalck；希望借奥运让攀岩被更多人认识。
summary.en: Aims to win every event; idolizes Mejdi Schalck; wants Olympics to spread climbing.

paragraphs.zh: 安楽的竞赛哲学是「我不是瞄准世界杯总冠军，而是瞄准每场都赢。然后总冠军自然就来了」。他欣赏法国选手 Mejdi Schalck 在压力下的稳定发挥。奥运动机是「很多人通过电视看到你你就会出名；我想通过赢世界杯从家乡推广攀岩，但奥运是让运动被看见和认可最快的方式」。
paragraphs.en: His philosophy: "I'm not aiming for the overall World Cup Series, but I'm aiming to win every event. Then I guess the overall will take care of itself." He admires Mejdi Schalck (FRA) for performing consistently under pressure. "You become famous when lots of people see you on TV. I want to spread climbing from my hometown by winning World Cups but I think the Olympics is the fastest way to get your sport out there and recognised."

title.zh: 3 条 9b+、7 条 9b 与 Erebor 定线员
title.en: 3×9b+, 7×9b and setter of Erebor

summary.zh: 意大利选手 14 岁开始参赛；首攀/重复 Lapsus、Change、Bibliographie、Perfecto Mundo 等；Erebor 定线，劳拉·罗戈拉首登。
summary.en: Italian, started competing at 14; FAs/repeats of Lapsus, Change, Bibliographie, Perfecto Mundo; setter of Erebor (Laura Rogora's first 9b/+).

paragraphs.zh: 斯特凡诺·吉索尔菲是意大利难度与抱石选手，拥有 3 条 9b+、7 条 9b 及多场世界杯胜利，14 岁开始参赛。他首攀或重复了 Lapsus (9b)、Change、Bibliographie、Perfecto Mundo（均为 9b+）等路线；Erebor 由他定线，劳拉·罗戈拉完成女子首登 9b/+。他在 Lattice 采访中总结三大策略：发挥优势、识别长期可改变的弱点；通过渐进等级与多样经验构建表现金字塔；针对具体目标的战略性方法。
paragraphs.en: Stefano Ghisolfi is an Italian climber with 3 routes at 9b+, 7 at 9b and multiple IFSC World Cup victories; started competing at 14. First ascents/repeats include Lapsus (9b), Change, Bibliographie, Perfecto Mundo (9b+); he set Erebor, which Laura Rogora first-ascented at 9b/+. In a Lattice interview he outlined three strategies: playing to strengths and identifying long-term changeable weaknesses; building performance pyramids through progressive grades and diverse experience; and strategic performance methods for specific targets.

title.zh: 世界杯与户外双线
title.en: World Cup and outdoor double line

summary.zh: 多场世界杯冠军；户外 9b+ / 9b 成就与定线。
summary.en: Multiple World Cup wins; outdoor 9b+/9b and setting.

paragraphs.zh: 斯特凡诺在世界杯难度与抱石赛场多次夺冠，同时持续在户外完成与开发高难度路线；休息日会做指力板，单次尝试间隔 40–60 分钟，每天 2–3 次尝试路线，平衡抱石与难度训练。Lattice 播客中讨论过抱石与难度平衡、指力板与岩壁比例、恐高管理、季节目标设定等。
paragraphs.en: Stefano has multiple World Cup victories and continues to climb and set hard routes outdoors; he trains on hangboard on rest days, rests 40–60 min between attempts, attempts routes 2–3 times per day, and balances bouldering and sport climbing. Lattice podcast topics included boulder vs sport balance, fingerboard vs wall time, fear of heights, seasonal goals.

title.zh: 三大策略：优势、金字塔、方法
title.en: Three strategies: strengths, pyramid, methods

summary.zh: 发挥优势与可改变弱点；渐进等级与多样经验打基础；针对目标的战略性方法。
summary.en: Play to strengths and changeable weaknesses; solid foundations via progressive grades and experience; strategic methods for targets.

paragraphs.zh: 斯特凡诺在 Lattice 采访中归纳的三条：一、发挥优势——了解个人强项，识别长期可改变的弱点。二、构建表现金字塔——通过渐进等级与多样经验打牢基础。三、战略性表现方法——针对具体目标选择合适技术。训练细节上他休息日做指力板，尝试间休息 40–60 分钟，每天 2–3 次尝试路线，抱石与难度 session 平衡。
paragraphs.en: Stefano's three strategies from Lattice: 1) Playing to strengths—understand personal strengths, identify long-term changeable weaknesses. 2) Building performance pyramids—solid foundations through progressive grades and diverse experience. 3) Strategic performance methods—techniques suited to specific targets. In practice he uses hangboard on rest days, 40–60 min rest between attempts, 2–3 route attempts per day, balance of bouldering and sport climbing sessions.

title.zh: 9 次 ABS 冠军与心理教练突破
title.en: 9× ABS champion and mental coaching breakthrough

summary.zh: 美国抱石名将，与 Justen Sjong、Kris Peters 合作；从执着名次转向动作质量与过程。
summary.en: American boulderer; mental coaching with Justen Sjong and Kris Peters; shift from results to movement quality and process.

paragraphs.zh: 亚历克斯·普乔每周攀爬周一/二与周四/五/六，周三、周日休息，每次 2–3 小时，针对自感弱点、无固定计划。她与心理教练 Justen Sjong 每周两次合作，认为心理训练带来的竞赛提升远超任何额外力量训练；核心改变是从执着名次转向关注动作质量和过程。呼吸技术与「在疲劳状态下完成 V10–V12」建立疲劳时的心理抵抗力。有氧：跑步 4–5 天/周、每次 3–3.5 英里；核心 3–5 天/周、circuit 五组。体重通过户外攀岩与登山自然减重约 10–12 磅，无节食；体脂约 12%，零蛋白粉，仅基础维生素与鱼油、镁。
paragraphs.en: Alex Puccio climbs Mon/Tue and Thu/Fri/Sat, 2–3 h per session, targeting weaknesses. She works with mental coach Justen Sjong twice weekly and credits mental training for bigger competition gains than extra strength; key shift from results to movement quality and process. Breathing and climbing when fatigued (V10–V12) build mental resistance. Cardio: running 4–5×/week, 3–3.5 miles; core 3–5×/week, 5 sets. Weight dropped ~10–12 lb through outdoor climbing and hiking, no dieting; ~12% body fat; no protein powder, only basic vitamins, fish oil, magnesium.

text.zh: 呼吸和心态能帮助平衡一切。
text.en: Your breathing and your mind, it kind of helps balance everything out.

title.zh: ABS 与世界杯领奖台
title.en: ABS and World Cup podiums

summary.zh: 9 次 ABS 全国冠军，13 次世界杯领奖台；从 V12 进化到 V14。
summary.en: 9× ABS national champion, 13 World Cup podiums; progression from V12 to V14.

paragraphs.zh: 亚历克斯九次夺得 ABS 全国冠军，十三次站上世界杯领奖台，从 V12 快速进化到 V14。教练团队包括 Justen Sjong 与 Kris Peters（后者也是 Daniel Woods 的教练）。
paragraphs.en: Alex has nine ABS national titles and 13 World Cup podiums, and progressed from V12 to V14. Her team includes Justen Sjong and Kris Peters (Peters also coaches Daniel Woods).

title.zh: 疲劳中攀岩与核心/有氧
title.en: Climbing when fatigued and core/cardio

summary.zh: 跳绳、跳箱后在疲劳状态完成 V10–V12；跑步与核心 circuit。
summary.en: Rope skipping, box jumps, then V10–V12 when fatigued; running and core circuits.

paragraphs.zh: 她将「疲劳中训练」作为心理建设：跳绳、跳箱后在疲劳状态下完成 V10–V12，建立疲劳时的心理抵抗力。有氧为跑步 4–5 天/周、每次 3–3.5 英里（恢复跑约 6.5 mph，节奏跑约 8.5 mph）。核心 3–5 天/周，circuit（平板、V-ups、俯卧撑、跳箱）五组，组间休息 3–5 分钟。她自述「不多做 conditioning，主要就是爬、把身体推到极限」；随年龄增长开始更多拉伸与轻量力量平衡攀岩未用到的肌群以防肩伤。
paragraphs.en: She uses "training when fatigued" for mental build: rope skipping, box jumps, then V10–V12 when tired. Cardio: 4–5×/week running, 3–3.5 miles (recovery ~6.5 mph, tempo ~8.5 mph). Core 3–5×/week, 5 sets with 3–5 min rest. She says she "just climb(s) a lot and always push(es) body to the limit"; with age she added more stretching and light conditioning for muscles climbing doesn't use, to avoid shoulder injury.

title.zh: 从中央公园「岩上舞蹈」到 14 岁 V15
title.en: From "dancing on rock" in Central Park to V15 at 14

summary.zh: 2001 年生纽约，6 岁 Rat Rock 启蒙，父亲全职陪练；长期无结构化训练即达顶级。
summary.en: B. 2001 NYC; started at 6 at Rat Rock; father as full-time support; no structured plan until late, yet reached the top.

paragraphs.zh: 白石阿岛 2001 年生，纽约切尔西区日本移民家庭。6 岁在中央公园 Rat Rock 看到攀岩者，形容为「岩上舞蹈」当即被吸引；父亲（退役舞踏舞者）成为全职陪练，7 岁开始室内训练。8 岁 V10、9 岁 V11、10 岁 V13 Crown of Aragorn（当时最年轻）、11 岁 5.14c Southern Smoke；14 岁（2015）首位女性完成 V15（Sleepy Rave），亦为史上最年轻 V15。长期以来完全以攀爬为训练，无结构化计划；约 3–5 小时/天、5 天/周，强调优美动作，后期教练 Obe Carrion。学业全 A，兴趣包括时尚、日语、法语、日本建筑；目标 V16、5.15a/b、奥运，希望激励女性「最终主导这项运动」。
paragraphs.en: Ashima Shiraishi (b. 2001) grew up in Chelsea, NYC; at 6 she saw climbers at Rat Rock and was drawn to "dancing on rock"; her father (former Butoh dancer) became her full-time support, and she started indoors at 7. By 8 she did V10, 9 V11, 10 V13 (youngest then), 11 5.14c; at 14 (2015) she became the first woman and youngest ever to climb V15 (Sleepy Rave). She trained almost entirely by climbing with no structured plan—3–5 h/day, 5 days/week—and focused on beautiful movement; later coach Obe Carrion. Straight-A student; interests in fashion, Japanese, French, Japanese architecture; goals V16, 5.15a/b, Olympics, and inspiring women to "ultimately dominate the sport."

title.zh: 青少年世锦赛与奥运延期后转型
title.en: Youth Worlds and post-Olympic shift

summary.zh: 2017 青少年世锦赛抱石+先锋双金、综合银；奥运延期后 burnout，UCLA 与 AllRise。
summary.en: 2017 Youth Worlds boulder + lead gold, combined silver; post-Olympic burnout, UCLA and AllRise.

paragraphs.zh: 2017 年 IFSC 青少年世锦赛她获抱石金牌、先锋金牌与综合银牌。奥运备战因疫情受阻导致 burnout；重新评估后入读 UCLA，平衡学业、攀岩与社会影响力，并创立 AllRise 致力于攀岩多元性与可及性。她开始按「与未来目标和价值观一致」做决定，关注可持续发展与多元创意（缝纫、木工、农业），愿景是建立通过亲近自然创造意义的家园农场。
paragraphs.en: In 2017 she won Youth World Championship boulder and lead gold and combined silver. Olympic prep was disrupted by the pandemic and led to burnout; she reassessed, enrolled at UCLA, and balances school, climbing, and impact work. She founded AllRise for diversity and access in climbing. She now makes decisions based on what "aligns with my future goals and values," with interest in sustainability and creative pursuits (sewing, woodwork, farming), and a vision of a home farm that creates meaning through nature.

title.zh: 无结构化训练到顶级
title.en: No structured plan to the top

summary.zh: 长期完全以攀爬为训练，3–5 小时/天、5 天/周；近年才加入更结构化内容。
summary.en: Trained almost entirely by climbing, 3–5 h/day, 5 days/week; only recently added more structure.

paragraphs.zh: 阿岛长期以来完全以攀爬本身为训练手段，没有结构化训练计划；每天约 3–5 小时、每周 5 天，强调优美动作的开发，后期教练 Obe Carrion，现由父亲负责。近年才开始加入更结构化的训练内容。
paragraphs.en: Ashima trained almost entirely by climbing with no structured plan—about 3–5 hours per day, 5 days per week—emphasizing beautiful movement; later coach Obe Carrion, now father-led. She only recently added more structured training.

title.zh: 枫丹白露 8C 与首登记录
title.en: Fontainebleau 8C and FAs

summary.zh: 法国抱石选手 2011–2016，The Big Island、Trip Hop、Le Pied à Coulisse 等首登。
summary.en: French boulderer 2011–2016; FAs including The Big Island, Trip Hop, Le Pied à Coulisse.

paragraphs.zh: 纪尧姆·格莱龙-蒙代出身枫丹白露，法国男子抱石运动员，最高完成 8C。首登与代表路线：The Big Island（8C，2013）、Trip Hop（8C，2013，部分认为偏软）、La Toupie Carnivore（8A+，2014）及 Assis（8B+，2014）、Le Pied à Coulisse（8C，2016，首登，可能是 8C+，法国顶级难度之一）。参与纪录片 Out of Sight I（2013）、Out of Sight II（2014）。
paragraphs.en: Guillaume Glairon-Mondet is from Fontainebleau; French male boulderer, max 8C. FAs: The Big Island (8C, 2013), Trip Hop (8C, 2013), La Toupie Carnivore (8A+, 2014) and Assis (8B+, 2014), Le Pied à Coulisse (8C, 2016, FA, possibly 8C+, one of France's hardest). Featured in Out of Sight I (2013) and II (2014).

title.zh: 户外抱石为主
title.en: Outdoor bouldering focus

summary.zh: 活跃期 2011–2016，七条已记录高难度攀登，专注户外抱石。
summary.en: Active 2011–2016; seven recorded hard ascents, focus on outdoor bouldering.

paragraphs.zh: 格莱龙-蒙代活跃于 2011–2016 年，以户外抱石为主，七条已记录的高难度攀登。
paragraphs.en: Glairon-Mondet was active 2011–2016 with a focus on outdoor bouldering and seven recorded hard ascents.

title.zh: 只靠抱石与 campus 的力量型
title.en: Power on bouldering and campus only

summary.zh: 波动式训练量；零有氧，极少拉伸；擅长 athletic、compression、大动态。
summary.en: Alternating high/low volume; no running, little stretching; strong on athletic, compression, big moves.

paragraphs.zh: 扬·霍耶尔采用波动式训练量：高强度周 4–5 次、低强度周仅 2 次，完全根据身体感觉调整；单次很少超过两小时。他不做其他训练或跑步，只做一点拉伸；「抱石上的 campus 和 campus board 就是我提升身体力量的全部」。优势是「擅长 athletic 攀爬、compression 抱石和大动态」；弱项是「柔韧性不好，指力也是弱点，练很多但可能太胖了在 crimp 上很难超级强」。他从 Tyler Landman 得到的建议是：爬陡而直的 30–45 度墙、难把点之间做大动作。最佳表现温度接近 0°；10–15° 更舒适但非最强。
paragraphs.en: Jan Hojer alternates weeks with many sessions (4–5) and less intensive weeks (2), depending on feel; sessions rarely over two hours. He does no other training or running, just a little stretching; "campusing boulders and campus boarding is everything I do to improve my body power!" He is good at "athletic climbs, compression boulders and big moves"; weak on flexibility and finger strength. Tip from Tyler Landman: climb steep, straight 30–45° walls, big moves between bad holds. Best performance near 0°; 10–15° more comfortable but not peak.

sources.label: 8a.nu Jan Hojer The Big Power House

title.zh: 竞技抱石与力量风格
title.en: Competition bouldering and power style

summary.zh: 极简训练哲学保持长期高表现。
summary.en: Minimal training philosophy for long-term high performance.

paragraphs.zh: 霍耶尔以极简力量训练——仅抱石与 campus、无有氧无健身——保持长期高表现，对指力与柔韧性有清醒认识。
paragraphs.en: Hojer maintains long-term performance with minimal training—bouldering and campus only, no cardio or gym—and is clear about his weaknesses in fingers and flexibility.

title.zh: 落选东京奥运与莫斯科世锦赛夺冠
title.en: Tokyo miss and Moscow World Champs gold

summary.zh: 日本抱石选手，落选东京奥运后以巴黎 2024 为动力，2021 莫斯科四题全顶夺冠。
summary.en: Japanese boulderer; after missing Tokyo team, motivated by Paris 2024; 2021 Moscow World Champs with four tops.

paragraphs.zh: 藤井快（日本，28 岁）尽管实力超群未能入选 2020 东京奥运日本队（名额给了楢崎智亜与原田海）。落选成为他莫斯科夺金的动力。2021 年 9 月 19 日莫斯科世锦赛男子抱石决赛，他完成全部四题抱石以完美成绩夺冠，力压获银牌的队友 Tomoa Narasaki；铜牌 Manuel Cornu（法国），第四 Aleksey Rubtsov（俄罗斯）。他称自己并非因没进东京而动力十足，而是因要进巴黎 2024 而动力十足，从未停止相信自己；并提到新出生的孩子也是动力，希望「成为很酷的爸爸」。
paragraphs.en: Kokoro Fujii (Japan, 28) missed the Tokyo 2020 Olympic team (spots went to Tomoa Narasaki and Kai Harada). That became motivation for Moscow. On 19 Sept 2021 he won the Moscow World Championship men's boulder final with four tops, ahead of teammate Tomoa Narasaki (silver), Manuel Cornu (FRA, bronze), Aleksey Rubtsov (RUS, 4th). He said he is motivated not by missing Tokyo but by making Paris 2024 and has never stopped believing in himself; he was also motivated by his new child, hoping to be "a cool Dad."

title.zh: 2021 莫斯科世锦赛抱石金牌
title.en: 2021 Moscow World Champs boulder gold

summary.zh: 决赛四题全顶，力压 Tomoa Narasaki 等。
summary.en: Four tops in final; ahead of Tomoa Narasaki and others.

paragraphs.zh: 2021 莫斯科世锦赛男子抱石决赛，藤井以四顶完美夺冠，银牌 Tomoa Narasaki，铜牌 Manuel Cornu，第四 Aleksey Rubtsov。
paragraphs.en: At the 2021 Moscow World Championship men's boulder final, Fujii won with four tops; Narasaki silver, Cornu bronze, Rubtsov 4th.

title.zh: 18 岁世界杯冠军与「协调流」
title.en: 18-year-old World Cup winner and coordination flow

summary.zh: 5 岁爬树，16 岁 9a；擅长协调性「coordination flow」与动态。
summary.en: Started at 5 (trees), 9a at 16; specializes in "coordination flow" and dynamic moves.

paragraphs.zh: 梅吉迪·沙尔克 18 岁时第二次夺得世界杯抱石冠军（八王子）并获法国冠军；16 岁完成 9a。5 岁开始爬树，后加入当地攀岩俱乐部。他擅长协调性问题，称之为「coordination flow」——各把点之间的连贯感；特别享受动态动作，持续加强 pinch grip。教练 Victor Larzul 每训必陪，训练搭档 Paul Jenft 合作六年、每周 3–4 次。核心理念是「最重要的是始终保持你心中的热情与火焰」。2023 年目标包括伯尔尼世锦赛与巴黎 2024 奥运资格。
paragraphs.en: Mejdi Schalck won his second World Cup boulder event (Hachioji) and French title at 18; he climbed 9a at 16. He started at 5 (climbing trees), then joined a local club. He excels at coordination problems—"coordination flow," the link between holds—and loves dynamic moves, working on pinch grip. Coach Victor Larzul is at every session; partner Paul Jenft, 6 years together, 3–4×/week. Core belief: "The most important is to always keep the passion and the fire you have in you." 2023 goals included Bern World Champs and Paris 2024 qualification.

title.zh: 八王子世界杯与法国冠军
title.en: Hachioji World Cup and French champion

summary.zh: 2023 年八王子站夺冠、法国冠军；为综合赛制增量备战。
summary.en: 2023 Hachioji winner, French champion; training for combined format.

paragraphs.zh: 沙尔克在 2023 年八王子世界杯抱石站夺冠并获法国冠军；训练体系为综合赛制做了增量（体能、抱石、先锋、有氧、拉伸、板岩等），每周 20–25 小时，周四和周日休息。
paragraphs.en: Schalck won the 2023 Hachioji World Cup boulder event and French title; his training (general and specific conditioning, bouldering, lead, cardio, stretching, slab) totals 20–25 h/week, with rest on Thursday and Sunday.

title.zh: 20–25 小时/周与固定搭档
title.en: 20–25 h/week and fixed partner

summary.zh: 抱石 3、先锋 2、体能 4+、有氧 1、拉伸 2、板岩 1；教练全程陪练。
summary.en: Bouldering 3×, lead 2×, conditioning 4+, cardio 1×, stretching 2×, slab 1×; coach at every session.

paragraphs.zh: 沙尔克每周训练 20–25 小时：体能准备（一般）2 次/周、体能准备（专项）2 次/周、抱石 3 次/周、先锋 2 次/周、有氧 1 次/周、拉伸 2 次/周、板岩 1 次/周；周四和周日休息。教练 Victor Larzul 每训必陪，搭档 Paul Jenft 六年合作、每周 3–4 次。他在视频中描述过在 Red Rocks 一个半月专攻一条线（零 slab、零协调）后回到法国参加队内模拟赛，重新找回「五分钟内找 beta、适应节奏」的竞赛感。
paragraphs.en: Schalck trains 20–25 h/week: general conditioning 2×, specific 2×, bouldering 3×, lead 2×, cardio 1×, stretching 2×, slab 1×; rest Thursday and Sunday. Coach Victor Larzul is at every session; partner Paul Jenft, 6 years, 3–4×/week. In a video he described returning from 1.5 months in Red Rocks (zero slab, zero coordination) to a French team simulation and relearning the "find beta in 5 minutes" comp flow.

title.zh: 东京奥运银牌与 V16 首登
title.en: Tokyo Olympic silver and V16 FA

summary.zh: 美国全能选手，2016 全国杯失利后转为 underdog 心态；首登 The Grand Illusion V16。
summary.en: American all-rounder; after 2016 nationals loss shifted to underdog mindset; FA The Grand Illusion V16.

paragraphs.zh: 纳撒尼尔·科尔曼在盐湖城 Momentum Mill Creek 每周训练 4–5 天、每次 2–3.5 小时，循环为 2–3 天连续训练后 1–2 天休息。2016 年全国杯失利后他转变思维，「不是要赢下所有……几乎是从 underdog 视角」。东京奥运备战初期重点抱石与先锋，逐渐加强速度；他认为「速度进奥运对我有利……我在速度上更有优势」。资格赛备战与东京专项备战不同：资格赛季忙碌难以单点 peak；东京前有更多时间，从 12 月以力量与有氧为基础、攀岩为次，几个月基础建设带来巨大进步。他从未为户外目标做过专项训练，The Grand Illusion 就是「在 The Grand Illusion 上练」——该抱石独特在可在 roof 做大 link 获得全身疲劳且次日恢复。
paragraphs.en: Nathaniel Coleman trains 4–5 days/week, 2–3.5 h/session at Momentum Mill Creek, SLC; 2–3 days on, 1–2 rest. After 2016 nationals he shifted to "not looking to win them all... almost from an underdog perspective." Pre-Tokyo he focused on boulder and lead then added speed; "Speed climbing being in the Olympics will benefit me... I have a better advantage in speed." Qualifying prep differed from Tokyo-specific: qualifying season was too busy to peak for one event; for Tokyo he had more time and from December did base-building with weightlifting and cardio, climbing secondary—big gains. He never did specific training for outdoor goals; for The Grand Illusion he "trained by climbing on the Grand Illusion"—that boulder allows big links in the roof for full-body fatigue and recovery.

title.zh: 东京奥运银牌与美国攀岩意义
title.en: Tokyo Olympic silver and meaning for US climbing

summary.zh: 东京奥运全能银牌；桑拿房高温高湿适应；Kendama 与象棋。
summary.en: Tokyo Olympic combined silver; sauna for heat/humidity; Kendama and chess.

paragraphs.zh: 科尔曼在东京奥运夺得全能银牌，对美国攀岩意义重大。备战中在美国训练中心建设「攀岩桑拿房」进行高温高湿适应。他使用 Kendama（剑玉）作为专注力训练工具、国际象棋作为放松；区分「concentration」（过度思考 beta）与「focus」（当下动作意识），借鉴 Sean Bailey 经验。营养与 Gnarly Nutrition 合作：每 3 小时 25–30 g 蛋白质，训练前 2–3 小时蛋白质与复合碳水、前 20–30 分钟 BCAA 与简单碳水，训练后蛋白质与碳水，用 Google Keep 记录。
paragraphs.en: Coleman won combined silver at Tokyo, a major result for US climbing. He used a "climbing sauna" for heat and humidity adaptation. He uses Kendama for focus and chess for relaxation; distinguishes concentration (overthinking beta) from focus (present movement awareness), citing Sean Bailey. Nutrition with Gnarly: 25–30 g protein every 3 h, pre-workout 2–3 h protein and complex carbs, 20–30 min before BCAA and simple carbs, post protein and carbs; logs in Google Keep.

title.zh: 50% 疲劳度与抱石上 campus
title.en: 50% fatigue and campus on boulders

summary.zh: 先热身再爬难题至约 50% 疲劳；45° 墙 20–30 步线路；在抱石题上 campus 非 board。
summary.en: Warm up then hard boulders to ~50% fatigue; 45° wall 20–30 move circuits; campus on boulders not board.

paragraphs.zh: 科尔曼的训练课：先热身，然后在抱石区爬难题直到感觉约 50% 疲劳；在 45° 斜壁做 20–30 步线路，组间充分休息；爆发力练习为尝试高难抱石、尝试间大量恢复。技术开发强调 heel hook、toe hook、在抱石题上 campus（而非 campus board）以及动态动作，通过录像分析并实验不同动作模式。赛季高峰时他曾有一周达到 24 小时训练，多数周 18–22 小时，其中一半以上为离墙训练（有氧 circuit、力量等）；他需要休息日或双休日，无法连续六天训练。
paragraphs.en: Coleman's sessions: warm up, then hard boulders until ~50% fatigue; 45° wall 20–30 move circuits with full rest; power work on hard boulders with long rest between attempts. Technique: heel hook, toe hook, campus on boulder problems (not board), dynamic moves; video analysis and experimenting. At peak he hit 24 h in one week; most weeks 18–22 h, more than half off-wall (cardio circuits, weightlifting); he needs rest days or double rest days and can't train six days in a row.

title.zh: 攀岩 5 年后世界杯首胜与 V16/9a
title.en: First World Cup win 5 years in, V16 and 9a

summary.zh: 1987 年生哈萨克斯坦，现居阿姆斯特丹；2012 世界杯抱石总冠军，Action Directe 9a。
summary.en: B. 1987 Kazakhstan, based Amsterdam; 2012 World Cup boulder overall; Action Directe 9a.

paragraphs.zh: 鲁斯塔姆·格尔马诺夫 1987 年 6 月 12 日生于哈萨克斯坦 Tekeli，现居阿姆斯特丹；身高约 168 cm，体重约 50 kg。他攀岩仅五年后即于 2008 年莫斯科世界杯首胜；2012 年世界杯抱石总冠军，首位完成 Action Directe（9a，Frankenjura）的俄罗斯攀岩者，最高抱石 V16（8c+）。训练为隔天一次、每次约 2 小时：攀岩、campus、引体向上、block-off 与自设抱石题；特别强调在尽可能多种把型上做单臂引体——「能在任何把点上单臂拉上去有助于摆脱任何处境」。竞技哲学：「重要的是你推进了多少极限、犯了多少错误」；「赢家是真正想赢且自然、不担心的人」。Red Bull 赞助，参与推广（如墨西哥 Chihuahua Peñol）。
paragraphs.en: Rustam Gelmanov (b. 12 Jun 1987, Tekeli, Kazakhstan) lives in Amsterdam; ~168 cm, ~50 kg. He won his first World Cup in Moscow in 2008, five years after starting; 2012 World Cup boulder overall; first Russian climber to complete Action Directe (9a); V16 (8c+). He trains every other day, ~2 h: climbing, campus, pull-ups, block-off, own problems; emphasizes one-arm pull-ups on any hold—"Being able to pull yourself up with one arm on any hold helps get out of any situation." Philosophy: "All that matters is how much you push your limits and how many mistakes you make"; "He who wins is the one who truly wants to and yet at the same time is natural and doesn't worry." Red Bull sponsored; promotion e.g. Peñol Chihuahua.

title.zh: 2012 世界杯抱石总冠军
title.en: 2012 World Cup boulder overall

summary.zh: 2008 莫斯科首胜；V16、Action Directe 9a 跨越竞技与难度。
summary.en: 2008 Moscow first win; V16 and Action Directe 9a across boulder and sport.

paragraphs.zh: 格尔马诺夫 2008 年莫斯科世界杯首胜，2012 年世界杯抱石总冠军；户外成就包括 V16 与 Action Directe 9a，跨越竞技抱石与技术攀岩。
paragraphs.en: Gelmanov's first World Cup win was Moscow 2008; he won the 2012 World Cup boulder overall; outdoors he has V16 and Action Directe 9a.

title.zh: 三届世界杯/世锦赛冠军与谷仓岩馆
title.en: Three-time World Cup/World Champs and barn gym

summary.zh: 日本抱石与全能名将，与兄弟 Meichi 在东京郊外谷仓岩馆训练；70% spray wall。
summary.en: Japanese boulderer and all-rounder; trains with brother Meichi in barn gym outside Tokyo; 70% spray wall.

paragraphs.zh: 楢崎智亜是三届世界杯与世锦赛冠军，日本抱石与全能代表。他与兄弟 Meichi（世上最强攀岩兄弟之一）在东京郊外私人谷仓岩馆训练，馆内含 spray wall、比赛墙与速度墙。训练 70% spray wall、30% 比赛墙；每周 5 天、通常每天 8 小时（上午速度→午饭后抱石→傍晚先锋），速度墙每天 100 圈练稳定性，体脂约 2%。与日本国家队教练安井博志、一对一训练师 Chiba Tore（客户还有 Akiyo Noguchi）合作。EpicTV 48 小时跟拍中他热身、spray wall、然后比赛墙，强调「从髋部摆动」创造动量；与 The North Face、Unparallel 等合作。
paragraphs.en: Tomoa Narasaki is a three-time World Cup and World Champion. He trains with his brother Meichi (one of the strongest climbing brothers) in a private barn gym outside Tokyo with spray wall, comp wall, and speed. He does 70% spray wall, 30% comp wall; 5 days/week, often 8 h/day (speed in morning, boulder after lunch, lead in evening), 100 laps on speed wall for stability, ~2% body fat. He works with Japan team coach Hiroshi Yasui and personal trainer Tore Chiba (who also coaches Akiyo Noguchi). In EpicTV's 48 Hrs he warmed up, did spray wall, then comp wall; he emphasizes swinging from the hip for momentum. He partners with The North Face, Unparallel, etc.

title.zh: 世界杯与世锦赛三冠
title.en: World Cup and World Champs triple

summary.zh: 三届世界杯与世锦赛冠军；速度有「Narasaki 动作」命名。
summary.en: Three-time World Cup and World Champion; speed move named after him.

paragraphs.zh: 楢崎智亜在三届世界杯与世锦赛上夺冠；东京奥运周期综合赛制中速度项目有以他命名的「Narasaki」动作。他目标 2023 世锦赛冠军，并曾表示会尝试 Burden of Dreams。
paragraphs.en: Narasaki has won the World Cup and World Championships three times; in the Tokyo Olympic combined format a speed move was named after him. His goals included 2023 World Champs; he has mentioned trying Burden of Dreams.

title.zh: 放松、逆向规划与髋部动力
title.en: Be free, reverse planning and hip-driven dynamic

summary.zh: 心理放松；从终点反推脚步顺序；以髋发力的动态省手指力量。
summary.en: Mental relaxation; reverse foot order from goal; hip-driven dynamic saves finger strength.

paragraphs.zh: 楢崎与野口 Akiyo 教学系列中的四条 volume 攀登规则：一、心理状态「Be free and relax」；二、脚点放置专注脚步落点；三、逆向规划「从终点反推脚步顺序」；四、空间感知注意身体与岩壁距离。当动作难完成时，不是握更紧，而是可视化最终身体位置然后「把身体拉进那个状态」。核心观点是「以髋部为动力的动态 beta 对手指力量和爆发力需求更少」；这些协调原则同样适用于户外攀岩和所有动态动作。他几乎只练 spray wall，不做指力板（Emil 视频中「just spray wall」）；兄弟 Meichi 同样「only spray wall」。
paragraphs.en: Narasaki's four volume rules (with Akiyo Noguchi): 1) Mental state "Be free and relax"; 2) Focus on foot placement; 3) Reverse planning "Think about the footsteps order in reverse from the end goal"; 4) Spatial awareness of body-to-wall distance. When a move is hard, don't grip harder—visualize the final body position and "pull your body into that state." Core idea: "Dynamic beta generated from the hip requires less finger strength and power"; these coordination principles apply to outdoor climbing and all dynamic movement. He trains almost only on spray wall, no fingerboard ("just spray wall" in Emil's video); brother Meichi same—"only spray wall."

title.zh: 从三项兼修到巴黎速度金牌与 6:02 Academy
title.en: From three disciplines to Paris speed gold and 6:02 Academy

summary.zh: 早年先锋/速度/抱石三项，东京前 9 个月手指韧带伤；Bern 落选后罗马获资格；2026 退役、创立 6:02 Academy。
summary.en: Early lead/speed/boulder; pulley injury 9 months before Tokyo; Bern failure then Rome qualification; retiring 2026, founding 6:02 Academy.

paragraphs.zh: 米罗斯瓦夫早年参与先锋、速度、抱石三项，资格赛扩展项目训练导致手指滑轮韧带伤，东京奥运前 9 个月受伤。丈夫兼教练 Mateusz 每年学新东西、她随之成长；2023 年 12 月起接受运动心理学家 Daria Abramowicz 辅导，训练从「追求结果」转向「专注过程」。2023 年 Bern 世锦赛落选资格是她「人生最黑暗的四周」，首次经历赛前焦虑、意识到「我不是机器，我是人」；四周后在罗马重获资格，这段经历成为心理成长催化剂并转化为巴黎金牌。巴黎 2024 资格赛 6.06 秒新世界纪录、决赛 6.10 秒夺金；宣布 2026 年为最后赛季并创立 6:02 Academy 向青少年推广攀岩。
paragraphs.en: Mirosław did lead, speed and boulder early; expanding for qualification led to pulley ligament injury 9 months before Tokyo. Coach-husband Mateusz "every year learned something new" so she grew too; from Dec 2023 she worked with sport psychologist Daria Abramowicz, shifting from results to process. Bern 2023 Worlds qualification failure was "the darkest four weeks of my life"; first time she felt pre-race anxiety and "I'm not a machine. I'm human." Four weeks later she qualified in Rome—that experience became the catalyst for mental growth and Paris gold. Paris 2024: 6.06s WR in qualification, 6.10s gold in final; she has announced 2026 as her last season and founded 6:02 Academy for youth climbing.

text.zh: 我想被人们记住为从未停止战斗的人。
text.en: I want to be known as the one who never stopped fighting.

title.zh: 巴黎速度金牌与世锦赛纪录
title.en: Paris speed gold and World Champs records

summary.zh: 资格赛 6.06 秒 WR、决赛 6.10 秒；首尔世锦赛 6.03 秒；头衔驱动、纪录为副产品。
summary.en: Qualifier 6.06s WR, final 6.10s; Seoul Worlds 6.03s; titles drive, records are by-product.

paragraphs.zh: 米罗斯瓦夫在巴黎 2024 资格赛跑出 6.06 秒刷新世界纪录，决赛 6.10 秒夺金击败邓丽娟；两年前她宣言「我想以人生最佳状态站上赛场，跑出我有史以来最好的一攀」并兑现。她认为「对我来说从来不是关于纪录，最重要的是头衔」；首尔世锦赛 6.03 秒再破纪录。
paragraphs.en: Mirosław ran 6.06s in Paris 2024 qualification (new WR) and 6.10s in the final to beat Deng Lijuan; she had declared two years earlier "I want to show up in the best shape in my life. Do the best run I ever had" and delivered. "It has never really been about the records for me. What matters most are the titles." She also set 6.03s at Seoul Worlds.

title.zh: 跑步时什么都不想与 Bern 后的心理建设
title.en: Not thinking while running and mental work after Bern

summary.zh: 攀爬时完全自动化；最难的是站上出发台前一分钟里排除杂念；Bern 过度动机、只看见「门票」导致失误。
summary.en: Climb is fully automatic; hardest is the minute before start—clearing random thoughts; Bern overmotivation, only seeing "the ticket" led to fall.

paragraphs.zh: 米罗斯瓦夫说跑步时她什么都不想，是完全自动的操作；最难的是比赛时从出场、准备、攀爬到下墙约一分钟里，站在出发台时杂念会冒出来，她曾有几次因此掉墙。Bern 世锦赛半决赛她过度动机、眼里只有奥运门票而非「下一攀」，期望巨大（自己的、周围人的、甚至他国教练都认为她不可能拿不到票），站上墙前一切压垮她，第一次在第一动就掉墙；之后三周在罗马资格赛前她经历最黑暗时期，在罗马前一晚坐在床上绝望崩溃，看到墙上埃菲尔铁塔画突然被拉回当下，意识到「我只是想赢，不是想赢这张票」，之后每攀都当作第一场、专注当下。
paragraphs.en: Mirosław says she doesn't think about anything while running—it's fully automatic; the hardest part is the ~1 minute before the start when random thoughts appear; she has fallen from that. At Bern semi-final she was overmotivated, saw only "the ticket" not the next run; expectations were huge (hers, everyone's, even other nations' coaches thought she couldn't miss); approaching the wall everything crushed her and she fell on the first move for the first time. The next three weeks were the darkest; the night before Rome qualifying she broke down, then a picture of the Eiffel Tower on the wall snapped her back—"I just wanted to win, not win this ticket"; after that each run was the first competition, focused on the here and now.

title.zh: 个性化训练、卫冕压力与信念
title.en: Individual program, defending pressure and belief

summary.zh: 「量身定制的训练计划对每位职业运动员最重要」；卫冕比首次夺冠心理负担更大；相信成功。
summary.en: "Individual training program is most important"; defending harder than first win; believe in success.

paragraphs.zh: 米罗斯瓦夫认为「合适且个性化的训练计划对每位职业运动员都是最重要的」，强调 Mateusz 为她量身定制的体系是核心竞争力。赢得 2018、2019 两届世界冠军后「你知道你能做到、那是可能的，同时你感受到期望的重量」——卫冕比首次夺冠心理负担更大。对年轻运动员：「无论如何相信你的成功；有时会很难，但那会是你最宝贵的一课。」
paragraphs.en: Mirosław: "An appropriate and individual training program is the most important thing for every professional athlete"—Mateusz's tailored system is her core edge. After winning 2018 and 2019 Worlds: "You know that you can do it, that it is possible and you feel the weight of the expectations." To young athletes: "Believe in your success, no matter what. Sometimes it will be hard, but it will be the most valuable lesson for you."

text.zh: 无论如何相信你的成功。有时会很难，但那会是你最宝贵的一课。
text.en: Believe in your success, no matter what. Sometimes it will be hard, but it will be the most valuable lesson for you.

title.zh: 马维姆兄弟与跑酷背景
title.en: Mawem brothers and parkour background

summary.zh: Bassa 15 岁、Mickaël 半年后接触攀岩；跑酷与滑板（Williams Belle 方法）迁移至速度与抱石；两兄弟互为教练与商业伙伴。
summary.en: Bassa at 15, Mickaël 6 months later; parkour and skate (Williams Belle method) transferred to speed and boulder; brothers as coach and business partners.

paragraphs.zh: 巴萨与 Mickaël 是唯一同届奥运攀岩赛场的兄弟组合，均通过 IFSC 世界杯综合积分获得法国两个名额。Bassa 15 岁因学校活动首次攀岩，Mickaël 六个月后跟进。两人持续练习跑酷和滑板，Williams Belle 方法（平衡、敏捷、适应性）直接转化为抱石和速度的动态能力。力量训练包括 campus board 与木制指力板；两兄弟互为教练，也是商业合伙人、计划共建攀岩馆链。
paragraphs.en: Bassa and Mickaël are the only siblings in the same Olympic climbing event; both qualified via IFSC World Cup combined ranking. Bassa started at 15 via school, Mickaël six months later. They kept training parkour and skateboard; the Williams Belle method (balance, agility, adaptability) transferred directly to boulder and speed. Strength: campus board and wooden fingerboard; the brothers coach each other and are business partners planning a chain of climbing gyms.

title.zh: 11 次奥运速度奖牌与东京遗憾
title.en: 11 Olympic speed medals and Tokyo setback

summary.zh: 2018、2019 速度世界杯总冠军；东京资格赛 5.45 秒奥运纪录后肱二头肌腱断裂退赛。
summary.en: 2018, 2019 World Cup speed overall; Tokyo qualifier 5.45s Olympic record then biceps tendon rupture, withdrew.

paragraphs.zh: 巴萨拥有 11 次奥运速度攀登奖牌（最多），2018、2019 两届速度世界杯总冠军；以流畅「奔跑式」上升、精准脚点和流动手部动作著称。东京奥运资格赛他以 5.45 秒创奥运纪录，随即肱二头肌腱断裂退出决赛，需至少 6 个月康复。35 岁时作为阵中最年长选手参赛，也是少数有子女的运动员，在职业攀岩中平衡了父亲身份与训练。
paragraphs.en: Bassa has 11 Olympic speed medals (most); 2018 and 2019 World Cup speed overall champion; known for smooth, consistent style and controlled efficiency. At Tokyo he set 5.45s Olympic record in qualification then suffered biceps tendon rupture and withdrew from the final; at least 6 months recovery. At 35 he was the oldest in the team and one of the few with children, balancing fatherhood and training.

title.zh: 经济性风格、体重与康复
title.en: Efficient style, weight and recovery

summary.zh: 流畅一致、15 米路线受控效率；体重/功率比与赛前饮食；绿泥、天然补充与电刺激康复。
summary.en: Smooth consistent style, controlled efficiency on 15 m; weight-to-power, pre-competition diet; green clay, supplements, electrostim for recovery.

paragraphs.zh: 巴萨以「流畅一致、以受控效率跃上 15 米路线」著称。攀岩需要良好的体重功率比，不能过宽过重；赛前三个月饮食非常严格。他使用绿泥敷腕、天然补充（姜黄等）与电刺激/按摩设备加速康复，东京前伤后仅用右手引体、攀爬非常轻柔以尽快恢复。奥运资格认定后他将重心从速度扩展至先锋与抱石，为综合赛制做战略准备。
paragraphs.en: Bassa is "known for his smooth consistent style, loping up the 15-metre route with controlled efficiency." Climbing demands good weight-to-power; pre-competition diet is very strict for three months. He uses green clay on the wrist, natural supplements (e.g. turmeric) and electrostim/massage for recovery; after injury pre-Tokyo he did pull-ups only with the right arm and climbed very gently. After Olympic qualification he expanded training from speed to lead and boulder for the combined format.

title.zh: 从地区冠军到世界纪录 5.00 秒
title.en: From regional champion to 5.00s world record

summary.zh: 2009 年地区赛首胜；2018 入 Pelatnas；约 13 个月 5.25→5.00 秒、刷新 7 次。
summary.en: First regional win 2009; Pelatnas 2018; ~13 months 5.25→5.00s, seven records.

paragraphs.zh: 卡蒂宾在教练 DKW Yusnita 介绍下接触攀岩成就项目，2009 年首次参加地区锦标赛并获胜，从此坚持训练。他先练轻量级再转速度，2015 年前在地区赢过轻量级；2018 亚运会入选国家 Pelatnas，看到速度项目后专注速度至今。2020 年 6 月正式入 Pelatnas；训练中曾跑出 5.05，2021 年首场国际赛美国站 5.25 破纪录，首尔再破 5.12；目标触及 4 秒、巴黎与洛杉矶奥运金牌。
paragraphs.en: Katibin was introduced to competitive climbing by coach DKW Yusnita; first regional championship 2009, won, and kept training. He did lead/lightness first then switched to speed; before 2015 he won regional in lead; 2018 Asian Games drew him to national Pelatnas and he focused on speed. Joined Pelatnas June 2020; in training he hit 5.05; 2021 first international (USA) 5.25 WR, then Seoul 5.12; goal to touch 4s and Paris/LA Olympic gold.

title.en: World record 5.25→5.00s in 13 months

summary.zh: 约 13 个月内刷新 7 次；反映印尼团队系统训练的复利。
summary.en: Seven records in ~13 months; reflects Indonesian team system.

paragraphs.zh: 卡蒂宾在约 13 个月内将男子世界纪录从 5.25 秒提升至 5.00 秒（刷新 7 次）；2017 年 Alipour 的 5.48 秒是当时基准。速度攀登 2021–2024 年间纪录被打破约 10 次，进步远超同期田径百米。技术革命包括 Alipour Skip（跳过第 4 手点）与 Tomoa Skip（Narasaki 引入的动态跳跃）；理论极限预测男子约 4.50 秒仍有空间。
paragraphs.en: Katibin took the men's world record from 5.25s to 5.00s in ~13 months (seven times); 2017 Alipour 5.48s was the previous benchmark. Speed records were broken ~10 times in 2021–2024; progress far exceeds 100 m in the same period. Technical revolutions: Alipour Skip and Tomoa Skip (Narasaki); theoretical limit ~4.50s for men.

title.zh: 像家人一样训练、每天四练
title.en: Train like a family, four sessions per day

summary.zh: 「我们像家人一样训练，始终互相支持」；每天早、午、傍晚、夜四练，从不单独。
summary.en: "We train like a family. We always support each other"; four sessions daily, always together.

paragraphs.zh: 卡蒂宾与 Veddriq Leonardo 等印尼速度队每天 4 次训练（早、午、傍晚、夜），始终作为团队一起、从不单独。他说「我们像家人一样训练，始终互相支持。这是关键。」Leonardo 称「他让我更专注、练得更狠，因为我们既是对手也是兄弟。」这种家族式集体训练与西方个性化体系形成对比，是印尼速度快速进步的根本。
paragraphs.en: Katibin and the Indonesian speed team train four times per day (morning, noon, evening, night), always together as a team. He says: "We train like a family. We always support each other. That's the key." Leonardo: "He makes me be more focused and makes me train harder, because we are rivals and brothers at the same time." This family-style collective training contrasts with Western individual systems and is the base of Indonesia's rapid progress.

text.zh: 我们像家人一样训练，始终互相支持。这是关键。
text.en: We train like a family. We always support each other. That's the key.

title.zh: 从 Sispala 到巴黎金牌与年度运动员
title.en: From Sispala to Paris gold and Athlete of the Year

summary.zh: 高中自然爱好者组织接触攀岩；教练发现潜力；2018 入国家训练、巴黎 4.75 秒金牌；2024 IWGA 年度运动员。
summary.en: Climbing via high school nature club; coach spotted potential; 2018 national team; Paris 4.75s gold; 2024 IWGA Athlete of the Year.

paragraphs.zh: 莱昂纳多高中时加入自然爱好者组织接触攀岩，最初只是填满课余时间，未想过成为运动员。与教练交谈、看到东南亚运动会视频后立志代表国家。父母起初希望他专注学业，在代表本市参加区域赛后获得支持。教练是发现他潜力并带他首次参赛的人。2018 年起加入国家 Pelatnas；巴黎半决赛 4.78 秒个人最佳、决赛 4.75 秒夺金，为印尼首块非羽毛球项目奥运金牌；2024 年获国际世界运动会协会年度运动员。
paragraphs.en: Leonardo joined a nature lovers' club in high school and tried climbing; at first he was just filling free time, not thinking of being an athlete. A talk with his coach and seeing SEA Games videos motivated him to represent the country. Parents initially wanted him to focus on school; after representing his city at regional level they supported him. His coach spotted his potential and took him to his first competition. He joined national Pelatnas from 2018; Paris semi 4.78s PB, final 4.75s gold—Indonesia's first non-badminton Olympic gold; 2024 IWGA Athlete of the Year.

title.zh: 巴黎 4.75 秒金牌与「I believe I can!」
title.en: Paris 4.75s gold and "I believe I can!"

summary.zh: 半决赛 4.78 秒 PB、决赛 4.75 秒金，0.02 秒胜吴鹏；赛前宣言兑现。
summary.en: Semi 4.78s PB, final 4.75s gold, 0.02s ahead of Wu Peng; pre-race declaration delivered.

paragraphs.zh: 莱昂纳多赛前宣言「I believe I can!」在巴黎兑现：半决赛 4.78 秒个人最佳，决赛 4.75 秒夺金，仅以 0.02 秒险胜中国吴鹏，成为首届男子速度单项奥运金牌得主、印尼首块非羽毛球奥运金牌。
paragraphs.en: Leonardo's "I believe I can!" was delivered in Paris: semi 4.78s PB, final 4.75s gold, 0.02s ahead of Wu Peng; first men's Olympic speed gold, Indonesia's first non-badminton Olympic gold.

text.zh: 我相信我能！
text.en: I believe I can!

title.zh: 过程比结果重要与心理管理
title.en: Process over results and mental management

summary.zh: 「过程更重要，结果会随之而来」；目标清晰、知道要做什么；心理课与收手机保证休息。
summary.en: "Process is more important, results follow"; clear goals; psychology sessions and phone collection for rest.

paragraphs.zh: 莱昂纳多认为「过程更重要，结果会随之而来」——有目标、知道要到达哪里、知道该做什么，所以不会太有负担，而是享受并保持动力。印尼队每周训练 5 天，周三心理课、周日按摩恢复；早上约 8:00 到 11:00、午饭后再到傍晚、晚上再练；手机晚上被收走以保证休息。他认为运动员最难的是心理管理：训练与比赛中的起伏、输赢都会影响下一步，必须同时照顾身体与心理。
paragraphs.en: Leonardo: "The process is more important because for the results we will follow the process—we have a target, we want to get there and we know what we have to do," so he isn't too burdened, just motivated and enjoys it. The Indonesian team trains 5 days/week; Wednesday psychology, Sunday massage; morning ~8–11, after lunch until evening, then evening session; phones collected at night for rest. For him the hardest part for athletes is mental management—ups and downs in training and competition, winning and losing affect the next step; you have to train mentally as well as physically.

title.zh: Change 5.15c 与 Silence 9c
title.en: Change 5.15c and Silence 9c

summary.zh: 世界首个 5.15c、世界首个 9c；60–70 天七次 Flatanger；首登日第一把即 redpoint。
summary.en: World's first 5.15c and 9c; 60–70 days over seven Flatanger trips; redpoint on first real attempt of the day.

paragraphs.zh: 翁德拉 2012 年完成 Change（世界首个 5.15c），技术难点为前 12 米约 8B+ 抱石、20 米休息后 6 米抱石段再连续到顶；他投入三周夏训加两周秋训。Silence 45 米、约 60° 持续仰角，含三段抱石（V15/V13/V10）与多处膝把休息；2017 年首登日他未期待当天能 redpoint，反而放松、每动都极其精准；到顶后没有招牌尖叫，只有沉默与眼眶里的泪。
paragraphs.en: Ondra completed Change (world's first 5.15c) in 2012; technical crux ~8B+ in first 12 m, rest at 20 m, then 6 m bouldery section to chains; he put in three weeks summer and two weeks fall. Silence 45 m, 60° relentless; three boulder cruxes (V15/V13/V10) and strategic kneebars; on send day he didn't expect redpoint, stayed relaxed, extraordinary precision on every move; at the chains no trademark scream—silence and tears.

title.zh: 排除耐力、膝把与 Klaus Isele
title.en: No endurance; kneebar and Klaus Isele

summary.zh: 完全排除功率耐力、不超过 15 连动；campus + 陡壁抱石；膝把专项延长悬挂时间；核心与灵活性。
summary.en: Excluded power-endurance, never 15+ moves; campus and steep bouldering; kneebar-specific work to triple hang time; core and flexibility.

paragraphs.zh: 为 Silence 翁德拉在家完全排除功率耐力，只做纯力量：campus、陡壁 sloper/undercling/crack 抱石（完全避开 crimp）。膝把位约七处、倒挂时仅小腿承受数分钟，他与理疗师 Klaus Isele 做小腿间歇强化、侧腹与肩稳定、高脚趾塞与 drop-knee 所需的灵活性；「fitness」用多段抱石+短暂休息的间歇模拟路线需求。他相信排除传统耐力训练是到岩壁时感觉更有力的关键。
paragraphs.en: For Silence Ondra excluded power-endurance at home, only raw power: campus, steep sloper/undercling/crack bouldering (no crimps). ~7 kneebar positions, calves under load for minutes; with physio Klaus Isele he did calf intervals, side abs, shoulder stability, flexibility for high footjams and drop-knee; "fitness" via intervals of multiple boulder problems and brief rest to match the route. He believes excluding traditional endurance contributed to feeling more powerful at the crag.

title.zh: 9c 与首登日的沉默
title.en: 9c and the silence at the chains

summary.zh: 「我有勇气说这是世界首个 9c」；到顶时情绪卡住、只有泪。
summary.en: "I have the courage to say this is the world's first 9c"; at the chains emotions trapped, only tears.

paragraphs.zh: 翁德拉表示相较所有做过的 9b+，Silence 明显更难，他愿意称其为世界首个 9c。到顶时与预期相反，没有发出招牌尖叫，一片沉默——前所未有的体验，情绪快要淹没他时仿佛被卡住，只剩眼眶里的泪。他将此攀视为迄今最重要的攀登成就、最大努力与最深的坚持。
paragraphs.en: Ondra said Silence substantially exceeded any 9b+ he'd done; he has the courage to say it is the world's first 9c. At the chains, contrary to expectation, no trademark scream—silence prevailed; as emotions threatened to overwhelm him they became trapped, only tears. He described it as his most important climbing achievement, greatest effort and deepest perseverance.

text.zh: 我有勇气说这是世界首个 9c。
text.en: I have the courage to say that this is the world's first 9c.

title.zh: 从 9a 首攀到 Perfecto Mundo
title.en: From 9a onsight to Perfecto Mundo

summary.zh: 19 岁 Estado Critico 史上首次 9a 首攀；Perfecto Mundo 5.15c 首登与 Sharma、Ghisolfi 共攀。
summary.en: First 9a onsight at 19 (Estado Critico); Perfecto Mundo 5.15c FA with Sharma and Ghisolfi.

paragraphs.zh: 梅戈斯 2013 年 Siurana Estado Critico 可能创下史上首次 9a 首攀；2017 年 Gravere TCT 第二个 9a 首攀。2018 年 5 月他在 Racó de la Finestra 完成 Perfecto Mundo 5.15c 首登：25 米 45° 石灰岩、25 动 5.14c 到差休息后 10 动到 crux——单指洞到 pinch 的 dyno；完成后前臂 pump、顶板前 10 分钟爬 slab 让自己冷静。Sharma 开线九年未 redpoint，与 Megos、Ghisolfi 一起尝试后重燃兴趣。
paragraphs.en: Megos potentially made the first 9a onsight in history (Estado Critico, Siurana, 2013); second 9a onsight TCT Gravere 2017. May 2018 he did the FA of Perfecto Mundo 5.15c at Racó de la Finestra: 25 m 45° limestone, 25 moves 5.14c to poor rest, then 10 moves to crux dyno mono to pinch; after sticking it he was pumped, spent 10 minutes crawling up the final slab to calm down. Sharma had bolted it nine years earlier; sharing with Megos and Ghisolfi renewed his motivation.

title.zh: 9a 首攀与 5.15c
title.en: 9a onsight and 5.15c

summary.zh: 史上首次 9a 首攀；第二位 5.15c 首登者（Ondra 后）。
summary.en: World's first 9a onsight; second to author 5.15c after Ondra.

paragraphs.zh: 梅戈斯是继 Ondra 后第二位首登 5.15c 的攀岩者（La Dura Dura、Change、Vasil Vasil），世界第三位攀爬该级别；Perfecto Mundo 首登后他感谢 Chris 和 Stefano 鼓励他尝试以及岩壁上的美好时光，Chris 一直是他的重要灵感来源。他认为 Flatanger 不是自己的风格，下一步是回家烧烤、7 月参加四场难度世界杯。
paragraphs.en: Megos is the second person after Ondra to author 5.15c and the third in the world to climb the grade. After the FA he thanked Chris and Stefano for encouraging him to try the route; Chris has always been a big inspiration. He doesn't think Flatanger is his style; next was driving home, barbecues, and four lead World Cups in July.

title.zh: 两日一休与想象不 pump
title.en: Two days on one off and visualizing no pump

summary.zh: 首日看能到哪、次日 1–3 把 redpoint 再分段与 slab；失眠时脑中想象不 pump 完成。
summary.en: Day one see how far; day two 1–3 burns then sections and slab; when can't sleep visualize climbing without getting pumped.

paragraphs.zh: 梅戈斯在 Perfecto Mundo 上非常规律：两日一休。最后一周首日只给尝试看能到哪，次日 1–3 把 redpoint 后练分段、把 slab 练熟；他总是把首日当 redpoint 日、次日当分段日。他并未专门为这条线准备，之前三周在拉斯维加斯附近恢复手指伤、Virgin River Gorge Necessary Evil 5.14c 第二把完成，然后四天备战抱石世界杯（资格未过），之后直接开车到西班牙试线。
paragraphs.en: Megos was very consistent on Perfecto Mundo: two days on, one day off. In the last week day one was just tries to see how far; day two one to three burns then work sections and wire the slab; he always saw day one as redpoint day and day two as split day. He didn't specifically prepare—before Finestra he was in Vegas three weeks getting over a finger injury, did Necessary Evil 5.14c second try, then four days for a bouldering World Cup (failed to qualify), then drove straight to Spain.

title.zh: 赤脚 L'Alchimiste 与 No Kapote Only 9A
title.en: Barefoot L'Alchimiste and No Kapote Only 9A

summary.zh: Patrick Edlinger 启发；L'Alchimiste 原版左出口、La Révolutionnaire 8C+、No Kapote Only 世界第二枚 9A。
summary.en: Inspired by Patrick Edlinger; L'Alchimiste original left, La Révolutionnaire 8C+, No Kapote Only world's second 9A.

paragraphs.zh: 阿尔贝 18 岁、枫丹白露本地，受 Patrick Edlinger 影片启发三四年前开始赤脚攀岩。他重开 L'Alchimiste 原版左出口（19 年后），5/6 次完成；提议 8B+ 因不觉得比去年赤脚完成的 Gecko assis 更难。2016 年多次赤脚重复 8C；2017 年 La Révolutionnaire 森林首条 8C+；2019 年 No Kapote Only 世界第二枚 9A（Nalle Burden of Dreams 后）。他认为赤脚更自然、更本能，需要极强脚趾力与触感。
paragraphs.en: Albert, 18, Font local, inspired by Patrick Edlinger films started barefoot 3–4 years ago. He re-opened L'Alchimiste original left exit (19 years later) in 5/6 sessions; proposes 8B+ as not harder than Gecko assis (barefoot) from last year. 2016 repeated several 8C barefoot; 2017 La Révolutionnaire first Font 8C+; 2019 No Kapote Only world's second 9A after Nalle's Burden of Dreams. He finds barefoot more natural and instinctive; requires enormous toe power and sensitivity.

title.zh: 只做拉伸与户外森林攀
title.en: Only stretching and outdoor forest climbing

summary.zh: 偶尔去 Avon 俱乐部或 Karma 馆，不算真正室内训练；唯一正经训练是拉伸和野外森林攀。
summary.en: Sometimes Avon club or Karma gym; only real training is stretching and climbing outside in the forest.

paragraphs.zh: 阿尔贝偶尔去 Avon 俱乐部小馆、去过三四次枫丹 Karma 联邦馆，因此不能说自己真的在室内训练。唯一专门做的训练是拉伸，然后就是野外森林攀。他 paradox 地穿攀岩鞋参加巴黎附近室内抱石赛，目的是更出名、将来成为职业攀岩者；目前只爬过枫丹，还没去过视频里看到的其他世界级抱石地，相信以后会去。
paragraphs.en: Albert sometimes goes to his club gym in Avon and has been to the Font federation Karma gym 3–4 times, so he can't claim he really trains indoors. The only thing he specifically does as training is stretching, and climbing outside in the forest. He paradoxically does indoor boulder comps in shoes to get more known and become pro; so far only climbed in Font, wants to travel to world-class bouldering spots he's seen in videos.

title.zh: 5.15a/b 与 La Dura Dura 开放项目
title.en: 5.15a/b and La Dura Dura open project

summary.zh: Biographie 世界首个 5.15a、Jumbo Love 世界首个 5.15b；La Dura Dura 开线后邀 Ondra、与 Megos/Ghisolfi 共享 Perfecto Mundo。
summary.en: Biographie world's first 5.15a, Jumbo Love world's first 5.15b; bolted La Dura Dura then invited Ondra; shared Perfecto Mundo with Megos and Ghisolfi.

paragraphs.zh: 夏尔马 14 岁赢得成人美国抱石全国冠军、15 岁首攀当时北美最难运动攀 Necessary Evil 5.14c；Biographie/Realization 世界首个 5.15a（Céüse）、Jumbo Love 世界首个 5.15b、Es Pontàs 深水独攀 5.15a。2009 年他开线 La Dura Dura 后做了不寻常的事——邀请 Ondra 来挑战首登；Ondra 2013 年首登后一个月他完成第二攀。Perfecto Mundo 他称与 Stefano、Alex 同攀很棒，分享项目让好能量自然流动；但强调应尊重他人项目、征得开线者同意。
paragraphs.en: Sharma won adult US bouldering nationals at 14, first ascent of America's hardest sport climb Necessary Evil 5.14c at 15; Biographie/Realization world's first 5.15a (Céüse), Jumbo Love world's first 5.15b, Es Pontàs DWS 5.15a. In 2009 he bolted La Dura Dura and unusually invited Ondra to challenge for the FA; Ondra did it in 2013, Sharma repeated one month later. On Perfecto Mundo he said sharing with Stefano and Alex was great, letting good energy flow; but respect projects and ask the bolter's blessing.

title.zh: 要爬更难就先要更努力
title.en: Try harder than we ever have

summary.zh: 「要爬得比以往更难，就得试得比以往更狠」；在展会是工作、出门攀岩是乐趣。
summary.en: "To climb harder we have to try harder than we have ever tried"; at trade show it's work, out climbing it's fun.

paragraphs.zh: 夏尔马哲学：要爬得比以往更难，就得试得比以往更狠。他也会定期自问「当职业攀岩者是否有价值」。在展会是工作、出门攀岩是乐趣——把商业与真实分开。他延续自然动作、长期难点项目、将攀岩深度融入生活的风格；在 Catalonia 和 Mallorca 继续追求大项目，「尽可能骑好这股浪并与人分享」。
paragraphs.en: Sharma: to climb harder than we ever have we have to try harder than we have ever tried. He also questions periodically whether being a professional climber has value. When at a trade show it's for work, when out climbing it's for fun—authenticity vs commerce. His style: natural movement, long-term projects at home crags, climbing deeply integrated into lifestyle; continues in Catalonia and Mallorca, "ride this wave as far as I can and share it with other people."

text.zh: 要爬得比以往更难，就得试得比以往更狠。
text.en: To climb harder than we ever have, we have to try harder than we have ever tried.

title.zh: The Nose 首次全程自由攀登
title.en: First free ascent of The Nose

summary.zh: 1993 年 23 小时、Great Roof 小指优势；五个月身心准备；与 Simon Nadin。
summary.en: 1993 23 hours; Great Roof suited to small fingers; five months physical and mental prep; with Simon Nadin.

paragraphs.zh: 希尔 1975 年 14 岁与姐姐在加州花岗岩起步，体操背景帮助很大；Yosemite 与 John Long 的经历为她后来 Nose 自由攀奠定基础。1993 年 33 岁她与 Simon Nadin 完成 The Nose 首次全程自由攀登：Great Roof 段岩缝极薄、两侧光板，她的小指成为「秘密武器」；在岩壁下休息时看到对面岩壁上的心形影子，提醒她开放心态与信念的力量。许多人包括 Jim Bridwell 认为不可能——不仅女性不可能，任何人都不可能。她五个月专门训练（身体与心理），相信自己也练得很多。
paragraphs.en: Hill started at 14 in 1975 with her sister on California granite; gymnastics helped. Yosemite and John Long were fundamental for her Nose adventure. In 1993 at 33 she and Simon Nadin made the first free ascent of The Nose; the Great Roof crack pinches to a quarter inch, smooth sides—her small fingers were her "secret weapon." While resting she saw a heart-shaped shadow on the opposite wall, reminding her of open mind and spirit. Many including Jim Bridwell thought it impossible—for anyone. She trained five months physically and mentally; first and foremost she believed in herself.

title.zh: 耐心与放松、与岩壁合一
title.en: Patience and relaxed; at one with the rock

summary.zh: 座右铭「耐心与放松，始终」；分配每一动所需能量；追求完美攀登心态。
summary.en: Motto "be patient and relaxed, always"; dose energy for every move; search for perfect climbing state of mind.

paragraphs.zh: 希尔 33 段 23 小时中尽可能与岩壁和身体合一，分配能量、每动只用刚好需要的量。座右铭：耐心与放松，始终。不赶、不怒，她认为这些不属于攀登；寻找「轻盈」、完全流畅的攀爬、与墙合一，动作完全和谐、找对节奏、排除与攀登无关的念头——她视之为对完美攀登心态的追寻。她不用补剂，相信生理效果微不足道而心理效果可能巨大；她问自己「为什么不能更聪明地对待攀岩？如何更高效地聚焦能量？」答案是适应岩壁而非让岩壁适应我们。
paragraphs.en: Hill tried to be at one with the rock and her body for 33 pitches in 23 hours, dosing energy, just the right amount for every move. Motto: be patient and relaxed, always. No rush, no anger—she feels these don't belong in climbing. She looked for lightness, smooth fluid ascent, at one with the wall, moves in total harmony, right rhythm, excluding thoughts unrelated to the climb—the search for the perfect climbing state of mind. She doesn't use supplements; she asks why her approach can't be more intelligent, how to focus energy more efficiently—adapt ourselves to the rock, not the opposite.

text.zh: 再试一次，下次我会做得更好。
text.en: One more try. I'll do better next time.

title.zh: DNA 9c 与 Change 第三攀
title.en: DNA 9c and third ascent of Change

summary.zh: Verdon DNA 150 天 250 次、提议 9c；Flatanger Nordic Marathon + Change 第三攀（膝垫）。
summary.en: Verdon DNA 150 days 250 attempts, proposed 9c; Flatanger Nordic Marathon and Change 3rd ascent (kneepads).

paragraphs.zh: 布安 2022 年 4 月完成 DNA 首登（Verdon La Ramirole），投入逾 150 天 250 次尝试、提议 9c；他说从未试过与 DNA 相似难度与类型的路线，提议 9c 有被降级的风险但希望邀请世界顶尖来法国测试。同年在 Flatanger 先完成 Nordic Marathon 5.15b/c，随后用膝垫完成 Change 第三攀（Ondra、Ghisolfi 之后）；他原以为第一段太抱石、太怪、对肩不友好，在 Alex Rohr 的 beta 下第一段三处难点分别 flash，第八把送第一段，最后几天从地面连攀两段成功。他认为自己处于「好周期」——几乎不失误地执行。
paragraphs.en: Bouin completed the FA of DNA (Verdon La Ramirole) in April 2022, 150+ days 250 attempts, proposed 9c; he had never tried a similar route at similar difficulty. Same year in Flatanger he did Nordic Marathon 5.15b/c then third ascent of Change with kneepads (after Ondra, Ghisolfi); he thought the first pitch was too bouldery and bad for the shoulder but with Alex Rohr's beta flashed each of the three cruxes in isolation, sent first pitch on eighth try, linked both pitches from the ground in the final days. He said he was in a good cycle—executing without mistakes.

title.zh: 好周期与无压力执行
title.en: Good cycle and low-pressure execution

summary.zh: 「我们就是裁判」；邀请顶尖来测 DNA；行程末无压力、不失误即送。
summary.en: "We are the judges"; invited world's best to test DNA; end of trip no pressure, sent when no mistakes.

paragraphs.zh: 布安认为「我们的运动很美，不需要裁判，我们就是裁判」；在提议 9c 的处境下很难有把握，因此希望邀请世界最佳来法国测试 DNA。Flatanger 行程末他身体被岩洞榨干，但想玩到最后一刻；最后几天天气潮湿他只给自己少量尝试，休息日去岩壁给搭档保护时发现条件极好，热身时试了上段后决定不能错过——最终一切顺利、没有失误且没有太大压力，他相信压力大且疲劳时 end 段容易掉。
paragraphs.en: Bouin: "Our sport is beautiful, we don't need judges, we are the judges"; at the limit of what's feasible it's hard to be confident, so he wanted to invite the best to France to test DNA. At the end of the Flatanger trip his body was crushed by the cave but he wanted to play until the end; in the last days with few days left he had little pressure, "maybe I will do it maybe not but I will try"; when he sent he had no mistakes and not much pressure—he thinks you can fall easily at the end if stressed and tired.

title.zh: Erebor 开线首登与 Excalibur 9b+
title.en: Erebor FA and Excalibur 9b+

summary.zh: Perfecto Mundo/Change 5.15c；Erebor 自己开线首登；Excalibur 意大利最难、与 Ondra/Rogora/Bosi 共享。
summary.en: Perfecto Mundo and Change 5.15c; Erebor first self-bolted FA; Excalibur Italy's hardest, shared with Ondra, Rogora, Bosi.

paragraphs.zh: 吉索尔菲 2018 年 Perfecto Mundo 5.15c、2020 年 Change；2020 年疫情间在 Eremo di San Paolo 与 Seve Scassa 开线 Erebor 9b/+ 并首登，成为意大利最难。2021 年 2 月首次尝试 Excalibur 时觉得不可能；2022 年春邀请 Ondra 同攀找 beta，Ondra 找第一段、他找最后段、Bosi 帮他搞懂第一动。他明知请 Ondra 可能失去首登，但决定更看重共享项目的体验、合作与友谊；最终 2023 年 2 月完成 Excalibur 9b+，意大利最难。
paragraphs.en: Ghisolfi did Perfecto Mundo 5.15c in 2018 and Change in 2020; in spring 2020 during the pandemic he bolted Erebor 9b/+ with Seve Scassa at Eremo di San Paolo and made the FA, Italy's hardest. He first tried Excalibur in Feb 2021 and it seemed impossible; spring 2022 he invited Ondra to share the project—Ondra found beta for the first part, he for the last, Bosi helped him understand the first move. He knew inviting Ondra risked losing the FA but decided to focus on sharing, collaboration and friendship; he sent Excalibur 9b+ in Feb 2023, Italy's hardest.

title.zh: 为 Excalibur 加强力量
title.en: More power training for Excalibur

summary.zh: 18 动、中间有休息；自然耐力够用、缺纯力量；最后数月专注力量。
summary.en: 18 moves, rest in the middle; natural endurance enough, lacked pure power; last months focused on power.

paragraphs.zh: Excalibur 仅约 12 米 40 英尺、18 动，对路线来说很少、对抱石很多；中间有休息、用好休息对完成最后部分关键，但力量仍非常重要。吉索尔菲说过去几个月他改变训练、更专注力量训练，因为他知道自己的自然耐力够用，但在纯力量上有所欠缺。他接下来计划尝试 Silence，去年试过、五月和八月会再回去。
paragraphs.en: Excalibur is only ~12 m (40 ft), 18 moves—few for a route, many for a boulder; there's a rest in the middle and using it well is crucial for the last part, but strength is very important. Ghisolfi said in the last few months he changed training and focused much more on power because his natural endurance would be enough but he was lacking in pure power. Next he's projecting Silence; he tried it last year and will be back in May and August.

title.zh: Dawn Wall 7 年与自由首登
title.en: Dawn Wall 7 years and first free

summary.zh: 32 段至 9a、15 年 El Cap 经验；与 Kevin Jorgeson 2015 年 1 月完成；第 16 段绳环解法。
summary.en: 32 pitches to 9a; 15 years on El Cap; with Kevin Jorgeson Jan 2015; pitch 16 loop solution.

paragraphs.zh: 考德威尔在 El Cap 攀爬 15 年，Dawn Wall 是最后一块未自由攀登的墙面——岩石性质不同、无裂缝系统，看起来不可能自由攀。他与 Kevin Jorgeson 2015 年 1 月完成自由首登（近 1000 米、32 段）；第 14、15 段为横移、小刀缘与差脚点。第 16 段有著名双 dyno 或绳环下攀两种自由攀方式——Kevin 做 dyno、Tommy 做不出，与 Sharma、Siegrist 试了上千次无人能 dyno，他发明了绳环下攀的创造性解法；Ondra 重复时也做了绳环。他们只给最难且未曾 aid 攀过的段落打 bolt，保护仍很差（原 A3/A4）。
paragraphs.en: Caldwell spent 15 years on El Cap; the Dawn Wall was the last unfreed part—different rock, no crack system, looked impossible to free. He and Kevin Jorgeson freed it in Jan 2015 (nearly 1000 m, 32 pitches); pitches 14 and 15 are traverses on tiny razors and bad feet. Pitch 16 offers the famous double dyno or loop downclimb—Kevin did the dyno, Tommy couldn't; they brought Sharma and Siegrist, he tried thousands of times, nobody could do the dyno, so he found the unique loop solution; Ondra repeated with the loop. They only bolted the hardest sections that hadn't been aid climbed; protection is still really bad (originally A3/A4).

title.zh: 手指老茧与三周相似岩质
title.en: Callus thickness and 3-week similar rock

summary.zh: 不专门为某几段练；完整循环抱石一月+难度+去 Yosemite 试所有段；关键是指腹老茧厚度。
summary.en: No specific training for those pitches; full routine—boulder month, sport, then Yosemite trying all pitches; key was callus thickness.

paragraphs.zh: 考德威尔说自己不是特别强的攀岩者，需要一直用完整循环训练（抱石一个月、然后一些难度、再去 Yosemite 试所有段）。一个关键点是手指老茧的厚度——有时太厚就要等它变薄，把手指皮肤调到刚好非常微妙；他们在去 Yosemite 前约三周在相似锋利岩石上攀爬来适应。Kevin 说自己的训练更多是心理而非身体——习惯岩壁本身，习惯挂板与抱石但战斗更在心理；当心理通了身体就跟上。
paragraphs.en: Caldwell said he didn't specifically train for those pitches; he's not a very strong climber and needs to train all the time with a complete routine (bouldering for a month, then some sport, then Yosemite to try all pitches). One big thing was getting the right callus thickness on the fingers—sometimes too thick so they had to wait for it to thin; getting the skin just right was tricky. They did it by climbing on similar sharp rock about three weeks before Yosemite. Kevin said most of his training was on the wall getting used to the terrain—more mental than physical; when his mind got the knack his body followed.

title.zh: Burden of Dreams 第二攀与四枚 9A
title.en: Burden of Dreams 2nd ascent and four 9As

summary.zh: BOD 第二攀确认 9A；Alphane、Spots of Time 等；唯一重复两枚 9A 的攀岩者。
summary.en: BOD 2nd ascent confirmed 9A; Alphane, Spots of Time; only climber to repeat two 9As.

paragraphs.zh: 博西完成 Nalle 的 Burden of Dreams 9A 第二攀（Lappnor），确认 9A 定级；他还在谢菲尔德 Lattice 总部的复制墙上练了 10 天、岩壁上 14 天，共 24 天是他单条抱石投入最长的一次。他此前首登 Honey Badger 8C+、重复 Alphane 9A（12 次但未确认定级）；重复 BOD 后他表示从复制墙到最终送线整体体验比之前所有都高一级，明显高于任何 8C/+。他是目前唯一重复过两枚 9A 的攀岩者。
paragraphs.en: Bosi did the second ascent of Nalle's Burden of Dreams 9A (Lappnor), confirming the 9A grade; he spent 14 days on the boulder plus 10 days on the replica at Lattice HQ Sheffield (24 days total), the longest he's spent on a single boulder. He had previously done the FA of Honey Badger 8C+ and repeated Alphane 9A (12 sessions, didn't confirm grade); after BOD he said the overall experience from replica to send was a step up from everything else and a huge step up from any 8C/+. He is the only climber to have repeated two 9A boulders.

title.zh: 复制墙与耐心
title.en: Replica wall and patience

summary.zh: 最难的是耐心；每动都难需要好皮肤与休息，多休日短训；复制墙每练等同岩壁一课。
summary.en: Hardest thing is patience; each move so hard need good skin and rest, short sessions and rest days; replica session as good as one on the boulder.

paragraphs.zh: 博西认为投 4–5 动的 9A 最难的是保持耐心。因为每动都极难，需要好皮肤和充分休息，所以必须多休息日、短训——这很让人沮丧因为他只想一直爬。他从复制墙训练获益极大，感觉复制墙上的每一课都和真岩壁上的一课一样有效，相当于多出十次机会。与其他人一起攻关时协作非常有帮助，和 Alphane 经历类似，能学到大量微观 beta、彼此带来的心理激励也极强。
paragraphs.en: Bosi said the hardest thing about projecting a 4–5 move 9A is being patient. As each move is so hard you need good skin and to be rested, so you have to take a lot of rest days and have short sessions—which can be frustrating as he just wants to keep climbing. He benefited so much from replica training; every replica session was as good as a session on the actual boulder, so he got an extra ten sessions. Cooperating with others projecting was extremely useful; like his Alphane experience it helps learn micro beta and the psych you get off each other is incredible.

title.zh: The Nose 世界首登与 Dawn Wall 首登
title.en: The Nose world first and Dawn Wall FA

summary.zh: 1958 年 18 个月/45 岩壁日；Stovelegs 装备创新；1970 年 27 天、330 钉、拒绝救援。
summary.en: 1958 18 months, 45 wall days; Stovelegs innovation; 1970 27 days, 330 bolts, refused rescue.

paragraphs.zh: 哈丁 1957 年因对手 Royal Robbins 完成 Half Dome 西北壁而激起竞争：「除了 El Cap 没别的。」团队轮换搭档、数百枚手工岩钉与固定绳、分段推进；裂缝过大时 Bill Feuerer 用旧铸铁炉腿做成岩钉，诞生经典 Stovelegs 段。国家公园因人群要求停攀至次年 3 月；搭档 Mark Powell 腿骨折后哈丁招募合格者继续。登顶日严寒中他连夜 15 小时手钻 28 颗膨胀钉翻越悬壁，1958 年 11 月 12 日早 6 点登顶。他后来写道：「我完全不清楚谁是征服者、谁是被征服者。」1970 年与 Dean Caldwell 完成 Dawn Wall（Wall of Early Morning Light）首登，预计 12 天实际 27 天、330 颗膨胀钉、四天风暴、断粮，拒绝公园救援；壁上投下的纸条写「我们一定是能想到的最惨最臭的可怜虫。但我们活着，真正地活着。」
paragraphs.en: Harding's drive came in 1957 when rival Royal Robbins climbed Half Dome's NW face: "Nothing but El Cap would do." With rotating partners the team ascended over 18 months using hundreds of handmade pitons and fixed ropes; when cracks were too large Bill Feuerer built pitons from a stove leg—the "Stovelegs" pitch. NPS stopped them until March; after Mark Powell's leg fracture Harding continued with whoever he could recruit. Summit day he struggled 15 hours through the night placing 28 bolts up the headwall, topping out Nov 12, 1958, 6 AM. "It was not at all clear to me who was the conqueror and who was the conquered." 1970 with Dean Caldwell first ascent of Dawn Wall: 27 days (expected 12), 330 bolts, 4-day storm, low food, refused rescue; note in tin can: "We must be the most miserable, wet, cold stinking wretches imaginable. But we're alive, really alive, like people seldom are."

title.zh: 征服者与被征服者、真正活着
title.en: Conqueror and conquered; really alive

summary.zh: 首登后「谁征服谁」；Dawn Wall 壁上「最惨但真正活着」。
summary.en: After FA "who was conqueror who conquered"; on Dawn Wall "most miserable but really alive."

paragraphs.zh: 哈丁在 The Nose 登顶后反思：「我完全不清楚谁是征服者、谁是被征服者。」在 Dawn Wall 壁上投下的纸条中他写：「我们一定是能想到的最 miserable、最湿、最冷、最臭的可怜虫。但我们活着，真正地活着，像人们很少能做到的那样。」他的 siege 风格与大量膨胀钉与 Royal Robbins 的 clean climbing 形成伦理对立；Robbins 在 1971 年 Dawn Wall 第二次攀登时曾开始拆除膨胀钉，中途 reconsidered，承认该攀的投入与正当性。
paragraphs.en: Harding after the Nose: "It was not at all clear to me who was the conqueror and who was the conquered." On the Dawn Wall note: "We must be the most miserable, wet, cold stinking wretches imaginable. But we're alive, really alive, like people seldom are." His siege and bolt-heavy style opposed Robbins' clean climbing; Robbins on the 1971 second ascent began removing bolts but reconsidered, acknowledging the climb's commitment.

text.zh: 但我们活着，真正地活着，像人们很少能做到的那样。
text.en: But we're alive, really alive, like people seldom are.

title.zh: Salathé、Half Dome 与 El Cap 首次独攀
title.en: Salathé, Half Dome and first El Cap solo

summary.zh: 1957 Half Dome 西北壁、1961 Salathé Wall、1969 El Cap 首次单独攀登；Clean Climbing 与 Nutcracker。
summary.en: 1957 Half Dome NW face, 1961 Salathé Wall, 1969 first El Cap solo; Clean Climbing and Nutcracker.

paragraphs.zh: 罗宾斯 12 岁前是「无父的逃票少年、走向犯罪」；14 岁入童子军后转向户外。在童子军背包行中接触攀岩，「作为攀岩者我有点别的东西」。他倡导仅用可移除岩塞的「Clean Climbing」——1967 年 Nutcracker 成为美国首条 clean 攀登并引发安全争议。首登包括 Tahquitz Open Book 美国首条 5.9（1952）、Half Dome 西北壁美国首条 VI（1957）、Salathé Wall（1961）、North America Wall（1964）；1969 年成为 El Capitan 首次单独攀登者。他晚年创立 Royal Robbins 服装品牌、著有 Basic Rockcraft 与 Advanced Rockcraft；国家地理称其为「约塞米蒂攀岩之父」。
paragraphs.en: Robbins had a troubled youth; at 14 the Scouts "got me off the streets of Los Angeles" and he discovered climbing. He championed clean climbing (removable nuts only); Nutcracker (1967) was the first clean climb in the US. First ascents: Open Book first 5.9 US (1952), Half Dome NW face first Grade VI America (1957), Salathé Wall (1961), North America Wall (1964); 1969 first person to solo El Capitan. He co-founded Royal Robbins brand, wrote Basic Rockcraft and Advanced Rockcraft; National Geographic called him "Father of Yosemite Rock Climbing."

title.zh: 一颗膨胀钉如诗中的一个词
title.en: Single piton like a word in a poem

summary.zh: Clean Climbing 哲学：单钉决定影响整首「诗」；上行变奏原则。
summary.en: Clean philosophy: one piton affects whole composition; upward variations.

paragraphs.zh: 罗宾斯认为下钉一颗膨胀钉的决定「具有巨大重要性」——「就像诗里的一个词，能影响整首诗」。他强调使用对山体非破坏性的装备，推崇「上行变奏」：用比首登更严格的标准完成攀登。他倡导不留痕、尽量减少固定绳、不对成就大张旗鼓。他与哈丁在 Dawn Wall 上的伦理冲突——1970 年哈丁 330 钉首登后，Robbins 在 1971 年第二次攀登时开始拆除膨胀钉，中途 reconsidered，承认该攀的投入与正当性。
paragraphs.en: Robbins: the decision to place a single piton is "of enormous importance"—"like a single word in a poem, it can affect the entire composition." He favored non-destructive gear and "upward variations" (stricter than FA). He advocated leaving no trace, minimizing fixed ropes, avoiding fanfare. His opposition to Harding's Dawn Wall (330 bolts) led to the 1971 second-ascent bolt-removal attempt; he reconsidered partway, acknowledging the climb's commitment.

text.zh: 下钉一颗膨胀钉就像诗里的一个词，能影响整首诗。
text.en: The decision to place a single piton is like a single word in a poem, it can affect the entire composition.

title.zh: The Nose 单日首登（1975）
title.en: The Nose in a day (1975)

summary.zh: 与 Long、Westbay 17 小时 45 分；Frank Sacherer 十年构想；Stonemasters 领袖。
summary.en: With Long and Westbay 17h45m; Frank Sacherer's decade-old idea; Stonemasters leader.

paragraphs.zh: 布里德韦尔「The Bird」1975 年 6 月 21 日与 John Long、Bill Westbay 完成 The Nose 单日首登，1000 米路线 17 小时 45 分。哈丁 1958 年用了 47 天；到 1975 年精英仍需至少三天。概念来自 Frank Sacherer，布里德韦尔说这想法「在 Bird 脑子里扎根了十年」。三人满月下近午夜出发，靠记忆序列快速通过，6:15 到 Dolt Tower；Pitch 13 三人手臂严重疲劳，Long 泵着顶住、差点 80 英尺冲坠前放进保护。最后几段与 Great Roof 最难，有人刚拆掉大部分固定钉，布里德韦尔在时间压力下边攀边放新保护。纪录保持 11 年至 Bachar 与 Dale Croft 10:05；2018 年 Honnold 与 Caldwell 破 2 小时。布里德韦尔师从 Robbins 与 Harding，后成为 Stonemasters 非正式领袖、Yosemite 百余条首登，并拓展至 Patagonia 与阿拉斯加。
paragraphs.en: Bridwell "The Bird" with John Long and Bill Westbay completed the first one-day ascent of The Nose on June 21, 1975—1000 m in 17h45m. Harding had needed 47 days in 1958; by 1975 elites still needed at least three days. The concept came from Frank Sacherer; Bridwell said it had "been firmly lodged in the Bird's mind" for a decade. The trio left near midnight under a full moon, moving quickly through memorized sequences to Dolt Tower by 6:15; at pitch 13 all had significant arm fatigue, Long pushed through pumped arms nearly falling 80 ft before placing pro. The final pitches and Great Roof were hardest; someone had removed most fixed pitons, forcing Bridwell to place new pro while climbing fast. The record stood 11 years until Bachar and Dale Croft 10:05; 2018 Honnold and Caldwell went sub-2h. Bridwell was apprentice to Robbins and Harding, later unofficial leader of the Stonemasters, 100+ first ascents in Yosemite, then Patagonia and Alaska.

title.zh: The Nose 速攀 1:58:07（2018）
title.en: The Nose speed 1:58:07 (2018)

summary.zh: 与 Honnold 首次破 2 小时；2018 年 5–6 月约 12 次同攀、每次复盘。
summary.en: With Honnold first sub-2h; ~12 climbs together May–June 2018, debrief each time.

paragraphs.zh: 2018 年 6 月 6 日 Caldwell 与 Honnold 以 1 小时 58 分 7 秒完成 The Nose，史上首次突破 2 小时。二人 2018 年 5 月起一起在 Nose 上训练，5 月至 6 月初共攀约 12 次，包括 5 月 30 日 2:10:15、6 月 4 日 2:01:50 两次尝试逐步逼近。破纪录日 Honnold 说「感觉没那么快，但翻顶看到 1:57」意识到达成目标；尽管掉了关键装备、需要超过其他队伍，仍比前次快了 3.5 分钟以上。速攀时间线：1975 Bridwell/Long/Westbay 17:45，1986 Bachar/Croft 10:05，1992 Florine/Croft 4:22，2012 Florine/Honnold 2:23:46，2018 Caldwell/Honnold 1:58:07。Honnold 推测人类极限可能接近 90 分钟，但暂无进一步计划。
paragraphs.en: On June 6, 2018 Caldwell and Honnold climbed the Nose in 1h58m07s—first sub-2h in history. They trained together on the Nose from May 2018, ~12 times including May 30 (2:10:15) and June 4 (2:01:50). On record day Honnold: "It didn't feel that fast, but when I popped over the top I saw 1:57"; despite dropping gear and passing parties they shaved 3.5+ minutes. Timeline: 1975 Bridwell/Long/Westbay 17:45, 1986 Bachar/Croft 10:05, 1992 Florine/Croft 4:22, 2012 Florine/Honnold 2:23:46, 2018 Caldwell/Honnold 1:58:07. Honnold suggested the limit might approach 90 minutes but had no immediate plans to pursue.

title.zh: 去除低效与每次复盘
title.en: Trim inefficiency and debrief every time

summary.zh: 「速攀的关键是去除低效」；每次攀完顶上都大复盘、下山一路聊、随时互相问。
summary.en: "Main thing with speed climbing is to trim inefficiency"; debrief up top, talk on down hike, random questions all day.

paragraphs.zh: Honnold 强调「速攀的关键是去除低效」。二人每次爬完路线都会在顶上做大复盘，下山徒步大部分时间在聊，白天还会随机互相提问、琢磨怎样能做得更好。这种系统复盘与沟通是他们将纪录从 2:10 推到 2:01 再推到 1:58 的核心方法。
paragraphs.en: Honnold: "The main thing with speed climbing is to trim inefficiency." After each climb they did a big debrief on top, spent most of the down hike talking, and throughout the day randomly asked each other questions to figure out ways to do things better. This systematic debrief and communication was central to cutting the record from 2:10 to 2:01 to 1:58.

title.zh: The Nose 速攀与 Free Solo 脉络
title.en: The Nose speed and Free Solo context

summary.zh: 与 Caldwell 1:58:07；《Free Solo》奥斯卡；El Cap 无保护见 06 类。
summary.en: With Caldwell 1:58:07; Free Solo Oscar; El Cap free solo in 06.

paragraphs.zh: Honnold 与 Caldwell 2018 年创 The Nose 速攀世界纪录 1:58:07。2017 年 6 月 3 日他完成 El Capitan Freerider 路线无保护独攀（3 小时 56 分），《Free Solo》2019 年获奥斯卡最佳纪录片（导演 Vasarhelyi & Jimmy Chin，12 台摄像机、700 小时素材）。著作《Alone on the Wall》与 David Roberts 合著，双叙述结构；国家地理称其 El Cap 无保护攀为「运动史上最伟大的纯攀岩壮举之一」。本条目仅收录大岩壁/速攀维度；自由独攀详见 06-explorer-free-solo。
paragraphs.en: Honnold with Caldwell set the Nose speed record 1:58:07 in 2018. On June 3, 2017 he free soloed El Capitan's Freerider (3h56m); Free Solo won the 2019 Oscar for Best Documentary (directors Vasarhelyi & Jimmy Chin, 12 cameras, 700 hours). Book Alone on the Wall with David Roberts, dual narrative; National Geographic called his El Cap free solo "the greatest feat of pure rock climbing in the history of the sport." This entry covers big wall/speed; free solo see 06-explorer-free-solo.

title.zh: 可视化、日记与次最大训练
title.en: Visualization, journaling and submaximal training

summary.zh: 先心理后身体；可视化预演情绪；2005 年起日记；次最大允许每周 3–4 练。
summary.en: Mental before physical; visualize to pre-experience emotions; journal since 2005; submaximal for 3–4 sessions/week.

paragraphs.zh: Honnold 把心理准备当作身体训练的基础。他通过可视化在攀爬前预演情绪：「我在想那会是什么感觉……这样在做的时候就不会被情绪淹没。」遇到意外时用深呼吸和基于现实的 reframe：「一旦你意识到发生了，它已经发生了……你没掉。」他把恐惧 reframe 为与兴奋无法区分的身体感受，不加评判地观察。成功不仅是到顶，而是有尊严、享受地完成；他强调过程导向、专注下一动。大目标只是「很多小目标持续做的结果」。他从 2005 年起坚持攀岩与训练日记，几乎每攀都记，不为夸耀而为追踪进步与刻意练习。他偏好次最大训练以便每周 3–4 次、恢复与适应更好。
paragraphs.en: Honnold treats mental preparation as foundational. He visualizes to pre-experience emotions so he doesn't experience them during the climb. When unexpected situations arise he uses deep breathing and reality-based reframing: "Once you've registered that it's happened, it's already happened… you didn't fall off." He reframes fear as indistinguishable from excitement, observes without judgment. Success is performing with dignity and enjoyment; process-focused, next move only. "Big goals are just the outgrowth of lots of little goals done consistently." He has kept a journal since 2005, nearly every climb, to track progress not glorify results. He favors submaximal training for 3–4 sessions/week and better recovery.

title.zh: Dawn Wall 自由首登与 Pitch 15
title.en: Dawn Wall first free and Pitch 15

summary.zh: 与 Caldwell 19 天；Pitch 15 七天、指皮与胶布；Caldwell 等待共同登顶。
summary.en: With Caldwell 19 days; Pitch 15 seven days, skin and tape; Caldwell waited to summit together.

paragraphs.zh: 乔格森 11 岁在 Santa Rosa 室内馆起步，因《Progression》纪录片 2009 年通过朋友联系 Caldwell 加入 Dawn Wall 项目。路线 32 段、近 1000 米，两段 5.14d；Caldwell 2007 年设想自由攀线。2014 年 12 月 27 日至 2015 年 1 月 14 日二人最终 push 共 19 天，因必须按顺序无坠落自由攀每段。Pitch 15 约 60 英尺、微小晶体脚点，乔格森鏖战七天——反复坠落、刀缘微点磨破指皮、贴胶布保护；送段后「我如释重负」，立即上攀与 Caldwell 会合。Caldwell 选择等待搭档而非独自登顶，二人 1 月 14 日共同登顶。奥巴马发推「你们提醒我们一切皆有可能」；《The Dawn Wall》纪录片 2017 年由 Josh Lowell 与 Peter Mortimer 执导。
paragraphs.en: Jorgeson started at 11 in Santa Rosa; after the 2009 doc Progression he contacted Caldwell via a friend and joined the Dawn Wall project. The route has 32 pitches, ~1000 m, two 5.14d; Caldwell envisioned the free line in 2007. Dec 27, 2014–Jan 14, 2015 they spent 19 days because both had to free every pitch in sequence without falls. Pitch 15 is 60 ft on microscopic crystal holds; Jorgeson fought seven days—repeated falls, razor edges shredding skin, taping between attempts. After sending: "I felt overwhelmed with relief"; he continued up to reunite with Caldwell, who had waited rather than summiting alone. They summited together Jan 14. Obama tweeted "You remind us that anything is possible"; The Dawn Wall doc (2017) by Josh Lowell and Peter Mortimer.

title.zh: Pitch 15 皮肤管理
title.en: Pitch 15 skin management

summary.zh: 刀缘微点几把就磨破指皮；段间贴胶布、专门休息日、24–48 小时再试。
summary.en: Razor microholds wear skin in few attempts; tape between tries, rest days for skin, 24–48h before re-attempting.

paragraphs.zh: Dawn Wall 上乔格森在 Pitch 15 的战斗成为精英级皮肤管理的案例：该段需要反复接触刀缘般晶体微点，几把之内就能磨破指皮。他的做法：尝试之间给单指节贴胶布保护部分愈合；专门留出完全休息日给皮肤恢复；最难段之间允许 24–48 小时再试；每天监测皮肤厚度判断是否可试。皮肤挑战之严峻与公开引发了主流媒体对攀岩指皮护理的广泛报道。
paragraphs.en: Jorgeson's battle on Pitch 15 became a case study in skin management: the pitch required repeated contact with razor-edged crystal microholds that wore through skin within a few attempts. His protocol: taping individual finger segments between attempts to protect partial healing; complete rest days for skin recovery; 24–48 h between attempts on the hardest pitches; monitoring skin thickness daily to judge readiness. The severity and publicity of the skin challenge generated widespread mainstream coverage of climbing skin care.

title.zh: NIAD 与 Astroman/Rostrum 自由单独连攀
title.en: NIAD and Astroman/Rostrum free solo link-up

summary.zh: 1986 与 Bachar Nose+Half Dome 10 小时；1987 首完 Astroman & Rostrum 自由单独连攀；1986–1992 多次 Nose 速攀纪录。
summary.en: 1986 with Bachar Nose+Half Dome 10h; 1987 first Astroman & Rostrum free solo link-up; 1986–1992 multiple Nose speed records.

paragraphs.zh: 克罗夫特生于温哥华岛，读 Chris Bonington 后入门攀岩。1982 年与 Foweraker、Hamish Fraser 完成 University Wall 5.12 首登，他写道「我渴望一场需要我全力以赴——甚至更多的远征」。1986 年与 John Bachar 用 10 小时完成 Nose + Half Dome 单日连攀（NIAD），不为创纪录而为方便，雨中超过七支队伍；纪录保持十年。1985 年 The Rostrum 首次自由单独、1987 年 Astroman 首次自由单独、同年 Astroman & Rostrum 连攀首次自由单独（仅 Potter 2000、Honnold 2007 重复）。Nose 速攀：1986 Bachar 10:00，1990 Schultz 6:40，1991 Schultz 4:48，1992 Florine 4:22。他还首登 Moonlight Buttress、Nose+Salathé 单日连攀。他将自由独攀描述为「原始状态」、本能与流动；但担心现代拍摄独攀增加人员与变量、影响专注。
paragraphs.en: Croft grew up on Vancouver Island; after reading Bonington he took up climbing. 1982 with Foweraker and Hamish Fraser first free ascent of University Wall 5.12; he "craved an odyssey that required my all–and quite possibly more." 1986 with John Bachar did Nose + Half Dome in 10h (NIAD), for convenience not record, in rain passing seven parties; record stood ten years. 1985 The Rostrum first free solo, 1987 Astroman first free solo, same year first free solo link-up of Astroman & Rostrum (only Potter 2000, Honnold 2007 repeated). Nose speed: 1986 Bachar 10:00, 1990 Schultz 6:40, 1991 Schultz 4:48, 1992 Florine 4:22. He also did FA of Moonlight Buttress, first one-day Nose and Salathé link-up. He describes solo as transcendent "primal state"; but worries filming adds personnel and variables that can compromise concentration.

title.zh: 渴望全力以赴的远征
title.en: Craved an odyssey that required my all

summary.zh: University Wall 首登时「需要我全力以赴——甚至更多」；自由独攀的原始状态。
summary.en: On University Wall "required my all–and quite possibly more"; solo as primal state.

paragraphs.zh: 克罗夫特在 University Wall 首登后反思：「我渴望一场需要我全力以赴——甚至更多的远征……我想投入并见血，那血是我自己的也没关系。」他将自由独攀描述为超越性的体验，达到本能与流动创造的「原始状态」。他担心现代攀岩者拍摄独攀时，额外人员与变量可能带来压力、损害专注，导致失误或事故。
paragraphs.en: Croft on University Wall: "I craved an odyssey that required my all–and quite possibly more…. I wanted to dive in and draw blood, and it was OK if that blood was my own." He describes solo climbing as transcendent, achieving a "primal state" where instinct and flow create an unmatched sensation. He expresses concern that filming solos adds personnel and variables that can induce stress and compromise concentration.

text.zh: 我渴望一场需要我全力以赴——甚至更多的远征。
text.en: I craved an odyssey that required my all–and quite possibly more.

title.zh: The Nose 单日、Astroman 与 40+ 著作
title.en: The Nose in a day, Astroman and 40+ books

summary.zh: 1975 与 Bridwell/Westbay Nose 单日；同年 Astroman 自由首登；Stonemasters、Josh Tree 无保护推广；Rock & Ice 25 年最具影响探险家。
summary.en: 1975 with Bridwell/Westbay Nose in a day; same year Astroman first free; Stonemasters, Josh Tree solo; Rock & Ice 25-year most influential.

paragraphs.zh: 朗 1975 年阵亡将士纪念日与 Jim Bridwell、Billy Westbay 完成「北美最受追捧攀岩路线」The Nose 单日首登；同年与 Ron Kauk、John Bachar 完成 Washington Column 东壁（Astroman）自由首登。他高中时在 Joshua Tree 推广无保护攀登，1974 年将 John Bachar 引入该实践；1973 年 Paisano Overhang 确立 5.12 难度基准。他是传奇 Stonemasters 成员（含 Bachar、Lynn Hill）。他著有 40+ 本书含《How to Rock Climb》系列、《Advanced Rock Climbing》（Banff 奖）、中篇《Rogue's Babylon》启发《Cliffhanger》；《The Stonemasters》获 2010 Banff 山岳图书大奖；2006 年美国高山俱乐部文学奖、2009 年 Rock & Ice「过去 25 年最具影响探险家」。
paragraphs.en: Long on Memorial Day 1975 with Bridwell and Westbay did the first one-day ascent of the Nose; same year with Ron Kauk and John Bachar first free ascent of Washington Column East Face (Astroman). He popularized free soloing at Joshua Tree in high school and introduced Bachar to the practice in 1974; his 1973 Paisano Overhang established 5.12. He was in the Stonemasters (Bachar, Lynn Hill). He authored 40+ books including How to Rock Climb, Advanced Rock Climbing (Banff Award), novella Rogue's Babylon (inspired Cliffhanger); The Stonemasters won 2010 Banff Grand Prize; 2006 AAC Literary Award, 2009 Rock & Ice "most influential adventurer" over 25 years.

title.zh: El Capitan Freerider 无保护独攀
title.en: El Capitan Freerider free solo

summary.zh: 2017 年 6 月 3 日史上首次 El Cap 全路线无保护独攀，3 小时 56 分；Freeblast 心理难点、Boulder Problem 技术难点；一年以上准备与数百小时结组排练。
summary.en: 3 June 2017 first free solo of full El Cap route, 3h 56m; Freeblast psychological crux, Boulder Problem technical crux; over a year of prep and hundreds of hours of roped rehearsal.

paragraphs.zh: 2017 年 6 月 3 日霍诺德完成 El Capitan Freerider 史上首次无保护独攀，约 3000 英尺、不到四小时。他花了一年多系统准备：数百小时结组练习、为每段编排精确动作、在笔记本中记录每次训练；Freeblast 约 600 英尺处的 barely-vertical slab 是心理最难段落（「像在玻璃上走」），Boulder Problem 则是技术难点，最小支点约八分之一英寸。攀登日清晨少数朋友架好相机，霍诺德系好粉袋起步；总用时 3 小时 56 分，被《纽约时报》称为「史上最伟大运动成就之一」。
paragraphs.en: On 3 June 2017 Honnold completed the first free solo of El Capitan's Freerider—3000 ft in under four hours. He spent over a year preparing: hundreds of hours of roped rehearsal, precise choreography for each section, detailed session logs in notebooks. The Freeblast (~600 ft up) was the psychological crux ("like walking up glass"); the Boulder Problem the technical crux with the tiniest hold "maybe this big." A handful of friends readied cameras at dawn; total time 3h 56m—"one of the great athletic feats of any kind, ever" (NYT).

text.zh: 我做过十一二次没掉过。但肯定得先打起精神。
text.en: I've done it 11 or 12 times now without falling. But it's definitely something you have to get psyched up for.

title.zh: 恐惧管理、心流与杏仁核
title.en: Fear management, flow and amygdala

summary.zh: 系统脱敏而非无畏；将恐惧当信息、情绪再评价；fMRI 显示杏仁核几乎无激活；公开演讲比独攀更焦虑。
summary.en: Systematic desensitization not fearlessness; fear as information, reappraisal; fMRI showed minimal amygdala activation; more anxiety about public speaking than soloing.

paragraphs.zh: 霍诺德强调自己并非无畏，而是通过系统脱敏管理恐惧：「若经常经历那种程度的恐惧，最终会更能应对。」他把恐惧当信息看待（「为何不把恐惧当饥饿一样对待？」），与情绪再评价研究一致。2016 年南卡罗来纳医科大学 fMRI 显示：观看 disturbing 图像时其杏仁核几乎无激活，对照组则明显；研究者 Jane Joseph 称仅一个 voxel 有反应、与统计误差难辨。霍诺德在奖赏任务中多巴胺相关脑区活动也极低。他对待可怕事物的方法：分析为何可怕、区分理性与非理性、逐一处理，直到再做时不再感到害怕；准备到位后不是控制恐惧，而是不再感到恐惧。他自述对公开演讲的焦虑超过无保护独攀，说明后果感知比实际风险更影响焦虑。
paragraphs.en: Honnold emphasizes systematic desensitization: "If you routinely experience that level of fear, eventually you get better at managing it." He treats fear as information ("Why don't people treat fear the same way they treat hunger?"), consistent with cognitive reappraisal. 2016 fMRI at Medical University of South Carolina showed virtually no amygdala activation to disturbing images versus the control; researcher Jane Joseph found only a single voxel. His reward circuitry also showed minimal activity. His method: identify why something is scary, separate rational from irrational, work through until it no longer feels scary; preparation removes fear rather than controlling it. He has more anxiety about public speaking than free soloing—perceived consequence matters more than physical risk.

title.zh: 路线记忆、笔记与过度准备
title.en: Route memorization, journals and over-preparation

summary.zh: 隔日 1 小时指力/引体；数百小时结组精确编排每段手脚顺序；攀登前几日顶绳检查粉标；只在不累时独攀。
summary.en: Hour-long fingertip/pullup sessions every other day; hundreds of hours roped, memorizing exact sequences; days before climb rappel check of chalk marks; only solo when not tired.
