paragraphs.zh: 霍诺德隔日在房车门框自制的指力/引体器械上练约 1 小时；用详细日记记录每次训练与表现。他为 Freerider 花了一年多、数百小时结组，推敲并记住每段关键 pitch 的精确手脚顺序；攀登前几天还徒步到 El Cap 顶部、沿路线下降检查雨水是否冲掉粉标。他自传与访谈中反复强调：只在「绝对确定」时无保护独攀——不是自信而是确定，来自过度训练与排练；到顶后若感到疲惫即视为准备失败，应能「再来一遍」才算到位。
paragraphs.en: Honnold trains every other day ~1 hr on a doorway apparatus (fingertip hangs, one- and two-arm pullups). He logs every session in a detailed journal. For Freerider he spent hundreds of hours on rope memorizing exact hand and foot sequences for every key pitch; days before the climb he hiked to the top and rappelled to check chalk marks. He repeatedly states: only free-solo when "absolutely certain"—not confident but certain, from obsessive rehearsal; feeling tired at the top would be a failure of preparation; the standard is being able to "do it again" on top.

title.zh: Yosemite 独攀先驱与 Bachar-Yerian
title.en: Yosemite free solo pioneer and Bachar-Yerian

summary.zh: 1970–80 年代代表人物；New Dimensions 5.11a、Father Figure 5.13a；与 Dave Yerian 开辟 Bachar-Yerian；Bachar 梯子发明者；2009 年独攀中离世。
summary.en: Defining figure 1970s–80s; New Dimensions 5.11a, Father Figure 5.13a; Bachar-Yerian with Dave Yerian; invented Bachar ladder; died 2009 soloing.

paragraphs.zh: 约翰·巴哈尔（1957–2009）在 1970–80 年代成为 Yosemite 无保护独攀的代表人物。他 16 岁在 Joshua Tree 开始独攀简易路线以便省去绳索；转折来自导师 John Long 在 Double Cross (5.8) 上的逻辑挑战：「你要是 toprope 一百次会掉几次？」巴哈尔答零，Long 说「那就上。」1975 年 Long 带 18 岁的他进 Yosemite 独攀，随后二人完成数千英尺的连攀。他的独攀进阶包括 New Dimensions (5.11a)、Nabisco Wall via Butterballs (5.11c)、onsight Moratorium、Baby Apes (5.12c)、Father Figure (5.13a) 个人最难。1980 年德国与 Verdon 经历影响了他与 Dave Yerian 在 Tuolumne 开辟的 Bachar-Yerian，被视为美国最 committing 的传统路线之一。他发明了 Bachar 梯子。2009 年 7 月 5 日他在 Mammoth Lakes 附近独攀时去世，享年 52 岁。
paragraphs.en: John Bachar (1957–2009) was the defining figure of Yosemite free solo in the 1970s–80s. He began soloing at 16 at Joshua Tree; the turning point was mentor John Long's challenge on Double Cross (5.8): "How many times would you fall if you toproped it 100 times?" Bachar said zero; Long: "Alright then, we're on it." In 1975 Long introduced 18-year-old Bachar to Yosemite soloing; they did circuits linking thousands of feet. His progression included New Dimensions (5.11a), Nabisco Wall (5.11c), onsight Moratorium, Baby Apes (5.12c), Father Figure (5.13a). The Bachar-Yerian at Tuolumne with Dave Yerian is one of America's most committing trad routes. He invented the Bachar ladder. He died 5 July 2009 while soloing near Mammoth Lakes, aged 52.

title.zh: 控制与「知道能做」的训练哲学
title.en: Control and "know that I can do" training philosophy

summary.zh: 独攀为最自然的攀登形态；把能力提到岩壁水平、能下攀脱困；「练不是为了能做动作，是为了知道能做」。
summary.en: Solo as purest climbing; elevate skill to the rock, down-climb out of trouble; "train so that I know that I can do the moves."

paragraphs.zh: 巴哈尔将无保护独攀描述为「如此自由、轻松，像最自然的攀登形态」——不是噱头而是最纯粹的状态，与岩石直接对话。控制是他哲学的核心：无法控制就退；把攀登能力提到岩壁水平而非把岩壁降到自己的水平；不仅要能独攀某条线，还要强到能下攀脱困。他学运动学、用负重引体等打造高度自律的训练；被问为何做 50 个指尖引体时他说：「我不是为了能做动作而练，我练是为了知道我能做那些动作。」他强调传统攀登伦理：地面起首登、onsight，反对运动攀伦理侵蚀传统区域。Honnold、Lonnie Kauk、Renan Ozturk 等均称受其启发。
paragraphs.en: Bachar described free soloing as "so free, so easy, like it was the most natural form of climbing"—not a stunt but climbing in its purest state. Control was essential: back off when control isn't possible; elevate your skill to the rock; be strong enough to down-climb out of trouble. He studied kinesiology and used weight-belt pullups in a disciplined routine; when asked why 50 fingertip pullups he said: "I don't train so that I can do the moves; I train so that I know that I can do the moves." He defended ground-up onsight trad ethics. Honnold, Lonnie Kauk, Renan Ozturk have cited his influence.

text.zh: 我不是为了能做动作而练，我练是为了知道我能做那些动作。
text.en: I don't train so that I can do the moves; I train so that I know that I can do the moves.

context.zh: Nugget 访谈中 Croft 转述

title.zh: Astroman + Rostrum 同日自由独攀与 NIAD
title.en: Astroman + Rostrum same-day free solo and NIAD

summary.zh: 1987 年首度同日完成 Astroman 与 The Rostrum 自由独攀；1986 年与 Bachar Nose + Half Dome 10 小时；独攀为原始状态与心流。
summary.en: 1987 first same-day free solo of Astroman and The Rostrum; 1986 with Bachar Nose + Half Dome 10h; solo as primal state and flow.

paragraphs.zh: 克罗夫特 1985 年 The Rostrum 首次自由独攀，1986 年与 John Bachar 完成 Nose + Half Dome 单日连攀（10 小时、5000+ 英尺），1987 年首度同日完成 Astroman 与 The Rostrum 自由独攀——史上仅 Dean Potter、Alex Honnold 重复。他将独攀描述为「一场梦……那种让你回到原始状态、跟随本能、处于心流的体验」。他重视轻量化与耐力：体能不应成为限制因素；到顶若感到疲惫即视为失败，为 Astroman 会先做 40–50 个 pitch 热身、在澳大利亚曾单日超 100 pitch。他担心纪录片拍摄独攀会引入人员与变量、影响专注。
paragraphs.en: Croft did the first free solo of The Rostrum (1985), with Bachar the first one-day Nose + Half Dome (1986, 10h, 5000+ ft), and in 1987 the first same-day free solo of Astroman and The Rostrum—repeated only by Potter and Honnold. He describes soloing as "a dream—the kind of experience that sends you back to a primal state where you are following your instinct and being in the flow." He emphasizes lightweight and endurance: fitness should never be the limiting factor; feeling tired at the top would be failure—for Astroman he warmed up with 40–50 pitches, in Australia over 100 in a day. He worries that filming solos adds variables and compromises concentration.

title.zh: 原始状态、心流与体能不是限制
title.en: Primal state, flow and fitness not the limit

summary.zh: 独攀是技能表达而非表演；到顶若累即失败；灵感把天花板从 100% 提到 150%。
summary.en: Solo as expression of skill not spectacle; tired at top = failure; inspiration raises ceiling 100% to 150%.

paragraphs.zh: 克罗夫特视独攀为「技能的表达」：全神贯注保证安全，不鲁莽推难度。他名言「我渴望一场需要我全力以赴——甚至更多的远征」出自 University Wall 首登。他认为到顶时若感到疲惫就是准备的失败，应保留足够余量「真正享受那一刻」；在 Astroman 约三分之二处他曾脱鞋在岩壁上停留，感受身处橙条纹花岗岩与 Half Dome 之间的「超级酷」状态。他从 Bachar 学到恢复的重要性；灵感对他如同「把天花板从 100% 提到 150%」。
paragraphs.en: Croft views soloing as "expression of skill" rather than spectacle; full concentration ensures safety. His "craved an odyssey that required my all" comes from the University Wall FA. He considers it failure if he's tired at the top—fitness must not be the limit so he can "really take it in"; on Astroman two-thirds up he took off his shoes and stayed on the wall to absorb the moment. He credits Bachar for the importance of recovery; inspiration acts as a "ceiling raiser" from 100% to 150%.

text.zh: 一场梦——那种让你回到原始状态、跟随本能、处于心流的体验。
text.en: A dream — the kind of experience that sends you back to a primal state where you are following your instinct and being in the flow.

title.zh: Triple Crown、FreeBASE 与翼装
title.en: Triple Crown, FreeBASE and wingsuit

summary.zh: 2001 年与 O'Neill 首完 Half Dome + Watkins + El Cap 一日连攀；发明 FreeBASE；高线行走与翼装先驱；2015 年翼装事故离世。
summary.en: 2001 with O'Neill first Triple Crown in a day; invented FreeBASE; highline and wingsuit pioneer; died 2015 wingsuit accident.

paragraphs.zh: 迪恩·波特（1972–2015）2001 年与 Timmy O'Neill 完成史上首次 Yosemite Triple Crown 一日连攀：Half Dome、Mt. Watkins、El Capitan。他发明 FreeBASE——无保护独攀时佩戴 BASE 伞，坠落可开伞求生，扩展了独攀的边界。他还独攀过 Separate Reality (5.11d) 五次、Heaven (5.12d)、Astroman 等；1998 年 Half Dome 西北壁约 4 小时、95% 自由独攀；2008 年 Eiger Deep Blue Sea FreeBASE 首攀。他从小随母亲学瑜伽、从父亲学纪律，把「将死亡转化为飞翔」当作人生原则的隐喻；高线行走与翼装飞行使他成为同时精通攀岩、高线、翼装 BASE 的罕见人物。2015 年 5 月他与 Graham Hunt 在 Taft Point 尝试新翼装线路时遇难。
paragraphs.en: Dean Potter (1972–2015) with Timmy O'Neill did the first Yosemite Triple Crown in a day (2001): Half Dome, Mt. Watkins, El Capitan. He invented FreeBASE—soloing with a BASE rig for fall survival—extending the frontier of soloing. He free soloed Separate Reality five times, Heaven, Astroman; 1998 Half Dome NW face ~4h, 95% free; 2008 first FreeBASE of Eiger Deep Blue Sea. From his mother he drew breathwork and yoga, from his father discipline; "turning dying into flying" was his life metaphor. He mastered climbing, highline, and wingsuit BASE—unprecedented. On 16–17 May 2015 he and Graham Hunt died on a new wingsuit line from Taft Point.

title.zh: 将死亡转化为飞翔
title.en: Turning dying into flying

summary.zh: 风险为自我发现的工具；在自然中不破坏环境的移动不应违法；攀岩与飞行是艺术。
summary.en: Risk as tool for self-discovery; moving in nature without harm shouldn't be illegal; climbing and flying as arts.

paragraphs.zh: 波特将极限风险视为自我发现的工具：「将死亡转化为飞翔是我基本人生原则的隐喻。」他相信面对死亡能锐化觉察、深化对生命的投入。在 BASE 与公园规管语境下他说：「被允许以不破坏环境的方式在自然中移动不应违法。」他把攀岩与飞行当作「艺术」而非单纯运动，以艺术家对技艺的投入去追求。John Long 称他是「一股自然之力」；同事说「你遇不到多少年迈的翼装 BASE 跳者」——他最终在追求新翼装线路时离世。
paragraphs.en: Potter used extreme risk as a tool for self-discovery: "This concept of turning dying into flying is a metaphor for my basic life principle." He believed confronting mortality sharpened awareness. On freedom and nature: "Being allowed to travel in nature in a way that doesn't harm the environment shouldn't be illegal." He treated climbing and flying as "arts" pursued with the commitment of craft. John Long called him "a force of nature"; colleagues noted "you don't meet many old wingsuit BASE jumpers"—he ultimately died pursuing a new wingsuit line.

text.zh: 将死亡转化为飞翔，是我基本人生原则的隐喻。
text.en: This concept of turning dying into flying is a metaphor for my basic life principle.

title.zh: 美国抱石之父与粉袋、动态、B 级
title.en: Father of American bouldering; chalk, dynamics, B-grades

summary.zh: 1950 年代引入粉袋与受控动态；《The Art of Bouldering》1969；Thimble 5.12a 无保护；B1–B3 分级；2008 Pinnacle Award。
summary.en: 1950s introduced chalk and controlled dynamics; The Art of Bouldering 1969; Thimble 5.12a free solo; B1–B3 grading; 2008 Pinnacle Award.

paragraphs.zh: 约翰·吉尔（1937 年生）将攀岩视为体操的延伸，1950 年代在美国引入体操粉袋与受控动态，被 Alpinist 称为「美国现代攀岩的开端」。他在 Tetons 的 Red Cross Rock 建立 V8/V9 抱石，1961 年 Thimble 30 英尺 5.12a 无保护（无现代攀岩鞋）被视为首批 5.12 之一。他提出 B1–B3 抱石分级体系；强调形态与优雅而非单纯效率，抱石为「移动的冥想」。退休后研究攀岩与抱石起源，个人网站收录体重与绳攀历史。
paragraphs.en: John Gill (b. 1937) viewed climbing as an extension of gymnastics; in the 1950s he introduced chalk and controlled dynamics to American climbing—"the beginning of modern climbing in America" (Alpinist). He established V8/V9 at Red Cross Rock, Tetons; his 1961 Thimble 30 ft 5.12a free solo without modern shoes is among the first 5.12s. He proposed the B1–B3 bouldering scale; emphasized form and grace; bouldering as moving meditation. In retirement he researched climbing origins; his site documents bodyweight and rope-climbing history.

title.zh: 8b 到 9a 与 campus board
title.en: 8b to 9a and campus board

summary.zh: 1984 Kanal im Rücken 首 8b、1985 Punks in the Gym 首 8b+、1987 Wallstreet 首 8c、1991 Action Directe 首 9a；发明 campus board；1992 年车祸离世。
summary.en: 1984 first 8b, 1985 first 8b+, 1987 first 8c, 1991 first 9a; invented campus board; died 1992 car accident.

paragraphs.zh: 沃尔夫冈·居利希（1960–1992）1984 年 Kanal im Rücken 世界首 8b 后主导运动攀难度推进：1985 年澳大利亚 Punks in the Gym 首 8b+，1987 年 Wallstreet 首 8c，1991 年 Action Directe 首 9a。他为 Action Directe 发明 campus board 发展指臂爆发力；与 Kurt Albert 在 Frankenjura 同住、地下室健身房成为 1980 年代全球运动攀者的据点。他避免竞技、认为「攀岩若是艺术，创造力便是其核心」。1992 年 8 月驾车时入睡驶离高速，两日后去世。
paragraphs.en: Wolfgang Güllich (1960–1992) after 1984 first 8b dominated sport climbing: 1985 Punks in the Gym first 8b+, 1987 Wallstreet first 8c, 1991 Action Directe first 9a. He invented the campus board for Action Directe; shared a Frankenjura flat with Kurt Albert—cellar gym became a hub for 1980s sport climbers. He avoided competition; "if climbing is an art, creativity is its main component." August 1992 he fell asleep at the wheel, died two days later.

title.zh: 英国最强、首 8a+/8c+ 与心理训练
title.en: Best British; first 8a+/8c+; mental training

summary.zh: 1983 Master's Wall E7、首 8a+ The Face；1990 Liquid Ambar 英国首 8c+；With Winning in Mind 后首冠；The Foundry、Revelations、Mastermind。
summary.en: 1983 Master's Wall E7, first 8a+ The Face; 1990 Liquid Ambar UK first 8c+; first comp win after With Winning in Mind; The Foundry, Revelations, Mastermind.

paragraphs.zh: 杰里·莫法特（1963 年生）1980 年代初离开学校后迅速成为英国最难传统与运动攀的开拓者：1983 年 Master's Wall E7 6b、Masterclass 英国首 8a，同年德国 The Face 世界首 8a+。1985 年与 Ron Kauk 完成 Lost Arrow Spire 自由首登（ABC 直播）；1985–86 神经压迫受伤。1990 年 Liquid Ambar 英国首 8c（后升级 8c+）。他读 Lanny Bassham《With Winning in Mind》后赢得利兹首场世界杯；1990 年退役时 ASCI 排名第一。1991 年与 Paul Reeve 创办 The Foundry；著有 Revelations（2009 Banff 大奖）、Mastermind（心理训练）。
paragraphs.en: Jerry Moffatt (b. 1963) after leaving school quickly set Britain's hardest trad and sport: 1983 Master's Wall E7 6b, Masterclass UK first 8a, same year The Face world's first 8a+ in Germany. 1985 with Ron Kauk Lost Arrow Spire FFA (ABC live); 1985–86 nerve compression injury. 1990 Liquid Ambar UK first 8c (later 8c+). He read Lanny Bassham's With Winning in Mind before winning Leeds; retired 1990 ranked first ASCI. 1991 with Paul Reeve founded The Foundry; author of Revelations (2009 Banff Grand Prize), Mastermind (mental training).

title.zh: Statement of Youth、Hubble 与 Moonboard
title.en: Statement of Youth, Hubble and Moonboard

summary.zh: 1984 英国首 8a Statement、1989 法国首 8c Agincourt、1990 世界首 8c+ Hubble；Moon Climbing 与 Moonboard；48 岁 Rainshadow 9a。
summary.en: 1984 UK first 8a Statement, 1989 France first 8c Agincourt, 1990 world first 8c+ Hubble; Moon Climbing and Moonboard; age 48 Rainshadow 9a.

paragraphs.zh: 本·穆恩（1966 年生）17 岁迁往谢菲尔德，靠失业救济与 Jerry Moffatt 等人终日攀岩。1984 年 18 岁在 Lower Pen Trwyn 首登 Statement of Youth（8a），打螺栓引发争议但被视为英国运动攀革命开端。1988 年重复 Buoux 三大 8b+ 后 1989 年 1 月完成 Agincourt（法国首 8c）。1990 年 Hubble（Raven Tor）世界首 8c+，仅 6 次重复、或实为 9a。他创立的 Moon Climbing 与 Moonboard 与 campus board 一样成为全球岩馆标配。2015 年 48 岁红点 Malham Cove Rainshadow 9a。
paragraphs.en: Ben Moon (b. 1966) moved to Sheffield at 17, lived on benefits climbing daily with Moffatt and others. Aged 18 in 1984 he did the FA of Statement of Youth (8a) at Lower Pen Trwyn—bolting caused controversy but marked the start of UK sport climbing. After repeating the three Buoux 8b+ in 1988 he did Agincourt (France's first 8c) in Jan 1989. 1990 Hubble (Raven Tor) world's first 8c+, only 6 repeats—possibly 9a. His Moon Climbing and Moonboard became standard like the campus board. Aged 48 he redpointed Rainshadow 9a at Malham Cove (2015).

title.zh: Rotpunkt 与 redpoint 的起源
title.en: Origin of Rotpunkt and redpoint

summary.zh: 1970 年代 Frankenjura 在可自由攀的支点上画红叉、整条自由后底部画红点；与 Gullich 推动自由攀登与训练；2010 年 via ferrata 坠亡。
summary.en: 1970s Frankenjura red X on freed holds, red dot at base when route freed; with Gullich spread free climbing and training; died 2010 via ferrata fall.

paragraphs.zh: 库尔特·阿尔伯特（1954–2010）17 岁爬 Grandes Jorasses Walker Spur，18 岁 Eiger 北壁。1973 年萨克森瑞士之行后转向自由攀登，在 Frankenjura 尝试自由攀路线时在不需要的岩钉旁画红叉，整条路线能自由攀完后在路线底部画红点——英文「redpoint」即来自德文 Rotpunkt。这一做法催生自由攀登运动并导向运动攀。他曾任数学与物理教师，1986 年全职攀岩；与 Gullich 同住十一年、地下室健身房接待全球顶尖运动攀者。2010 年 9 月在 via ferrata 拍摄时坠 18 米，两日后去世。
paragraphs.en: Kurt Albert (1954–2010) climbed Walker Spur at 17, Eiger north face at 18. After Saxon Switzerland 1973 he turned to free climbing; in Frankenjura he painted red X by pitons not needed for free moves, and a red dot at the base when the whole route could be freed—hence "redpoint" from Rotpunkt. This practice gave rise to the free climbing movement and sport climbing. He was a maths and physics teacher until 1986; shared a flat with Gullich for 11 years, cellar gym hosted the world's best. September 2010 he fell 18 m while photographing a via ferrata, died two days later.

title.zh: 大岩壁首登与 clean climbing 哲学
title.en: Big wall first ascents and clean climbing philosophy

summary.zh: Half Dome 西北壁、Nose 二次、Salathé Wall 首登；与 Chouinard 推动 clean climbing；《Advanced Rockcraft》首登即创造；Dawn Wall 二次时砍螺栓争议。
summary.en: Half Dome NW face, Nose second, Salathé FA; with Chouinard clean climbing; Advanced Rockcraft first ascent as creation; Dawn Wall second ascent bolt-chopping controversy.

paragraphs.zh: 罗亚尔·罗宾斯（1935–2017）在 Tahquitz 学攀岩，1957 年与 Sherrick、Gallwas 完成 Half Dome 西北壁（美国首条 VI）。1960 年 The Nose 二次（首连续）、1961 年 Salathé Wall 首登（当时世界最难大岩壁）。1971 年与 Lauria 完成 Dawn Wall 二次时曾砍掉 Harding 所留螺栓（两段后停止）。他在《Advanced Rockcraft》的 Values 中写：首登是「与绘画或歌曲同义的创造」；每个岩钉的放置都「极其重要」。1978 年银屑病关节炎后转皮划艇。创立 Royal Robbins 服装品牌。
paragraphs.en: Royal Robbins (1935–2017) learned at Tahquitz; 1957 with Sherrick and Gallwas Half Dome NW face (America's first VI). 1960 Nose second (first continuous), 1961 Salathé Wall FA (world's hardest big wall at time). 1971 with Lauria on Dawn Wall second ascent he chopped Harding's bolts (stopped after two pitches). In Advanced Rockcraft Values he wrote: first ascent is "a creation in the same sense as is a painting or a song"; placing a single piton is of "enormous importance." Psoriatic arthritis 1978 led to kayaking. Founded Royal Robbins clothing.

title.zh: North America Wall、clean climbing 与 Patagonia
title.en: North America Wall, clean climbing and Patagonia

summary.zh: 1964 North America Wall 首登、Muir Wall；Chouinard Equipment、Hexentrics 与 clean climbing；Patagonia、1% for the Planet；2022 年捐公司抗气候变迁。
summary.en: 1964 North America Wall FA, Muir Wall; Chouinard Equipment, Hexentrics and clean climbing; Patagonia, 1% for the Planet; 2022 donated company to fight climate change.

paragraphs.zh: 伊冯·舒纳德（1938 年生）早期搭档包括 Royal Robbins 与 Tom Frost。1964 年与 Robbins、Frost、Chuck Pratt 无固定绳首登 North America Wall；次年与 Herbert 的 Muir Wall 提升了首登风格。他 1957 年买锻炉自制岩钉，1970 年代初意识到钢岩钉对裂缝破坏后与 Frost 推出 Hexentrics 与 Stoppers，倡导 clean climbing。从卖橄榄球衫起步的 Patagonia 成为户外与环保标杆；1986 年承诺 1% 销售或 10% 利润给环保；2002 年创立 1% for the Planet。2022 年将 Patagonia 所有权捐给信托用于应对气候变迁。
paragraphs.en: Yvon Chouinard (b. 1938) early partners included Royal Robbins and Tom Frost. 1964 with Robbins, Frost, Chuck Pratt first ascent of North America Wall with no fixed ropes; next year his and Herbert's Muir Wall improved first-ascent style. He bought a forge in 1957 to make pitons; early 1970s realising steel pitons damaged cracks, with Frost introduced Hexentrics and Stoppers and advocated clean climbing. Patagonia grew from rugby shirts into an outdoor and environmental leader; 1986 committed 1% of sales or 10% of profits to environment; 2002 founded 1% for the Planet. 2022 donated Patagonia ownership to a trust to fight climate change.

title.zh: 法国运动攀先驱与 Verdon 独攀影像
title.en: French sport climbing pioneer and Verdon solo films

summary.zh: 1979 首 7c、1981 首 7c+；1982 首 onsight 7b+ 与 7c；1983 法国首 8a；Sportroccia/Rock Master/Snowbird 冠军；1995 重伤后退休；2012 年去世。
summary.en: 1979 first 7c, 1981 first 7c+; 1982 first onsight 7b+ and 7c; 1983 France first 8a; Sportroccia/Rock Master/Snowbird winner; 1995 near-fatal fall, retired; died 2012.

paragraphs.zh: 帕特里克·埃德兰热（1960–2012）少年开始攀岩，放弃卡车司机工作后全身心投入。1979 年 Nymphodalle 7c、1981 年 Le Toit 7c+；1982 年首 onsight 7b+（Captain crochet）与 7c（La Polka des Ringards）。1983 年 Buoux Ça glisse au pays des merveilles 法国首 8a。1982 年 Jean-Paul Janssen 纪录片《La Vie au bout des doigts》中 Buoux 无保护独攀使他成名。1986 Sportroccia、1988 Rock Master 与 Snowbird 冠军。1995 年法国南部陡壁近乎致命坠落、心脏骤停后退出极端独攀，共同创办 Roc 'n Wall；晚年与抑郁与酗酒斗争。2012 年在家中楼梯跌倒去世。
paragraphs.en: Patrick Edlinger (1960–2012) started as a teenager, quit truck driving for climbing. 1979 Nymphodalle 7c, 1981 Le Toit 7c+; 1982 first onsight 7b+ (Captain crochet) and 7c (La Polka des Ringards). 1983 Buoux Ça glisse France's first 8a. The 1982 film La Vie au bout des doigts (Jean-Paul Janssen) made him famous. Won Sportroccia 1986, Rock Master and Snowbird 1988. 1995 near-fatal fall in southern France, cardiac arrest; retired from extreme soloing, co-founded Roc 'n Wall. Later years marked by depression and alcoholism. Died 2012 after falling on stairs at home.

title.zh: Astroman、Midnight Lightning 与 Camp 4
title.en: Astroman, Midnight Lightning and Camp 4

summary.zh: 1975 年与 Long、Bachar Astroman 自由首登；1978 Separate Reality 无 cam、Midnight Lightning V8；Crossroads、Magic Line；Cliffhanger 替身。
summary.en: 1975 with Long and Bachar Astroman FFA; 1978 Separate Reality without cams, Midnight Lightning V8; Crossroads, Magic Line; Cliffhanger double.

paragraphs.zh: 罗恩·考克（1957 年生）与 Camp 4 和 Yosemite 紧密相连。1975 年与 John Long、John Bachar 完成 Washington Column 东壁自由首登，路线命名为 Astroman（5.11c），当时 Yosemite 最难长距离自由路线。1978 年无 cam 首攀 Separate Reality（5.12a）屋顶裂缝，同年首登 Midnight Lightning（V8），Bachar 在岩壁上用粉笔画闪电标志。1990 年 rap-bolt Crossroads 5.13a、1997 年 Magic Line 5.14c 预置保护。1980 年代赴欧接触 redpoint 与螺栓；Bachar 曾砍掉他 1988 年 Punchline 的螺栓。与 Gullich 为《Cliffhanger》做 Stallone 替身。
paragraphs.en: Ron Kauk (b. 1957) is tied to Camp 4 and Yosemite. 1975 with John Long and John Bachar made the FFA of Washington Column East Face, named Astroman (5.11c), then the hardest long free route in the Valley. 1978 Separate Reality (5.12a) roof crack without cams, same year Midnight Lightning (V8) FA—Bachar drew the lightning bolt in chalk. 1990 rap-bolted Crossroads 5.13a, 1997 Magic Line 5.14c on pre-placed gear. 1980s trips to Europe brought redpoint and bolting; Bachar chopped his 1988 Punchline bolts. With Gullich doubled for Stallone in Cliffhanger.

title.zh: 女子难度突破与阿尔卑斯北壁冬季独攀
title.en: Women's grade breakthroughs and Alps winter solos

summary.zh: 1985 女子首 7c+/8a、1988 Choucas 女子首 8a+；三届 Sportroccia；1990 Bonatti Pillar、Voie Destivelle；Eiger/Jorasses/Matterhorn 冬独攀；2020 Piolet d'Or 终身奖。
summary.en: 1985 first woman 7c+/8a, 1988 Choucas first woman 8a+; three Sportroccia; 1990 Bonatti Pillar, Voie Destivelle; Eiger/Jorasses/Matterhorn winter solos; 2020 Piolet d'Or Lifetime.

paragraphs.zh: 凯瑟琳·德斯蒂韦勒（1960 年生）12 岁加入法国登山俱乐部，1985 年因攀岩电影转为职业。同年 Fleur de Rocaille 女子首 7c+/8a，1986、1988 再夺 Sportroccia。1988 年 Buoux Choucas 女子首 8a+。1990 年退出竞技专注登山：同年 Bonatti Pillar 女子首攀（4 小时独攀）、Nameless Tower 自由攀；1991 年 Petit Dru 新路线 Voie Destivelle（11 天独攀）。1992–1994 年完成阿尔卑斯北壁冬季独攀三部曲：Eiger、Grandes Jorasses、Matterhorn。1996 年南极 Peak 4111 首登后跌穿雪檐、15 小时自救。2020 年首位女子 Piolet d'Or 终身成就奖。
paragraphs.en: Catherine Destivelle (b. 1960) joined the French alpine club at 12; turned pro in 1985 after a climbing film. Same year Fleur de Rocaille first woman 7c+/8a; won Sportroccia 1986 and 1988. 1988 Choucas at Buoux first woman 8a+. 1990 retired from competition for alpinism: same year first female Bonatti Pillar (4h solo), Nameless Tower free; 1991 Voie Destivelle on Petit Dru (11-day solo). 1992–94 completed the Alps north face winter solo trilogy: Eiger, Grandes Jorasses, Matterhorn. 1996 after Peak 4111 FA in Antarctica she fell through a cornice, 15-hour self-rescue. 2020 first woman Piolet d'Or Lifetime Achievement.

title.zh: V 级、Hueco Tanks 与 crash pad
title.en: V-grade, Hueco Tanks and crash pad

summary.zh: Hueco Tanks 400+ 首登、1991 指南推出 V 级；《Stone Crusade》；与 Pottenger 首款商用 crash pad；Lord of the Rings 8b 凉鞋独攀。
summary.en: 400+ FAs at Hueco Tanks, 1991 guide launched V-scale; Stone Crusade; with Pottenger first commercial crash pad; Lord of the Rings 8b sandals solo.

paragraphs.zh: 约翰·舍曼（1959 年生）绰号 Verm，15 岁在 Indian Rocks 开始攀岩。1980–90 年代在 Hueco Tanks 完成 400 余首登，1991 年《Hueco Tanks Climbing and Bouldering Guide》正式推出 V 级，成为全球主流抱石分级。他著有《Stone Crusade》抱石史；与 Bruce Pottenger 设计首款商用 crash pad「Kinnaloa Sketchpad」（尼龙套、背带、双密度可换泡沫）。1988 年 Patagonia 目录中他穿凉鞋无保护独攀澳大利亚 Mount Arapiles Lord of the Rings 8b、手持啤酒的照片成为经典。
paragraphs.en: John Sherman (b. 1959), nicknamed Verm, started at 15 at Indian Rocks. 1980s–90s over 400 FAs at Hueco Tanks; his 1991 Hueco Tanks guide launched the V-scale, now a global standard. He wrote Stone Crusade; with Bruce Pottenger designed the first commercial crash pad "Kinnaloa Sketchpad" (nylon sleeve, straps, dual-density foam). The 1988 Patagonia catalog image of him free soloing Lord of the Rings 8b at Mount Arapiles in sandals with a beer became iconic.

title.zh: Campus board 发明与爆发力训练
title.en: Campus board invention and plyometric training

summary.zh: 1988 年为 Action Directe 发明，仅用手上下、可跳跃；提升运动表现与锁定力；首块在纽伦堡 Campus Centre；法/意称 pan Güllich。
summary.en: Invented 1988 for Action Directe; hands-only ascent/descent, leaping; improves performance and lock-off; first board at Campus Centre Nuremberg; pan Güllich in French/Italian.

paragraphs.zh: 居利希 1988 年在纽伦堡「Campus Centre」挂出第一块 campus board，用于发展 Action Directe 所需的极端动态指臂力量。使用者仅用手在横条或支点上攀爬或下攀，常做支点间跳跃（power throws）；训练提升动作控制、多种握法指力、臂部力量与锁定。不当使用或疲劳有肌腱损伤风险，一般不建议新手或青少年使用。2021 年首次有 campus board 训练的科学分析发表。
paragraphs.en: Güllich hung the first campus board in 1988 at Campus Centre Nuremberg for Action Directe's extreme dynamic finger and arm strength. Users ascend or descend using only hands, often leaping between holds; training improves motor control, finger strength on various grips, and lock-off strength. Improper use or fatigue risks tendon injury; generally not recommended for novices or youth. First scientific analysis of campus board training published 2021.

title.zh: Moonboard 与可复制抱石
title.en: Moonboard and reproducible bouldering

summary.zh: 2.44×3.25 m 固定支点网格、25 或 40° 仰角；2005 年商业版、2016 年 LED 序列；全球相同布局、数万条共享题目。
summary.en: 2.44×3.25 m fixed grid, 25 or 40° overhang; 2005 commercial, 2016 LED sequences; identical layout globally, tens of thousands of shared problems.

paragraphs.zh: 本·穆恩与 Andy Pollitt 1980–90 年代在谢菲尔德家中地下室造木制极限训练墙；2005 年与 Rich Simpson 推出商业 Moonboard，源自 The School Room 的非正式岩馆。2016 年 LED 版使支点可亮起预设序列，全球 MoonBoard 布局一致，在线数据库有数万条分级序列。与 campus board、hangboard 并列成为岩馆常见训练工具。
paragraphs.en: Ben Moon and Andy Pollitt built wooden training walls in Sheffield cellars in the 1980s–90s; 2005 with Rich Simpson commercial Moonboard from The School Room. 2016 LED version allows preset sequences; identical hold grid globally, tens of thousands of graded problems online. With campus and hangboard, a standard gym tool.

title.zh: Progression/Transgression 指力板与负荷控制
title.en: Progression/Transgression fingerboards and load control

summary.zh: 八档渐进边条、科学选深；2003 年 regletómetro、100+ 攀岩者研究；附方法与管理指南；Transgression 进阶版。
summary.en: Eight progressively smaller edges, scientifically selected depths; 2003 regletómetro, 100+ climber research; methodology and load guidelines; Transgression for advanced.

paragraphs.zh: 埃娃·洛佩斯博士 2003 年为指力研究设计「regletómetro」原型，与 100 余名攀岩者合作完成博士论文。Progression® 指力板提供八档不同深度的边条，便于控制与递进负荷、个性化、以努力与进步为动机；适合攀岩逾两年、16 岁以上、24 mm 悬垂超 15 秒且 10 mm 不足 10 秒者。Transgression® 面向更强指力者。每板附方法、负荷管理与周期指南，旨在让使用者成为「自己进步过程的主人」。
paragraphs.en: Dr Eva López designed the 'regletómetro' in 2003 for finger strength research and worked with 100+ climbers for her PhD. Progression® offers eight edge depths for load control and progression, personalization, and motivation from improvement; for climbers 2+ years, 16+, hanging 24 mm >15 s and 10 mm <10 s. Transgression® for stronger fingers. Each board includes methodology and scheduling so users become 'master of your own process.'

title.zh: 关键表现指标测试与能量系统
title.en: Key performance indicators and energy system

summary.zh: 《Training for Climbing》多版、能量系统模型；测试指力/无氧/有氧；反对青春期前单项目专攻；Treadwall 与家庭岩馆。
summary.en: Training for Climbing editions, energy system model; test finger force, lactate, VO2; against pre-puberty single-sport; Treadwall and home gym.

paragraphs.zh: 埃里克·霍斯特 41 年攀岩、30+ 年教练，八本书含《Training for Climbing》多版与西语版、《Maximum Climbing》。他主张对高水平攀岩者做关键表现指标测试（指力、攀岩专项血乳酸、VO2），据此设计训练；近年指力与 campus 的科研协议（如 Eva Lopez）使训练更有效。他认为过去 20 年动作教学进步大，但体能训练平台仍是 hangboard 与 campus；Treadwall 与间歇协议是少有的新工具。反对青少年单项目过早专攻，建议多项目发展。
paragraphs.en: Eric Horst, 41 years climbing, 30+ coaching; eight books including Training for Climbing (multiple editions, Spanish), Maximum Climbing. He advocates testing key performance indicators (finger force, climbing-specific lactate, VO2) for program design; research-based protocols (e.g. Eva Lopez) improve hangboard/campus use. He says movement coaching has progressed but physical platforms remain hangboard and campus; Treadwall and interval protocols are newer tools. Against early single-sport specialization; recommends multi-sport for youth.

title.zh: Rock Prodigy 周期化与 RCTM
title.en: Rock Prodigy periodization and RCTM

summary.zh: 基础期/力量期/力量耐力期/调整；《The Rock Climber's Training Manual》；Mark 5.14c、El Cap 自由攀；Rock Prodigy Training Center。
summary.en: Base/strength/power endurance/taper; The Rock Climber's Training Manual; Mark 5.14c, El Cap free; Rock Prodigy Training Center.

paragraphs.zh: 马克·安德森与迈克·安德森《The Rock Climber's Training Manual》提出系统周期化：基础期、力量期、力量耐力期、调整，结合全面计划与一对一指导。Mark 红点 5.14c、onsight 5.13b、El Cap 自由攀、Denali 登顶，多洲首登；痴迷于解锁攀岩的体能技术挑战的新方法。Rock Prodigy Training Center 提供定制建议与「周末战士」可执行的计划。
paragraphs.en: Mark and Mike Anderson's The Rock Climber's Training Manual lays out systematic periodization: base, strength, power endurance, taper, with comprehensive plans and one-on-one coaching. Mark has redpointed 5.14c, onsighted 5.13b, freed El Cap, summited Denali, first ascents on four continents; obsessed with new methods for physical and technical challenges. Rock Prodigy Training Center offers tailored advice and plans for weekend warriors.

title.zh: 个性化计划与 Masterclass
title.en: Personalized plans and Masterclass

summary.zh: 1994 年起 3000+ 攀岩者；每份计划亲力亲为、质量优于数量；V2–V6/6a–7c 专长；Masterclass 技术片；数据验证方法。
summary.en: 3000+ climbers since 1994; every plan by him, quality over quantity; specializes in V2–V6/6a–7c; Masterclass technique films; data-verified methodology.

paragraphs.zh: 尼尔·格雷沙姆 1994 年起提供个性化训练计划，比其它教练公司早 15 年以上；3000+ 攀岩者、以数据统计验证方法。他坚持每份计划亲自完成、不用初级助手或 AI；强调质量优于数量、针对个人水平与目标、保留精力。Masterclass 技术影片是 YouTube 上首批同类资源，仍被广泛使用。Steve McClure 称其为「英国最知名、最受尊敬的攀岩教练」。
paragraphs.en: Neil Gresham has offered personalized plans since 1994, 15+ years before other coaching companies; 3000+ climbers, methodology verified with data. He produces every plan himself, no junior or AI; quality over quantity, tailored to level and goals, preserving energy. Masterclass technique films were among the first on YouTube and remain a go-to resource. Steve McClure called him 'Britain's most well-known and respected rock climbing coach.'

title.zh: 木制裂缝系统与 Wide Boyz 训练
title.en: Wooden crack systems and Wide Boyz training

summary.zh: 谢菲尔德地下室横跨全室的木制裂缝；两年系统训练后 2011 年 Century Crack 5.14b 首登；《Crack Climbing》与裂缝学校。
summary.en: Wooden crack systems traversing Sheffield cellar; two years systematic training before 2011 Century Crack 5.14b FA; Crack Climbing book and crack schools.

paragraphs.zh: 汤姆·兰德尔与皮特·惠特克在谢菲尔德地下室建造可横穿的木制裂缝系统，专注 offwidth 两年后 2011 年赴美，完成 Century Crack 5.14b 首登（当时最难 offwidth）。皮特在 TrainingBeta 访谈中说：与早年已有的裂缝机相比，他们「更系统、更专注那一种攀爬风格」，可能因此再次推动标准；当时体能极好、技术不如美国裂缝好手，但体能弥补了技术差距。后出《Crack Climbing: The Definitive Guide》并办裂缝学校。
paragraphs.en: Tom Randall and Pete Whittaker built wooden crack systems traversing a Sheffield cellar; two years dedicated to offwidth before the 2011 US trip and Century Crack 5.14b FA. Pete told TrainingBeta: compared to earlier crack machines, they were 'more systematic and maybe more dedicated to just that style'—perhaps what pushed standards again; they were very fit and strong but technique wasn't as good as US crack climbers, fitness compensated. Later wrote Crack Climbing: The Definitive Guide and run crack schools.

title.zh: 《9 out of 10》与《Make or Break》
title.en: 9 out of 10 Climbers and Make or Break

summary.zh: 信息过载与自信决策；今日瓶颈是筛选与聚焦；《Make or Break》伤病与复出；实用、可操作建议。
summary.en: Information overload and confident decisions; limiting step is filtering and focus; Make or Break on injury and return; practical, actionable advice.

paragraphs.zh: 戴夫·麦克劳德《9 out of 10 Climbers Make the Same Mistakes》指出：二十年前问题是没人知道怎么练，信息少；今天是信息轰炸，书与文章列举技术、练习与贴士，在洪流中筛选出与个人生活、攀岩与处境相关的内容成为瓶颈。该书首次以能助人做自信决策、聚焦最有效事项的方式呈现攀岩训练科学。《Make or Break》处理伤病预防与复出。Neil Gresham 评：从繁琐理论迈向真正有效、可操作的实用建议。
paragraphs.en: Dave MacLeod's 9 out of 10 Climbers argues: 20 years ago the problem was no one knew how to train; today it's information overload—books and articles list technique, exercises, tips; navigating and filtering to what matters for your life and circumstances is the limiting step. The book presents training science so readers can make confident decisions and focus. Make or Break covers injury and return. Neil Gresham: 'a step away from tedious theory and a move towards practical, hands-on advice, that really works!'

title.zh: 数据驱动评估与 LatticePlans
title.en: Data-driven assessments and LatticePlans

summary.zh: 全球最大攀岩者表现数据集；评估对照行业数据；LatticePlans 由智能训练技术生成与调整；免费/远程/线下评估。
summary.en: World's largest climber performance dataset; assessments against industry data; LatticePlans generated and adapted by intelligent training tech; free/remote/in-person assessments.

paragraphs.zh: Lattice Training 由教练与运动科学家组成，核心是数据：多年测试与全球 50,000+ 攀岩者数据构成行业最大表现数据集，支撑真正数据驱动的训练。评估可对照该数据集得到定制化强弱项报告；计划分教练撰写与 app 生成的 LatticePlans（非 AI，用表现数据生成并随训练调整）。不论水平、目标、经验或预算都有对应计划档位；免费、远程与线下评估可选。
paragraphs.en: Lattice Training is a team of coaches and sports scientists; at the core is data: years of testing and 50,000+ climbers form the largest dataset of climber metrics, enabling data-informed training. Assessments compare against this dataset for customized strength/weakness reports; plans include coach-written and app-generated LatticePlans (intelligent tech, not AI, using performance data to create and adapt). Plans for all levels, goals, and budgets; free, remote, and in-person assessments available.

title.zh: 巴黎奥运银牌与赛前心理
title.en: Paris Olympic silver and pre-race mindset

summary.zh: 2024 吴江世界杯夺冠、巴黎 4.77 秒 PB 银牌；赛前耳机封闭、专注发挥训练水平；中国首位男子速度奥运奖牌。
summary.en: 2024 Wujiang World Cup winner, Paris 4.77s PB silver; pre-race headphone ritual; China's first male speed Olympic medal.

paragraphs.zh: 伍鹏 2002 年生于湖南邵阳，速度专项。2024 年吴江世界杯夺冠标志从新秀到顶尖的成熟；他称「稳定发挥来自训练的持续积累，没想多快，只想把训练水平发挥出来」。巴黎奥运四分之一决赛 0.002 秒险胜，半决赛淘汰 Watson，决赛对 Leonardo 以 4.77 秒个人最佳获银，差 0.02 秒。赛后表示「有点开心也有遗憾，已经给了全部」。赛前回到隔离区戴耳机、完全封闭外界，保持专注。
paragraphs.en: Wu Peng, b. 2002 Shaoyang Hunan, speed specialist. 2024 Wujiang World Cup victory marked his arrival; he said stable performance comes from constant accumulation of training, focusing on executing training level. At Paris, quarter-final win by 0.002s, semi-final beat Watson, final 4.77s PB silver, 0.02s behind Leonardo. Post-race: a bit happy but regret, gave everything. Pre-race headphone ritual in isolation zone for full concentration.

sources.label: 新华网/澎湃 巴黎奥运

title.zh: 中国首枚奥运奖牌与跨界转型
title.en: China's first Olympic medal and cross-discipline transition

summary.zh: 巴黎 6.18 秒亚洲纪录、银牌；15 岁从田径转项；AI 辅助与跨界选材；「努力才有机会成功」。
summary.en: Paris 6.18s Asian record, silver; switched from track at 15; AI-assisted prep and cross-discipline recruitment; 'Work hard to have a chance.'

paragraphs.zh: 邓丽娟 2000 年生，东华大学，15 岁从田径转攀岩。田径底子带来爆发力与节奏感，九年内成为世界级速度选手。巴黎奥运女子速度决赛对 Mirosław 以 6.18 秒创亚洲纪录获银，为中国攀岩首枚奥运奖牌。报道称背后是二十年静默努力、跨界选材（2017 年 3716 人筛选）、国家训练与标准速度墙建设；2024 备战中采用 AI 视频分析优化技术。她常说的「努力！你才有可能成功」成为代表句。
paragraphs.en: Deng Lijuan, b. 2000, Donghua University, switched from track at 15. Track gave explosive power and rhythm; world-class in nine years. Paris women's speed final 6.18s Asian record, silver—China's first Olympic climbing medal. Media described 20 years of quiet effort, cross-discipline recruitment (2017), national camps and speed walls; 2024 prep used AI video analysis. Her motto: 'Work hard! Only then do you have a chance to succeed.'

title.zh: 2023 亚洲区资格赛冠军与巴黎首秀
title.en: 2023 Asian qualifier champion and Paris debut

summary.zh: 4 岁开始攀岩；2023 亚洲区奥运资格赛夺冠获巴黎名额；难度/综合专项。
summary.en: Started climbing at 4; 2023 Asian Olympic qualifier champion; lead/combi specialist.

paragraphs.zh: 张悦彤 4 岁开始攀岩，难度/综合专项。2023 年亚洲区奥运资格赛夺冠，为中国拿到巴黎奥运难度/综合名额，并在巴黎完成首秀。
paragraphs.en: Zhang Yuetong started climbing at 4, lead/combi specialist. 2023 Asian Olympic qualifier champion, secured Paris spot for China, made Paris debut.

title.zh: 2022 世界杯抱石铜牌与巴黎奥运
title.en: 2022 World Cup bouldering bronze and Paris Olympic

summary.zh: 6 岁接触、8 岁系统训练；2022 首战世界杯抱石铜牌创历史；「女子训练男子化」；2024 柯桥铜牌、吴江难度银牌，巴黎资格。
summary.en: Started at 6, systematic training at 8; 2022 first World Cup bouldering bronze; 2024 Keqiao bronze, Wujiang lead silver; Paris Olympic qualifier.

paragraphs.zh: 骆知鹭 6 岁接触攀岩，8 岁系统训练，由北京荣岩团培养。2019 年起在国家队系统训练，队内采取「女子训练男子化」，技术训练对标男子路线。2022 年 6 月攀岩世界杯意大利布里克森站，16 岁、就读北京十一学校的她首登世界级赛场，预赛第三、半决赛并列第四，决赛第四条线三次尝试后到顶，夺得女子攀石铜牌，成为首位站上世界杯攀石领奖台的中国选手。国际攀联解说称其「冷静而有力的攀爬」晋级决赛。
paragraphs.en: Luo Zhilu started at 6, systematic training at 8, developed by Beijing Rongyantuan. From 2019 she trained with the national team with 'women training like men'—technical work aligned to men's routes. At the June 2022 Brixen World Cup, aged 16 and at Beijing No.11 School, she made her World Cup debut, qualified third and semi-final joint fourth; in the final she topped the fourth boulder on her third try to take bronze, becoming the first Chinese athlete on a World Cup bouldering podium. IFSC commentary described her 'calm and powerful climbing' in the final.

paragraphs.zh: 2024 年骆知鹭延续突破：4 月柯桥站女子攀石铜牌，吴江站女子难度 44+ 获银牌（中国选手世界杯难度赛最好成绩），一周内两登领奖台。6 月巴黎奥运会资格系列赛布达佩斯站以总分 122.8 锁定女子两项全能奥运席位。她曾获十四运会 16 岁以下组女子两项全能冠军；面对平均身高 1.65 米的世界顶尖选手，身高 1.61 米的她以年龄小、训练刻苦、体能储备提升空间大著称。
paragraphs.en: In 2024 Luo continued: April Keqiao bouldering bronze, Wujiang lead silver (44+, China's best World Cup lead result), two podiums in a week. In June she secured the Paris Olympic quota in boulder & lead at Budapest. She had won U16 combined at the 14th National Games; at 1.61 m against world elites averaging 1.65 m, she is known for youth, hard work, and room for physical growth.

text.zh: 没有想到！首次参加世界杯便站上领奖台非常激动，但也留有遗憾：第三条线体力有点不太够了，没有发挥出全部能力，还是缺少经验。
text.en: I didn't expect it! Very excited to be on the podium in my first World Cup, but there was regret: on the third problem I didn't have enough strength left and couldn't show my full ability—still lacking experience.

text.zh: 我对自己的表现满意。距离上次铜牌已经超过一年了，所以特别开心。结果超出预期。我在训练上做了一些调整，现在更有信心了。
text.en: I'm satisfied with my performance. It's been over a year since my last bronze so I am really excited. The result is above my expectation. I have made some changes to my training and now I feel more confident.

title.zh: 两届奥运与 2025 世界杯抱石冠军
title.en: Two Olympics and 2025 World Cup bouldering champion

summary.zh: 8 岁攀岩、16 岁入队；厦门难度季军首枚世界杯难度奖牌、东京资格第一人；东京后低迷，亚运铜牌回归；2023 独自赴欧训练，2025 伯尔尼带伤夺冠。
summary.en: Started at 8, national team at 16; Xiamen lead bronze China first; Tokyo qualifier first Chinese male; post-Tokyo slump, Asian Games comeback; 2023 Europe solo, 2025 Bern gold.

paragraphs.zh: 潘愚非小时候体质弱练跆拳道，道馆旁有岩壁便开始爬，8 岁专练攀岩，16 岁进国家队。2017 年厦门世界杯男子难度季军，为中国队首枚世界杯难度奖牌；2019 年预赛总积分第二获东京奥运资格，成为中国男子攀岩奥运第一人，东京首秀第 14。东京后他经历约两年低迷，自述「觉得自己越来越重、越来越难抬腿，甚至渐渐失去举手的勇气」；队内多次谈心后思想与训练都有转变。
paragraphs.en: Pan Yufei took up taekwondo as a child for fitness, then tried the wall next door and switched to climbing at 8; national team at 16. 2017 Xiamen World Cup lead bronze—China's first World Cup lead medal; 2019 qualified for Tokyo (first Chinese male climber), finished 14th. After Tokyo he went through a long low: he described feeling 'heavier and heavier,' losing the courage to raise his hands; after repeated talks with the team his mindset and training improved.

paragraphs.zh: 2023 年杭州亚运会男子两项全能，他在强手云集中后程逆转获铜牌，为中国亚运史上首枚男子攀岩个人两项全能奖牌，赛后说「去年状态比较低迷，今年慢慢好转，这个成绩提升了信心」。同年他做出关键决定：独自赴欧训练，自己处理签证、订场、找岩馆，从「像经理多过像运动员」的经历里变得更有耐心。2024 巴黎资格赛他拼得银牌并获巴黎席位。
paragraphs.en: At the 2023 Hangzhou Asian Games he came from behind to take combined bronze—China's first men's individual combined medal at the Asiad—saying his confidence had improved after a tough 2022. That year he chose to train alone in Europe, handling visas, bookings and walls himself; the experience made him more patient. He took silver at the 2024 Olympic qualifier and secured his Paris spot.

paragraphs.zh: 2025 年伯尔尼世界杯抱石决赛前，他双臂拉伤未愈、背部旧伤在第二条线路加重，第四条线「视线发黑、左腿几乎抬不起」，仍第二次尝试到顶，以 0.1 分力压法国 Schalck、日本 Anraku，夺得中国首枚世界杯抱石金牌。他赛后说「没想成绩，只是爬」「输不可怕，可怕的是害怕」「在成为像样的运动员之前，先成了更好的自己」。
paragraphs.en: Before the 2025 Bern boulder final he had torn forearms and aggravated a back injury on problem two; on the fourth he could barely lift his left leg but topped on his second try, edging Schalck and Anraku by 0.1 for China's first World Cup bouldering gold. He said he hadn't thought about scores, just climbed; 'Losing is not scary, being afraid is'; before being a decent athlete he first became a better version of himself.

text.zh: 攀岩不一样，像是和自己对话。你不是在和别人对抗，而是在尝试理解自己。
text.en: Climbing was different. It was like talking to yourself. You are not fighting other people. You are trying to understand yourself.

text.zh: 我就告诉自己一件事：享受它。
text.en: I just kept telling myself one thing: enjoy it.

text.zh: 输不可怕，可怕的是害怕。
text.en: Losing is not scary. Being afraid is.

text.zh: 在成为像样的运动员之前，我先成了更好的自己。
text.en: Before becoming a decent athlete, I first became a better version of myself.

value.en: Bern World Cup boulder gold, China first

title.zh: 四连冠、大满贯与现任主教练
title.en: Four world titles, grand slam and head coach

summary.zh: 2007 年 18 岁世锦赛金牌 8.76 秒世界纪录；2007/2009/2011/2012 四连冠；速度大满贯第一人；现任国家队速度主教练，巴黎双银。
summary.en: 2007 aged 18 World Champs gold 8.76s WR; four consecutive world titles; first speed grand slam; now national speed head coach, Paris double silver.

paragraphs.zh: 钟齐鑫 2007 年 9 月亚维农世锦赛 18 岁以 8.76 秒获男子速度金牌并创世界纪录，中国首夺速度世锦赛冠军。此后 2007、2009、2011、2012 四届世锦赛速度金牌，六次打破自己保持的世界纪录；唯一速度大满贯（世锦赛+世界杯年度+主要国际赛）。攀岩入奥时他已退役，奖牌机会留给下一代；退役后任国家队速度组主教练，巴黎奥运率伍鹏、邓丽娟等获双银。
paragraphs.en: Zhong Qixin September 2007 Avignon World Champs, aged 18, 8.76s men's speed gold and world record—China's first speed world title. Then four consecutive world titles 2007–2012, broke his own WR six times; only speed grand slam. When climbing entered Olympics he had retired; now head coach of national speed team, led Wu Peng and Deng Lijuan to Paris double silver.
